Its key design constraint is synchronized structured-vector-graph memory: structured records govern eligibility, vector representations support recall, and graph relations adjudicate support, contradiction, and supersession before gated context projection. Its central claim is that reliable personalization is a memory design problem: useful memory is structured, selectively exposed, continuously consolidated, and epistemically labeled rather than stored as undifferentiated conversation history. Beyond the framework, we instantiate MRMS as a lightweight prototype implementing structured records, vector retrieval, temporal policies, and graph-based revision. The prototype exercises the core substrate mechanisms through pre-generation memory selection, revision, boundary enforcement, and evidence attribution under controlled long-lived interaction scenarios with explicit evidence requirements.

</details>


### [502] [Formal Disco: Scalable Open-Ended Generation of Formally Verified Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04631)
*Gabriel Poesia,Simon Henniger,Tzu-Han Hsu,Yilun Du,Nada Amin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Formal Disco分布式系统，利用LLM协调三类工人（发起者、修复者、扩展者）大规模生成形式化验证程序的合成数据，通过最大熵原理和迭代微调提升多样性，在Dafny、Verus、Frama-C三种语言上生成数据集，微调模型性能匹配甚至超越Claude Opus 4.5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI生成代码成本骤降但质量保障不足，形式化验证虽提供最强保证，但验证感知语言缺乏人工编写示例数据，存在长期的数据稀缺问题。

Method: 1) 提出Formal Disco分布式协调系统，包含三类LLM工人：发起者（从README和文档草拟验证程序）、修复者（根据编译器和验证器反馈修复问题）、扩展者（扩展现有程序）；2) 提出最大熵原则，通过迭代监督微调生成多样化程序；3) 收集所有代理生成轨迹用于蒸馏和自我改进。

Result: 发布了Dafny、Verus、Frama-C三种语言的大规模合成验证程序数据集；微调后的开源模型在验证相关任务上匹配甚至超越Claude Opus 4.5的性能。

Conclusion: 该工作为形式化推理领域的大规模合成数据生成提供了可行路径，克服了长期存在的验证语言数据稀缺障碍。

Abstract: The cost of producing code is rapidly diminishing with increasingly capable AI agents, while quality assurance of generated programs has not kept pace. Formal verification provides the strongest possible guarantees, but the ability of AI models to work with verification-aware languages is hindered by the scarcity of human-written examples of programs in those languages. To tackle this prevalent data scarcity issue, we propose Formal Disco: a distributed system for coordination of LLM-based workers that can be easily applied to open-ended synthetic data generation at scale. We use Formal Disco to share tasks and programs between three classes of workers: "initiators", which read random READMEs from open-source repositories and documentation snippets to sketch a related verified program, "fixers" which take compiler and verifier feedback and attempt to resolve issues, and "extenders" that take working programs and propose patches to expand them. Formal Disco records all agent-generated traces and uses them both for initial distillation from a stronger model as well as self-improvement. We also propose a principle of maximum entropy for synthetic program generation, and use entropy maximization via iterative supervised fine-tuning to learn to generate increasingly diverse programs over time. We release large datasets of synthetic verified programs in three languages - Dafny, Verus, and Frama-C -, and fine-tune open models for verification-relevant tasks, often matching or exceeding the performance of Claude Opus 4.5. Overall, our work offers a path to create synthetic data at scale for formal reasoning domains and overcome the long-standing data barrier.

</details>


### [503] [Integrated Altruistic and Fairness Preference Induces Advanced Mutual Cooperation in Sequential Social Dilemmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04710)
*Yu Wei,Yukiko Ogura,Yoshiyuki Ohmura,Ildefons Magrans de Abril,Hoshinori Kanazawa,Yasuo Kuniyoshi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合利他偏好和公平偏好的新型效用函数（AFP），用于多智能体强化学习中的社会困境问题，实验证明该方法能有效诱导智能体实现合作，获得更高的集体奖励和更公平的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体强化学习中，分布式智能体在社交困境下难以实现合作，因为个体利益与集体利益冲突，个体理性导致次优群体结果。而人类能够通过社会偏好实现合作，受此启发，研究者希望将社会偏好引入MARL以促进合作。

Method: 设计了一种名为AFP（利他与公平偏好）的奖励共享机制，将利他偏好（关注他人奖励）和公平偏好（关注平等）融入效用函数，将自身与他人的奖励转化为合作行为的激励。

Result: 在两个具有挑战性的序列社交困境游戏中，AFP智能体成功实现了相互合作，相比标准RL和 Inequity Aversion 基线方法，获得了更高的集体奖励和更公平的结果。

Conclusion: 利他偏好鼓励智能体为公共物品做出贡献，而公平偏好则诱导智能体之间的相互行为，两者共同作用促进了合作。

Abstract: Inducing cooperation among distributed agents is still a difficult problem in the field of multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), particularly in social dilemma situations. There, individual interests are misaligned with the common good and individual rationality leads to suboptimal group outcomes. In contrast, humans are able to achieve cooperation with one another in such situations. A common explanation for such cooperative behavior is that individuals have social preferences. In order to achieve cooperation in MARL, we design a new utility function integrating altruistic preferences (incentive for other's reward) and fairness preferences (incentive for equality) from social psychology and behavioral economics, namely, Altruistic and Fairness Preference (AFP), a reward-sharing mechanism which converts one's own and other's rewards to incentives for cooperative behavior. We performed comparative experiments with standard RL and inequity aversion agents in two challenging sequential social dilemma games, and showed that AFP agents successfully achieved mutual cooperation with more collective rewards and higher equity than the baselines. To further understand the progression of AFP during training, we subsequently explore the effects of altruistic preferences and fairness preferences on agents' behavior. The results suggest that altruistic preferences encourage agents to contribute to the public goods, and fairness preferences induce mutual behavior between agents.

</details>


### [504] [FORGE: Research-Trajectory Hijacking Attacks on Deep Research Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04718)
*Yue Pan,Ziheng Zhang,Junxiang Lei,Changhao Jia,Qingyi Si,Hongcheng Guo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度研究智能体在多轮检索和报告生成中面临的新型攻击面——规划层投毒，提出了FORGE两级攻击方法，以及PRISM评估指标和RQA防御策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明检索增强生成（RAG）系统易受投毒攻击，但已有工作主要针对单轮问答。深度研究智能体涉及多轮递归检索和子任务规划，存在更大的攻击表面，此前尚未被探索。

Method: 提出FORGE攻击（包含文档内推理伪造 + 文档间链协调）；设计PRISM指标（按认知类型对感染报告声明加权）；提出RQA防御（将递归后续生成锚定到根查询）。

Result: 在25个查询上，Network FORGE以5个注入文档达到26.4% PRISM，并出现深度迁移现象；在10个查询的防御子集上，RQA将PRISM从38.5%降至18.3%。

Conclusion: 深度研究智能体的子任务规划层存在严重的投毒风险，FORGE攻击能有效劫持其推理链，而RQA提供了一种轻量级的防御方案。

Abstract: Deep research agents decompose open-ended queries into subtasks, retrieve web evidence over multiple rounds, and synthesize long-form reports. This workflow creates a planning-layer poisoning surface: adversarial documents that enter the retrieval pool can steer follow-up questions and turn a local injection into report-level contamination. We present FORGE (Fabricated Orchestrated Reasoning chain for aGent Exploitation), a two-level attack that combines intra-document reasoning fabrication with inter-document chain coordination to hijack subtask planning. We further introduce the PRISM metric, which weights infected report claims by cognitive type, and Root Query Anchoring, a lightweight defense that ties recursive follow-up generation to the root query. Across 25 queries, Network FORGE reaches 26.4% PRISM with five injected documents and exhibits depth migration, in which recursive synthesis shifts poisoned content from overt framing into factual premises. On the 10-query defense subset, RQA (Root Query Anchoring) reduces PRISM from 38.5% to 18.3%.

</details>


### [505] [FM-ChangeNet: Learning Change through Pathwise Feature Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04750)
*Roie Kazoom,George Leifman,Genady Beryozkin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: FM-ChangeNet提出了一种基于路径监督的遥感变化检测框架，通过学习特征空间中的时间条件速度场，构建连续中间状态进行双时相推理，而非传统端点对比。该速度场提供更密集的监督信号，其幅值可作为可解释的变化线索，有效区分真实结构变化与光照、配准误差等干扰。实验表明该方法在多个遥感基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统变化检测方法仅依赖端点（前后时相特征）对比，监督信号稀疏且易受光照变化、配准误差等干扰因素影响，难以捕捉时序演化的连续动态。作者希望引入路径级监督，通过连续中间状态提供更密集的监督信号，并利用速度场幅值作为可解释的变化线索。

Method: 1) 编码前后时相特征后构建中间潜在状态；2) 学习时间条件速度场 $\hat{v}_θ(z_t,t)$ 建模变换轨迹；3) 路径级监督约束连续中间状态；4) 速度场幅值作为空间变化线索区分真实结构变化与干扰；5) 多尺度架构含跨时相对齐、时间条件粗到细流解码；6) 统一目标函数融合流监督、轨迹一致性、空间正则化和分割损失。

Result: 在遥感变化检测基准上，FM-ChangeNet生成的结构化变化表示更加鲁棒，并取得了最优（SOTA）性能。

Conclusion: 路径监督范式比端点监督范式更有效，速度场不仅能作为传输机制，还能提供可解释的变化表示，有效区分结构变化与干扰因素。

Abstract: We present FM-ChangeNet, a pathwise-supervised framework for change detection that reformulates bi-temporal reasoning as continuous transport in feature space rather than static endpoint comparison. Given encoded pre and post-temporal representations, we construct intermediate latent states and learn a time-conditioned velocity field $\hat{v}_θ(z_t,t)$ along the transformation trajectory. This pathwise formulation constrains the predictor over a continuum of intermediate states, providing a denser and less ambiguous supervision signal than conventional endpoint-only segmentation and enabling the model to capture temporal evolution explicitly. The learned velocity field is not only a transport mechanism but also an interpretable representation of change: its magnitude serves as a spatially localized change cue that helps distinguish true structural variation from nuisance effects such as illumination shifts and spatial misalignment. We develop a hierarchical multi-scale architecture with cross-temporal alignment, time-conditioned coarse-to-fine flow decoding, and a unified objective that couples flow supervision, trajectory consistency, spatial regularization, and segmentation loss. Experiments on remote sensing benchmarks show that the proposed framework produces more structured and robust change representations while achieving state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [506] [AgenticPD: A Stage-Aware Agentic Framework for Physical Design QoR Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04758)
*Shuo Ren,Zijin Cheng,Yaohui Han,Libo Shen,Leilei Jin,Wanting Tian,Rongliang Fu,Chao Wang,Bei Yu,Tsung-Yi Ho*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AgenticPD是一个面向物理设计QoR优化的阶段感知智能体框架，通过Judge Agent导航搜索、阶段专用智能体本地决策、检查点重用等机制，在减少全流程EDA运行次数的同时实现优异的布线后时序结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理设计的QoR优化困难且昂贵，每个评估都需要运行完整的EDA流程。现有方法将优化视为平面参数调优或基于LLM的脚本生成任务，无法有效利用阶段性中间结果，导致大量重复计算和低效搜索。

Method: 提出AgenticPD框架，围绕物理设计流的阶段边界组织：Judge Agent负责全局搜索导航，阶段专用智能体使用本地工具在本阶段内做局部决策；通过结构化观测、执行历史和智能体上下文管理，支持从先前中间状态分支并重用检查点，所有候选方案在布线后签收阶段评估。

Result: AgenticPD在多个基线对比中实现了优异的布线后时序结果，同时在功耗和面积方面保持竞争力。

Conclusion: AgenticPD通过阶段感知的智能体协作和检查点重用机制，有效减少了全流程EDA重复运行，在物理设计QoR优化中取得了显著成效。

Abstract: Physical design quality-of-results~(QoR) optimization is hard and expensive. Choices made at one stage can help or hurt later stages. Each evaluation requires a costly EDA run through the full flow. While existing methods still treat optimization as flat parameter tuning or a LLM-based script generation task, we present AgenticPD, a stage-aware agentic framework for physical design QoR optimization. Instead of re-running the full flow after every trial, AgenticPD is organized around the stage boundaries of the physical design flow, where a Judge Agent navigates the search and stage-specialized agents make local decisions within their own stage using stage-local tools. Additionally, the agent harness in AgenticPD provides structured observations, execution history, and agent context management. As a result, the system can branch from prior intermediate states and reuse checkpoints to continue the optimization procedure, and every candidate is evaluated at the post-route signoff. Across these baselines, AgenticPD achieves strong post-route timing while remaining competitive in power and area.

</details>


### [507] [CARL: Constraint-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Planning with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04854)
*Qiuyi Qi,Jinjian Zhang,Mutian Bao,Tian Liang,Guocong Li,Dongnan Liu,Wei Zhou,Jie Liu,Ming Kong,Linjian Mo,Feng Zhang,Qiang Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CARL框架，通过约束感知强化学习增强LLM对任务约束的内在关注，在多个规划任务上超越基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM虽具有强大推理能力，但生成计划时常违反任务约束，现有方法依赖外部工具或任务分解，未能提升模型内在的约束感知能力。

Method: 提出CARL框架，通过比较模型在有无约束输入下的输出分布来设计约束感知奖励，激励模型关注约束、惩罚忽视约束的行为，兼容多种RL框架，无需外部求解器。

Result: 在BlocksWorld、TravelPlanner、T-Eval上，CARL显著优于标准RFT基线和最先进推理模型，约束关注度明显提升。

Conclusion: CARL能有效增强LLM内在的约束感知能力，实现可扩展的端到端约束感知规划，无需依赖外部工具。

Abstract: Despite their strong reasoning capabilities and extensive world knowledge, Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently generate plans that violate task constraints, undermining their reliability in real-world applications. This deficiency arises from a lack of systematic mechanisms to incorporate constraint information during the generation process. While existing approaches attempt to mitigate this by relying on external tools or task decomposition, they fail to enhance the model's intrinsic constraint awareness. To address this, we propose Constraint-Aware Reinforcement Learning (CARL), a novel RL framework designed to strengthen LLMs' intrinsic focus on constraints. CARL introduces a constraint-aware reward by comparing the model's output distributions under constrained and unconstrained inputs, encouraging constraint focus and penalizing neglect. Compatible with various RL frameworks and requiring no external solvers or top models, CARL enables scalable, end-to-end constraint-aware planning. Extensive experiments on BlocksWorld, TravelPlanner, and T-Eval demonstrate that CARL significantly outperforms standard Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) baselines and state-of-the-art reasoning models, exhibiting a markedly increased focus on constraints.

</details>


### [508] [Medi-Gemma: A Hybrid Clinical Decision Support System Integrating Deterministic EMR Analytics and Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04907)
*Mohammed Saim Ahmed Quadri,Yunzhe Xue,Justin W. Ady,Usman Roshan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Medi-Gemma 是一种用于伤口病理分诊和工作流自动化的临床决策支持系统（CDSS），采用解耦架构分离临床感知与数据编排，通过多阶段管道、意图路由、地面真值注入及确定性安全验证，有效消除语义漂移、防止数据库崩溃并提升事实性 adherence。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在法律高风险临床场景中面临结构性幻觉、对表格化患者数据的弱确定性推理以及向量检索遗漏等关键限制，亟需一种更安全、可追溯的 LLM 临床部署模式。

Method: 提出解耦框架：ClinicalOrchestrator 协调多阶段流程；DataManager 通过类型强制清理非结构化 EMR；IntentRouter 分支配决策略路径（PandasQueryEngine）与患者特定推理路径（ClinicalRAGEngine）；核心创新 Ground Truth Injection Module 截取查询、提取 ID、查询结构化数据，将最新临床快照嵌入 LLM prompt 作为覆盖上下文；ProtocolManager 与 SafetyVerifier 提供确定性安全合规保障。

Result: 该架构消除了语义上下文漂移，防止了数据库编译崩溃，并提升了对后端临床存储库的事实一致性 adherence。

Conclusion: Medi-Gemma 为需要结构化数据保真度、检索基础与确定性安全保障的 LLM 临床决策支持提供了一种更安全的设计模式。

Abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) in high-stakes clinical settings remains limited by structural hallucinations, weak deterministic reasoning over tabular patient data, and omissions in vector retrieval. This paper presents the architecture and validation of Medi-Gemma, a Clinical Decision Support System (CDSS) for wound pathology triage and workflow automation. The platform introduces a decoupled framework that separates clinical perception from data orchestration while preserving traceable reasoning. Medi-Gemma uses a multi-stage pipeline coordinated by a centralized ClinicalOrchestrator. Data requests are handled without generative inference by a DataManager that cleans unstructured Electronic Medical Record (EMR) files through type coercion. Natural language queries are processed by a hierarchical IntentRouter, which routes requests to deterministic analytics paths executed by a PandasQueryEngine or to patient-specific reasoning managed by a ClinicalRAGEngine using a CPU-optimized vector store. A key contribution is the Ground Truth Injection Module, which intercepts patient-specific queries, extracts numeric identification tokens, queries the structured dataframe via Pandas, retrieves the latest validated clinical state, and embeds this snapshot as an overriding context block in the LLM prompt before generation. Safety compliance is enforced by a deterministic ProtocolManager that maps clinical terminology to fixed evidence-based risk pathways, while a SafetyVerifier phrase filter prevents output rule violations. Validation shows that this architecture eliminates semantic context drift, prevents database compilation crashes, and improves factual adherence to backend clinical repositories. These results support Medi-Gemma as a safer pattern for LLM-based clinical decision support where structured data fidelity, retrieval grounding, and deterministic safeguards are essential.

</details>


### [509] [STAPO: Selective Trajectory-Aware Policy Optimization for LLM Agent Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04963)
*Qiuyi Qi,Tian Liang,Mutian Bao,Jinjian Zhang,Dongnan Liu,Wei Zhou,Linjian Mo,Ming Kong,Jie Liu,Feng Zhang,Qiang Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对强化学习中轨迹忽视问题，提出基于归一化熵的STAPO框架，在长程任务中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RL在LLM智能体长程任务中面临稀疏延迟奖励导致的轨迹忽视问题；现有基于Shannon熵的步骤级监督混淆了状态复杂性与智能体置信度，无法可靠估计决策可靠性。

Method: 提出归一化熵衡量相对于智能体平均行为的置信度偏差；构建层次化分组RL框架STAPO，利用归一化熵定位轨迹忽视的异常步骤，通过轨迹感知奖励与轨迹独立惩罚的联合机制进行优化。

Result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop、Search-Augmented QA等基准上达到SOTA性能，显著缓解轨迹忽视问题。

Conclusion: STAPO有效且鲁棒地解决了长程任务中的轨迹忽视问题，验证了归一化熵在增强轨迹感知方面的有效性。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is the dominant paradigm for training Large Language Model (LLM) agents on long-horizon tasks. However, sparse and delayed rewards often lead to trajectory neglect, in which agents lose focus on the task goal and interaction history at intermediate steps. Prior work has explored step-level supervision using Shannon-entropy-based uncertainty signals, which conflate inherent state complexity with agent confidence and therefore provide unreliable estimates of decision reliability. To address this issue, we propose normalized entropy, which measures confidence deviations relative to an agent's average behavior under a given state, thereby strengthening the association between low-quality actions and trajectory neglect. Building on this insight, we introduce Selective Trajectory-Aware Policy Optimization (STAPO), a hierarchical group-based RL framework. STAPO leverages normalized entropy to locate outlier steps associated with trajectory neglect and optimizes them via a joint mechanism of trajectory-aware reward and trajectory-independent penalty, enhancing trajectory awareness while preserving training stability. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-Augmented QA demonstrate that STAPO achieves state-of-the-art performance while substantially alleviating trajectory neglect, validating its effectiveness and robustness for agentic tasks.

</details>


### [510] [Quantum-Inspired Harmonic Decision Models: A Computational Framework for Music Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05007)
*Josef Pavlíček,Petra Pavlíčková,Martin Molhanec*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种量子启发的计算框架用于音乐中的和声决策，将和声问题建模为组合空间中的优化问题，结合了基于干涉的和声生成阶段和经典优化过程，并在《Autumn Leaves》等乐曲上进行了评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统音乐和声生成方法在并行考虑多个和声备选方案及平衡多种音乐约束方面存在局限，需要一种能够高效探索大规模组合和声空间的计算框架。

Method: 将和声生成建模为结构化组合空间中的优化问题；采用量子启发的干涉机制并行评估多个候选和弦序列；结合经典优化过程（基于调性和声理论）对序列进行精炼，确保结构连贯性与风格合理性。

Result: 定量分析显示优化阶段显著降低了和弦密度、增强了和声稳定性并改善了功能性组织；专家评估表明增加的和声复杂性并不总是被认为更自然，风格语境具有重要影响。

Conclusion: 和声生成可被解释为受限搜索空间中的结构化决策过程；量子启发方法可能为建模音乐等创意领域的复杂决策过程提供有用框架；该工作对量子启发的认知与决策模型研究有贡献。

Abstract: This paper introduces a quantum-inspired computational framework for harmonic decision-making in music. The proposed approach formulates harmonization as an optimization problem within a structured combinatorial space, where multiple candidate chord sequences are evaluated under interacting musical constraints. The model combines an interference-based harmonization stage with a classical optimization procedure grounded in tonal harmony. The quantum-inspired component enables the parallel consideration of multiple harmonic alternatives, while the classical stage refines the resulting sequences to ensure structural coherence and stylistic plausibility.
  The framework is evaluated on selected musical examples, including Autumn Leaves and It's a Long Way to Tipperary. Quantitative analysis shows that the optimization stage significantly reduces chord density, increases harmonic stability, and improves functional organization. At the same time, expert evaluation highlights the importance of stylistic context, demonstrating that increased harmonic complexity is not always perceived as more natural. The results suggest that harmonic generation can be interpreted as a structured decision-making process in a constrained search space. The proposed approach provides a computational model that integrates domain-specific knowledge with an interference-based search mechanism.
  Although preliminary, this work indicates that quantum-inspired methods may offer a useful framework for modeling complex decision processes in creative domains such as music. The proposed framework contributes to ongoing research on quantum-inspired models of cognition and decision-making in complex biological and creative systems.

</details>


### [511] [Toward Trustworthy Large Language Model Agents in Healthcare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05055)
*Hadi Hasan,Safaa Salman,Adam Tai Abou Dargham,Ammar Mohanna,Ali Chehab*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CareConnect 是一个基于LLM的医疗预约调度对话代理，通过函数调用、RAG和确定性安全护栏实现91.8%任务完成率、96%安全合规性和每预约$0.0324的低成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗预约调度长期存在手动协调、遗留系统碎片化和高管理负担等瓶颈，导致医疗服务效率低下、患者就医可及性受限。

Method: 采用LLM函数调用、检索增强生成（RAG）和分层确定性安全护栏，编排8个领域专用工具支持预约全流程操作，并通过紧急检测和医疗意图拒绝等短路机制保障安全。

Result: 在680个任务场景的基准测试中，任务完成率91.8%，中位延迟2.2秒，安全合规性96%，每预约运营成本$0.0324。

Conclusion: 精心限定范围并严格保护安全的LLM代理能够可靠地自动化复杂医疗运营流程，同时保持安全保证和显著的成本效益。

Abstract: Healthcare appointment scheduling remains a persistent operational bottleneck, driven by manual coordination, fragmented legacy systems, and high administrative overhead. These inefficiencies constrain provider availability and degrade patient access to care. This paper presents CareConnect, a safety-first conversational agent for healthcare logistics automation that leverages large language model (LLM) function calling, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and layered deterministic safety guardrails. The system orchestrates eight domain-specific tools to support appointment booking, modification, cancellation, and facility information retrieval, while enforcing strict scope constraints that prohibit medical advice or diagnosis. Safety-critical situations are handled through deterministic short-circuit mechanisms for emergency detection and medical intent refusal. We evaluate CareConnect on a comprehensive benchmark of 680 task-oriented scenarios spanning end-to-end workflows, multi-turn interactions, and edge cases. Experimental results demonstrate a 91.8% task completion rate with a median per-request latency of 2.2 seconds, 96.0% safety compliance on the dedicated safety-critical evaluation subset, and an average operational cost of $0.0324 per appointment, yielding a significant cost reduction compared to manual human scheduling. These findings show that carefully scoped and rigorously safeguarded LLM-based agents can reliably automate complex healthcare operational workflows while maintaining safety guarantees and achieving substantial cost efficiency. The source code and system implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/Hadi-Hsn/CareConnect.

</details>


### [512] [Diffusion-Guided Uncertainty-Aware Delayed Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05064)
*Junqi Tu,Zejiao Liu,Fangfei Li,Yang Tang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DUPO方法，利用扩散模型建模延迟状态与当前状态的关系，并基于差异估计加权延迟策略，有效解决了随机MDP中延迟反馈导致的性能下降问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法忽略了随机MDP中延迟状态与真实状态之间的固有差异，理论证明这种差异会导致最优策略退化。

Method: 使用扩散模型显式建模延迟状态与当前状态之间的关系，利用差异估计对延迟策略进行加权优化。

Result: 在多种随机延迟的连续机器人控制任务中，DUPO一致优于现有方法，在长延迟和随机延迟场景下依然有效。

Conclusion: DUPO通过扩散模型捕捉延迟差异并据此调整策略，为延迟强化学习提供了新的有效解决方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning in real world environments often suffers from severe performance degradation due to delayed feedback. Existing approaches typically mitigate performance degradation caused by observation delays by constructing augmented states or predicting the true states. However, these methods often overlook the inherent discrepancy between delayed state and true states induced by stochastic MDP. We theoretically prove the existence of such a discrepancy and show that it leads to the degradation of the optimal policy. To address this challenge, we propose Diffusion Guided Uncertainty Aware Delayed Policy Optimization (DUPO). Our method explicitly models the relationship between delayed state message and the current state using a diffusion model, and leverages the resulting discrepancy estimates to weight delayed policies. Extensive experiments on continuous robotic control tasks with multiple stochastic delays demonstrate that DUPO consistently outperforms existing methods and remains effective even under long and random delay scenarios.

</details>


### [513] [ASSEMCAD: Production-Ready CAD Assembly Generation from Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05123)
*Yurui Dong,Shu Zou,Siqi Li,Nianchen Deng,Hongbin Zhou,Xuemeng Yang,Pinlong Cai,Licheng Wen,Xinyu Cai,Botian Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AssemCAD 是一个基于公理框架的文本到 CAD 装配体生成系统，通过显式建模零件、端口、配合关系和工程原则，显著提升了多组件机械装配体的可解释性、可复用性和物理有效性，优于传统代码生成的基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 Text-to-CAD 方法主要聚焦于单个零件生成，而生产级机械装配体生成尚未解决。装配体需要协调多组件推理、功能接口、装配关系、工程原理和物理一致性，直接生成可执行 CAD 代码不足以构建机械有效且可复用的装配体。

Method: AssemCAD 首先构建一个公理化的装配规范，包含类型化零件、几何支持的端口、可执行配合和工程公理；然后引入基于端口和配合的 CAD 装配库，通过确定性配合变换执行符号装配关系，并用 B-Rep 几何证据验证声明的接口；最后支持按需合成可复用的参数化组件工厂。

Result: 在 AssemBench 基准测试上，AssemCAD 在装配保持度和物理有效性方面显著优于基于代码生成的 CAD 基线方法，且能泛化到不同的基础模型主干上。

Conclusion: 通过将公理化的装配推理与确定性几何执行相结合，AssemCAD 将 Text-to-CAD 从孤立零件生成扩展到面向生产级机械装配体设计，实现了可解释、可复用且物理一致的装配体生成。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and programmatic CAD have significantly improved Text-to-CAD generation for individual parts. However, production-ready mechanical assembly generation remains largely unsolved. Unlike single-part modeling, assemblies require coordinated reasoning over multiple components, functional interfaces, assembly relations, engineering principles, and physical consistency. Consequently, directly generating executable CAD code is insufficient for constructing mechanically valid and reusable assemblies. We present AssemCAD, an axiom-grounded framework for production-ready CAD assembly generation from natural language. Instead of representing an assembly as monolithic CAD code, AssemCAD first constructs an axiomatic Assembly Specification consisting of typed parts, geometry-backed ports, executable mates, and engineering axioms. Each assembly relation is explicitly grounded in one or more engineering principles, making the resulting specification interpretable, reusable, and verifiable. To realize this specification, AssemCAD introduces a port- and mate-based CAD assembly library that executes symbolic assembly relations through deterministic mate transformations and validates declared interfaces using concrete B-Rep geometric evidence. Built on this representation and library, AssemCAD further supports on-demand synthesis of reusable parametric component factories for both standard and open-world geometries. Experiments on AssemBench show that AssemCAD substantially improves assembly preservation and physical validity over code-centric CAD generation baselines, while generalizing across different foundation-model backbones. By combining axiom-grounded assembly reasoning with deterministic geometric execution, AssemCAD extends Text-to-CAD from isolated part generation toward production-ready mechanical assembly design.

</details>


### [514] [TacReasoner: A Dynamic Tactile-Language Framework for Interactive Reasoning in Real-World Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05131)
*Kailin Lyu,Di Wu,Long Xiao,Jianning Zeng,Jianwei He,Chang Lin,Lianyu Hu,Lin Shu,Jie Hao,Ce Hao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 TacReasoner，一种动态触觉-语言推理框架，通过动态感知编码器和首个触觉思维链数据集 TouchCoT-10k，解决动态触觉信号建模不足和触觉基础模型幻觉问题，仅用 7B 参数即在多项任务上超越 14B 模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉感知对智能系统至关重要，但现有研究存在两大挑战：(i) 动态触觉信号建模不足，限制了随时间演化的属性推理；(ii) 触觉基础模型因缺乏显式推理机制而产生幻觉，导致不稳定推理。

Method: 提出 TacReasoner 框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 动态感知触觉编码器（Dynamic-aware Tactile Encoder），增强动态触觉信号的感知与表示；2) 构建首个触觉思维链数据集 TouchCoT-10k，支持触觉输入的结构化推理。在此基础上建立 DynTac-Bench 评估基准。

Result: TacReasoner 在多个数据集上达到与 SOTA 模型相当的性能；仅用 7B 参数即在大多数子任务上超越 14B 的 VTV-LLM 模型，展现了高效性与有效性。

Conclusion: TacReasoner 通过动态感知编码和触觉思维链推理，有效解决了动态触觉信号建模和推理幻觉问题，为多模态触觉推理提供了一种高效且可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Among the five primary human senses, tactile is arguably the most fundamental to survival, as it enables the perception of physical contact and interaction in real-world environments. In this paper, we explore two key challenges of integrating tactile sensing into intelligent systems for multimodal reasoning: (i) insufficient modeling of dynamic tactile signals, which restricts reasoning over temporally evolving properties, and (ii) hallucination in tactile foundation models caused by the absence of explicit reasoning mechanisms, leading to unstable real-world inference. To address these challenges, we propose TacReasoner, a dynamic tactile-language framework for interactive reasoning in real-world scenarios. First, TacReasoner incorporates a Dynamic-aware Tactile Encoder to enhance the perception and representation of dynamic tactile signals. More importantly, we introduce TouchCoT-10k, the first tactile chain-of-thought dataset for structured reasoning over tactile inputs. Upon it, we establish DynTac-Bench to systematically evaluate dynamic tactile perception and real-world commonsense reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that TacReasoner achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art models across multiple datasets. Notably, despite using only 7B parameters, TacReasoner outperforms the 14B VTV-LLM model on most subtasks, highlighting its effectiveness and efficiency in tactile commonsense reasoning.

</details>


### [515] [DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05147)
*Xin Cheng,Xingkai Yu,Chenze Shao,Jiashi Li,Yunfan Xiong,Yi Qian,Jiaqi Zhu,Shirong Ma,Xiaokang Zhang,Jiasheng Ye,Qinyu Chen,Chengqi Deng,Jiping Yu,Damai Dai,Zhengyan Zhang,Yixuan Wei,Yixuan Tan,Wenkai Yang,Runxin Xu,Yu Wu,Zhean Xu,Xuanyu Wang,Muyang Chen,Rui Tian,Xiao Bi,Zhewen Hao,Shaoyuan Chen,Huanqi Cao,Wentao Zhang,Anyi Xu,Huishuai Zhang,Dongyan Zhao,Wenfeng Liang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DSpark是一个推测解码框架，通过半自回归架构（并行骨干+轻量序列模块）保持草稿质量，并采用置信度调度验证动态调整验证长度，在DeepSeek-V4部署中每用户生成速度提升60-85%，实现了此前无法达到的服务性能层级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有并行推测解码器虽然能一次生成长序列，但缺乏令牌间依赖关系导致接受率快速衰减；同时不加区分地验证长块会浪费批处理容量，严重降低高并发服务的吞吐量。

Method: 1）半自回归架构：并行骨干网络+轻量级顺序模块，引入块内依赖建模缓解后缀衰减；2）置信度调度验证：基于估计的前缀存活概率和引擎吞吐量特征，动态调整每个请求的验证长度。

Result: 在离线基准测试中显著提升接受长度；在DeepSeek-V4生产系统中，在相同吞吐量下每用户生成速度提升60-85%；防止了严格交互约束下的吞吐量严重下降，实现了服务系统的Pareto前沿推移。

Conclusion: DSpark通过统一高吞吐并行生成与自适应的负载感知验证，有效解决了推测解码中草稿质量与系统效率的权衡问题，在真实生产环境中取得了实质性的性能突破。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling draft generation from target verification. While recent parallel drafters efficiently propose long token sequences in a single forward pass, they suffer from rapid acceptance decay due to a lack of inter-token dependencies. Furthermore, indiscriminately verifying these extended blocks wastes critical batch capacity on tokens with high rejection risks, severely degrading throughput in high-concurrency serving systems. We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification. To maintain draft quality, DSpark utilizes a semi-autoregressive architecture, coupling a parallel backbone with a lightweight sequential module, to introduce intra-block dependency modeling and mitigate suffix decay. To optimize system efficiency, DSpark employs confidence-scheduled verification, dynamically tailoring the verification length for each request based on estimated prefix survival probabilities and engine-specific throughput profiles. On offline benchmarks across diverse domains, DSpark substantially improves the accepted length over state-of-the-art autoregressive and parallel drafters. When deployed within the DeepSeek-V4 serving system under live user traffic, DSpark successfully mitigates verification waste. Compared to the established production baseline (MTP-1), DSpark accelerates per-user generation speeds by 60 to 85 percent at matched throughput levels. More importantly, by preventing severe throughput degradation under strict interactivity constraints, it enables performance tiers that were previously unattainable, shifting the Pareto frontier of our serving system.

</details>


### [516] [The Changing Role of Symbolic Methods in Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05168)
*Jun Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出压缩原理，认为显式符号推理并非智能的本质属性，而是对现实进行简化建模的计算产物。由此推导出建模-推理权衡：模型保留信息越丰富，对符号推理的需求越少。这解释了传统符号AI和现代基础模型各自成功的原因。同时指出，随着AI系统越来越强大和不透明，符号方法反而对人类更重要——作为人机交互的接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 回应一个根本性疑问：如果越来越强的AI系统（如大模型）可以几乎不需要显式符号推理就能运作，那么符号方法在智能中究竟扮演什么角色？试图统一解释传统符号AI的成功与现代基础模型的有效性。

Method: 提出压缩原理（Compression Principle）：每个计算模型都是现实的简化表征，显式符号推理补偿了模型构建中遗漏的信息。由此导出建模-推理权衡（Modeling-Reasoning Trade-off）：模型保留信息越丰富，对符号推理的需求越低。

Result: 从该原理推导出：传统符号AI因模型极度简化而需要大量显式推理；现代基础模型因保留更丰富的分布表征而减少了对符号推理的依赖。同时得出一个悖论式结论：AI越强大、越不透明，符号方法对人类越重要。

Conclusion: 符号方法的未来不在于作为智能系统的计算引擎，而在于作为人类与越来越强大的AI系统之间的符号接口——用于指定需求、验证行为、监管系统以及建立信任。

Abstract: Why do intelligent systems need to perform explicit symbolic reasoning? Computer science has traditionally regarded symbolic reasoning as a defining component of intelligence. Yet the remarkable success of modern foundation models raises a fundamental question: if increasingly capable AI systems can operate with little explicit symbolic reasoning, what role do symbolic methods actually play?
  This article argues that explicit symbolic reasoning is not a fundamental property of intelligence, but a computational consequence of operating on simplified models of reality. We propose the Compression Principle: every computational model is a simplified representation of reality, and explicit symbolic reasoning compensates for information omitted during model construction. From this principle, we derive the Modeling--Reasoning Trade-off: as computational models preserve richer representations of the world, the need for explicit symbolic reasoning correspondingly decreases. This perspective provides a unified explanation for both the historical success of symbolic methods and the remarkable effectiveness of modern foundation models.
  Paradoxically, the same development makes symbolic methods increasingly important for humans. As intelligent systems become more capable and more opaque, symbolic representations increasingly serve as interfaces through which humans specify requirements, verify behavior, regulate autonomous systems, and establish trust. We therefore argue that the future of symbolic methods lies not primarily as the computational engine of intelligent systems, but as the symbolic interface between increasingly capable AI systems and the humans who build, govern, and depend upon them.

</details>


### [517] [AgentGym2: Benchmarking Large Language Model Agents in De-Idealized Real-World Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05174)
*Zhiheng Xi,Dingwen Yang,Jiaqi Liu,Jixuan Huang,Honglin Guo,Baodai Huang,Tinggang Chen,Qi Zhang,Zhonghang Lu,Chenyu Liu,Jiajun Sun,Jiazheng Zhang,Dingwei Zhu,Xin Guo,Junzhe Wang,Zhihao Zhang,Yuming Yang,Junjie Ye,Minghe Gao,Dongrui Liu,Jiaming Ji,Guohao Li,Tao Gui,Qi Zhang,Xuanjing Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AgentGym2是一个新的评估框架，用于衡量LLM智能体在真实世界端到端任务中的表现，发现即使是GPT-5和Gemini等顶尖模型也面临巨大挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试在简化、理想化环境下进行，忽略真实部署中的不确定性、噪声和工具发现需求，无法真实反映智能体的实际能力。

Method: 提出AgentGym2评估框架，基于真实世界端到端工作需求构建任务实例，测量智能体在端到端流程执行、工具探索发现、工具组合、以及面对噪声和不完整信息时的鲁棒性。

Result: 对15个商业和开源模型的实验表明，即使Gemini和GPT-5等最先进系统在AgentGym2上也表现不佳。

Conclusion: 当前智能体能力与真实世界应用需求之间存在巨大差距，现有评估方式严重低估了实际部署的难度。

Abstract: Language agents, i.e., LLM agents, progress rapidly and are increasingly deployed in production environments. This trend underscores the urgent need for rigorous and realistic evaluations. However, most existing benchmarks evaluate agents in simplified, idealized settings. They typically rely on pre-packaged tool interfaces, overlook critical steps, and assume inputs are clean and fully specified. Consequently, they understate the difficulty of real deployments, where uncertainty and noise are ubiquitous and agents must proactively explore the environment to uncover new tools. To bridge this gap, we present AgentGym2, a new evaluation framework with task instances grounded in real-world end-to-end working demands. Beyond reasoning and planning, it measures agents' ability to execute end-to-end procedures, discover tools via exploration, compose tools for unseen tasks, and remain robust to noisy and underspecified information. Experiments on 15 proprietary and open-source models show that even SOTA systems like Gemini and GPT-5 struggle on AgentGym2, revealing a substantial gap between the capability of current agents and the demands of real-world applications.

</details>


### [518] [CP-WSP: A Declarative CP-SAT Framework for Configurable Multi-Constraint Workforce Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05177)
*Vipul Patel,Anirudh Deodhar,Dagnachew Birru*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CP-WSP框架，通过CP-SAT求解器实现含14个硬约束和15个软目标的排班优化，支持跨午夜班次、带中点控制的强制休息调度、 acuity加权工作量公平性等多维度约束，无需修改代码即可通过JSON配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CP排班模型仅处理6-12个约束，缺乏对强制休息调度（含中点位置控制）、acuity加权工作量公平性、子班次时间粒度、周间稳定性、跨午夜班次等关键要素的显式支持。

Method: 基于CP-SAT的声明式框架；shift-window变量分解（支持强制休息调度与中点控制）；多粒度时间分辨率（30分钟-2小时）；grid-offset预处理（处理跨午夜班次）；统一加权惩罚函数；JSON可配置。

Result: 在INRC-II基准（小时级和班次级粒度）及36个合成配置上评估。

Conclusion: 该框架通过更丰富的约束/目标集和可配置性，填补了现有CP排班方法的关键空白，提供了可复现的基准套件。

Abstract: Workforce scheduling is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem requiring simultaneous satisfaction of labor regulations, coverage requirements, employee preferences and operational objectives. Existing CP formulations typically model simplified instances with 6-12 constraints at shift-level granularity and critically lack explicit support for: mandatory break scheduling with midpoint placement control; acuity weighted workload equity; sub-shift temporal granularity enabling demand-driven staffing; inter-week schedule stability; and cross-midnight shift patterns common in 24-hour operations. This paper presents CP-WSP: a declarative CP-SAT framework enforcing 14 hard constraints as mathematically inviolable requirements (zero regulatory violations by construction) while optimizing 15 soft objectives through a unified weighted penalty function -- all configurable via a JSON specification with no code changes required. Key contributions include: a shift-window variable decomposition enabling mandatory break scheduling with centrality control; acuity-weighted workload equity; multi-granularity temporal resolution from 30 minutes to 2 hours; inter-week schedule stability; a grid-offset preprocessing technique for cross-midnight shifts; and a reproducible 36-configuration benchmark suite for community comparison. Evaluated on INRC-II benchmarks at both hourly and shift-level granularity and on 36 synthetic configurations.

</details>


### [519] [Rethinking On-Policy Self-Distillation for Thinking Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05184)
*Simran Kaur,Narutatsu Ri,Yinghui He,Liam Fowl,Sanjeev Arora*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，在思考型语言模型（如Qwen3、OLMo）中，使用特权信息进行自蒸馏反而会损害模型的长推理能力，最高导致准确率下降17%。这一失败模式源于特权上下文重塑了高熵分叉位置的token级学习信号，抑制了自我修正、回溯和验证等关键行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自蒸馏是语言模型自我提升的 promising 方法，模型可以利用特权信息（如数学题解）作为自己的教师。对于具备测试时推理能力的思考型模型而言，这种范式似乎特别有吸引力。然而，作者发现特权自蒸馏反而会损害思考型模型的长推理能力，需要探究其失败原因和机制。

Method: 在五个Qwen3和OLMo思考型模型上，使用AIME24、AIME25和HMMT25基准进行评估，对比特权上下文蒸馏与普通蒸馏的效果。同时进行诊断分析，研究模型在分叉位置（forking positions）的token级行为，包括自我修正、回溯和 hedging 标记的变化。

Result: 特权自蒸馏导致avg@16准确率相对下降高达17%，且退化程度与特权上下文保留量成正比，在长推理预算下最为严重。特权ODP反而逆转了普通ODP带来的提升。特权上下文降低了思考型模型的分叉率（fork rate），但对指令型模型无此效果。特权ODP惩罚了自修正分支中的采样重考虑token，导致验证、回溯和 hedging 标记减少。

Conclusion: 特权自蒸馏对强思考型模型有害，因为它在token级别重塑了学习信号，抑制了模型自我修正和回溯推理的能力。这要求在进行自蒸馏时特别注意修正和推理步骤的token级信号设计。

Abstract: Self-distillation is a promising recipe for self-improvement in language models. In this setting, a model can serve as its own teacher when given privileged information, such as a solution to a math problem. This seems especially appealing for thinking models, which can use test-time reasoning to absorb the privileged information. Surprisingly, we show that privileged self-distillation degrades thinking models on long reasoning traces: across five Qwen3 and OLMo thinking models evaluated on AIME24, AIME25, and HMMT25, privileged-context distillation causes a relative drop of up to 17% in avg@16 accuracy. The degradation scales with the amount of privileged context withheld from the student and is most pronounced at long rollout budgets, where thinking models otherwise obtain their largest gains. This failure mode is not specific to self-distillation: on-policy distillation (OPD) improves thinking models, but privileged OPD reverses these gains. Our diagnostics link this failure mode to how privileged teacher context reshapes learning at high-entropy forking positions, where multiple continuations remain plausible and may lead to different reasoning paths. Privileged context lowers fork rates in thinking-model rollouts but not in instruction-model rollouts. This leads to an interesting dichotomy, where privileged context can help instruction-tuned models but hurts stronger thinking models. The effect is visible when the student begins a self-correction branch, where privileged OPD penalizes sampled reconsideration tokens that vanilla OPD supports. Thinking models trained with a privileged teacher produce fewer verification, backtracking, and hedging markers, even after length normalization. These findings indicate that self-distillation for strong thinking models requires attention to token-level signal, especially around correction and reasoning steps.

</details>


### [520] [ClassicLogic: A Knowledge-Driven Benchmark of Classic Puzzle Games for Evaluating Compositional Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05185)
*Mahnoor Shahid,Hannes Rothe*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ClassicLogic基准测试套件，通过四个经典逻辑谜题（数独、KenKen、数墙、不等式）及其层次化显式知识库结构，系统评估AI模型从基础规则学习到多步组合策略推理的组合泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有组合泛化基准多聚焦于语言任务，缺乏复杂且显式的组合结构，难以深入评估AI的组合推理能力。

Method: 基于四个经典逻辑谜题构建基准，为每个游戏设计层次化显式知识库，将复杂求解策略正式定义为简单基础策略的组合，并支持数学上可验证的难度递增。

Result: 构建了一个开源基准测试套件，能够精细评估智能体从基础规则学习到多步组合策略应用的全链路推理能力。

Conclusion: ClassicLogic为神经符号推理及其他先进AI系统的组合泛化能力提供了具有挑战性的新测试平台。

Abstract: Compositional generalization, the ability to understand and produce novel combinations of known components, remains a fundamental challenge for modern artificial intelligence. While few benchmarks exist, many focus on linguistic tasks and lack complex, explicit compositional structures. We introduce ClassicLogic, a new benchmark suite designed to evaluate an agent's ability to learn and compose problem-solving strategies. The benchmark consists of four classic logic puzzles: Sudoku, KenKen, Kakuro, and Futoshiki. Its core innovation is a hierarchical, explicit knowledge base for each game, where complex solving strategies are formally defined as compositions of simpler, foundational strategies. This structure allows for fine-grained evaluation of an agent's reasoning capabilities, from learning basic rules to applying multi-step compositional strategies to solve puzzles of increasing, mathematically validated difficulty. The open-source benchmark provides a challenging new testbed for advancing neuro-symbolic and other advanced AI reasoning systems.

</details>


### [521] [Reason, Reward, Refine: Step-Level Errors Corrections with Structured Feedback for Physics Reasoning in Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05199)
*Raj Jaiswal,Dhruv Jain,Rishabh Dhawan,Sree Krishna Uppalapati,Shin'ichi Satoh,Tanuja Ganu,Rajiv Ratn Shah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种步级奖励框架，通过识别首个推理错误并生成结构化反馈，结合策略梯度和KL正则化训练模型修正推理过程，无需人工标注偏好数据。在五个物理基准上，准确率提升17-20%，计算错误从56.9%降至23.5%，理解错误从22.3%降至12.0%，但概念性错误（从89.7%降至68.7%）仍是最难解决的失效模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小型语言模型在物理推理中存在结构性失败：任一推理步骤的错误会向前传播，污染后续所有推论。此外，领域知识有限、多步推导下的幻觉以及分布敏感性加剧了这种失败。现有方法依赖人工标注或偏好数据，成本高且可扩展性差。

Method: 提出步级奖励框架：1) 识别首个推理错误；2) 生成针对性结构化反馈；3) 通过带KL正则化的策略梯度训练模型自行修正方案。外部验证器仅在训练时使用，无需暴露真实解作为生成目标，也无需构造偏好数据。

Result: 在五个物理基准上，相比CoT提示提升17-20%，相比最强基线提升10-16%。计算错误从56.9%降至23.5%，理解错误从22.3%降至12.0%，概念错误从89.7%降至68.7%。

Conclusion: 步级奖励框架有效缓解了小型语言模型的物理推理错误，尤其能显著降低计算和理解类错误。但概念性错误仍是所有条件下最难克服的失败模式，提示需要在更高层次的物理概念建模和知识注入方面进一步探索。

Abstract: Physics reasoning fails structurally in small language models: an error at any step propagates forward, corrupting every inference that follows. Limited domain knowledge, hallucination under multi-step derivation, and distributional sensitivity compound this failure. We propose a step-level reward framework that identifies the first reasoning error, generates targeted structured feedback, and trains the model to revise its solution via policy gradient with KL regularization, without exposing it to ground truth solutions as generation targets. Unlike annotation-dependent step-level methods, no preference data construction is required and the external verifier operates exclusively at training time. Across five physics benchmarks, our framework delivers accuracy gains of 17-20% over CoT prompting and 10-16% over the strongest baseline, reduces calculation errors from 56.9% to 23.5%, and reduces miscomprehension errors from 22.3% to 12.0% in the best observed cases. Conceptual errors reduce from 89.7% to 68.7%, yet persist as the hardest failure mode across all conditions.

</details>


### [522] [EvoAgentBench: Benchmarking Agent Self-Evolution via Ability Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05202)
*Xingze Gao,Chuanrui Hu,Hongda Chen,Pengfei Yao,Zhao Wang,Yi Bai,Zhengwei Wu,Yunyun Han,Xiaofeng Cong,Jie Gui,Yafeng Deng,Teng Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: EvoAgentBench是一个评估LLM智能体在长期任务中自我进化能力的基准，它通过提取和复用程序性经验（Abilities）来测试智能体能否在跨领域任务中实现知识迁移，而非仅评测单次任务解决或记忆存储。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评测无法有效衡量智能体的程序性经验迁移能力：智能体基准测试仅关注单次任务解决，记忆基准测试仅关注信息存储。然而实际中，智能体自我进化依赖于可复用的程序性知识（如搜索、调试、验证流程），而非简单记忆。

Method: 从智能体执行轨迹中提取基于轨迹的能力（trace-grounded Abilities），将其规范化（canonicalize）为可操作单元，构建跨领域的能力图（Ability Graphs），连接具有程序性重叠的任务。采用528/267的训练/测试划分，结合两种脚手架（scaffolds）和三种骨干模型（backbones）进行评测。

Result: 精心整理的能力内容能在不同模型家族间可靠迁移，但当前所有自动方法均无法在所有设置下持续获得正向增益。

Conclusion: EvoAgentBench将自我进化评估从聚合准确率比较转变为对经验编码、路由和吸收的细粒度诊断，推动该领域评测范式的转变。

Abstract: Agent self-evolution in long-horizon LLM systems is largely procedural: useful experience is not merely stored information, but reusable procedures for searching, debugging, and verification. Yet current evaluations do not isolate this form of transfer. Agent benchmarks test single-episode task solving; memory benchmarks target information retention rather than procedural reuse. We introduce EvoAgentBench, a benchmark for agent self-evolution via Ability-guided transfer across four agentic domains: web research, algorithmic reasoning, software engineering, and knowledge work. EvoAgentBench extracts trace-grounded Abilities from agent executions, canonicalizes them into operational units, and builds domain-specific Ability Graphs linking tasks that share procedural overlap. By design, every test task is backed by verified training-side Ability support. Across a 528/267 train/test split, two scaffolds, and three backbones, curated Ability content transfers reliably across model families, but no current automatic method sustains positive gain in all settings. EvoAgentBench shifts self-evolution evaluation from aggregate accuracy comparison to fine-grained diagnosis of experience encoding, routing, and uptake. The benchmark is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/EverMind-AI/EvoAgentBench.

</details>


### [523] [MoP-JEPA: Hard-Assigned Predictor Mixtures for Stochastic JEPA World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05238)
*Zhi Song,Ximing Xing,Zhenchao Tang,hanbo Huang,Tianxu Lv,minghao Yang,Zhongzheng Niu,He Bing,Lusheng Wang,Jianhua Yao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文证明标准JEPA世界模型在随机环境中因回归预测器输出条件均值而导致结构失效，提出基于硬分配混合预测器（MoP-JEPA）的方法，通过多模态预测与验证协议实现规划性能大幅提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准JEPA世界模型使用单一定性预测器通过潜在回归进行训练，但该方法在随机环境（如分支转换）中结构性地失败——回归最优预测器输出后继嵌入的条件均值，即处于真实下一状态之间的"不存在状态"，导致规划无法进行。

Method: 提出MoP-JEPA方法：1）使用硬分配混合预测器（hard-assigned mixture of predictors），每个预测器负责一个后继模态，单次前向可枚举所有可能状态；2）设计验证协议（verification protocol），包括输入无关码本控制、打乱上下文测试、路由门控读出、转换精度守卫和验证路由准则，防止多头评估时"覆盖搭便车"。

Result: 在OGBench离线数据上：单预测器规划成功率仅0.02-0.09，而MoP-JEPA预测模态规划成功率高达0.85，超过所有基线（确定性、门控MoE、变分预测器）。验证准则下，方法在所有三个迷宫中优于最强软替代方案2-5倍。真实环境执行中，在最难迷宫上排名第二。

Conclusion: 多模态动力学决定了JEPA世界模型能否规划；混合预测器+硬分配是一个最小且可验证的解决方案，解决了回归预测器在随机环境中输出"不存在状态"的结构性失效问题。

Abstract: JEPA world models predict the next latent state with a single deterministic predictor trained by latent regression. We show that this fails structurally when the environment is stochastic: at a branching transition, the regression-optimal predictor outputs the conditional mean of the successor embeddings, a point between the true next states that corresponds to no state at all. We prove this collapse for deterministic and gated mixture-of-experts predictors, and prove that MoP-JEPA's hard-assigned predictors converge instead to a quantizer of the transition distribution: one head per successor mode, enumerable in a single forward pass, which is the interface a planner consumes. On official OGBench offline data with leak-free evaluation, planning over single-predictor rollouts performs poorly ($0.02$--$0.09$ success) while planning over our predicted modes reaches up to $0.85$, ahead of deterministic, gated-MoE, and variational predictors on every task. Because multi-prediction evaluation invites coverage freeloading, a verification protocol is part of the method: an input-agnostic codebook control, a shuffled-context test, router-gated readouts, transition-precision guards, and a verified-route criterion in which the model proposes its transition graph blind and ground truth is used only to check the result. Under this criterion our method outperforms the strongest soft alternative on all three mazes ($2$--$5\times$), and the protocol identifies the remaining gap in that baseline's raw scores as routes through predicted transitions that do not exist. The same model executes in the real environment, placing second of seven against the published OGBench baselines on the hardest maze. Multimodal dynamics decide whether a JEPA world model can plan at all; a mixture of predictors with hard assignment is a minimal and verifiable fix.

</details>


### [524] [MetaSkill-Evolve: Recursive Self-Improvement of LLM Agents via Two-Timescale Meta-Skill Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05297)
*Zefeng Wang,Minxi Yan,Jinhe Bi,Sikuan Yan,Volker Tresp,Yunpu Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MetaSkill-Evolve，一种双时间尺度框架，让智能体技能改进实现递归——不仅任务技能可进化，改进流程本身（元技能）也能自进化，在三个基准上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化智能体仅递归改进任务技能（做什么），但改进流程本身（如何改进）是手工设计且固定不变的，无法适应任务多样性。作者希望让改进流程也能自我进化，实现真正的递归改进。

Method: 提出MetaSkill-Evolve双时间尺度框架：快环路演进任务技能，慢环路演进元技能（包含分析器、检索器、分配器、提议器、进化器五个组件的参数），同一套改进流程应用于自身，无需额外模型或目标函数，所有组件共享一个冻结的骨干模型。

Result: 在OfficeQA、SealQA、ALFWorld三个基准上，MetaSkill-Evolve分别比原始骨干模型提升+23.54、+16.09、+1.92个百分点的测试准确率，优于无技能、静态技能和单层进化基线。

Conclusion: 递归式元技能进化是可行的，且能带来显著性能提升，为智能体自我改进提供了一个更通用的范式。

Abstract: Recent LLM agents tackle increasingly long-horizon, open-ended tasks, and external skills, reusable procedural knowledge supplied to the agent, further extend this capability. However, a fixed, hand-authored skill is rarely optimal, and cannot adapt to the diversity of tasks an agent encounters. Self-improving agents address this by rewriting their own skill files from execution traces, yielding meaningful gains on challenging benchmarks. Yet such self-evolution remains non-recursive: it improves only the task skill (what the agent does) while the improvement procedure (how it improves) is authored once and held fixed. We introduce MetaSkill-Evolve, a two-timescale framework that makes agentic skill improvement recursive: every branch carries both a task skill $s$ and a branch-local meta-skill $m=(ψ,σ,α,π,\varepsilon)$ whose five components parameterise the Analyzer, Retriever, Allocator, Proposer, and Evolver agents of the improvement pipeline. Task skills evolve on a fast loop while the meta-skill evolves on a slower one under the same pipeline applied to itself, with no additional model or objective. With all five pipeline agents sharing a single frozen backbone, MetaSkill-Evolve outperforms no-skill, static-skill, and single-level evolution baselines on three agentic benchmarks (OfficeQA, SealQA, ALFWorld), improving held-out test accuracy over the raw backbone by +23.54, +16.09, and +1.92 points respectively.

</details>


### [525] [Evaluating and Understanding Model Editing for Medical Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05310)
*Guli Zhu,Chenwei Wu,Liyue Shen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: M3Bench是一个为医疗视觉语言模型编辑设计的临床基准测试，包含16,276个问题，覆盖多种解剖、模态和专业领域，支持单次和序列编辑。通过对4种编辑器和6个模型的评估，发现没有方法在所有标准上表现优异，梯度方法迁移强但破坏局部性，记忆方法保持局部性但缺乏组合泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型编辑基准主要针对通用任务，无法反映临床领域的实际需求和变异性，需要一个专门评估医疗视觉语言模型编辑可靠性、精确性和泛化性的临床基准。

Method: 构建了M3Bench基准，包含16,276个问题，涵盖不同解剖结构、模态和专业领域；在图像和文本变化、模态和协议转换、临床知识组合、时间进展等挑战下评估编辑效果；对4种代表性编辑器（梯度型和记忆型）在6个医疗和通用视觉语言模型上进行评估。

Result: 没有方法在所有评估标准上表现出色；梯度型编辑迁移性能强但存在严重的局部性破坏问题；记忆型编辑保持局部性但缺乏组合泛化能力，且对骨干模型依赖的超参数敏感；失败原因可归因于视觉语言模型潜在空间几何结构及编辑方法对其的扰动。

Conclusion: M3Bench为多模态模型编辑提供了严格的临床压力测试，为更安全的后部署模型适应提供了可操作的指导。

Abstract: Model editing promises a fast, targeted way to correct post-deployment mistakes in medical vision-language models (VLMs) without costly retraining. However, existing multimodal model editing benchmarks focus on general-purpose tasks and do not reflect realistic clinical domain requirements and variability. To address this, we introduce M3Bench, a clinically grounded benchmark for multimodal model editing that evaluates whether an edit remains reliable, precise, and generalizable under the challenges of image and text variation, modality and protocol shifts, clinical knowledge composition, and temporal progression. M3Bench contains 16,276 questions spanning diverse anatomy, modalities, and specialties, and supports both single and sequential edits.
  By evaluating 4 representative editors across 6 medical and general VLMs, we find that no method excels across all criteria. Gradient-based editors achieve strong transfer but suffer from catastrophic locality violations, whereas memory-based methods preserve locality but lack compositional generality and exhibit high backbone-dependent hyperparameter sensitivity. We further attribute these failures to the latent space geometry of VLMs and how different editing methods shift its landscape. Overall, M3Bench establishes a rigorous clinical stress test for multimodal model editing and offers actionable guidance for safer post-deployment adaptation. The benchmark is publicly available at https://github.com/BioMed-AI-Lab-U-Michgan/M3Bench .

</details>


### [526] [OptiAgent: End-to-End Optimization Modeling via Multi-Agent Iterative Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05346)
*Adriana Laurindo Monteiro,Nayse Fagundes,Gabriel Mattos Langeloh,Gustavo de Oliveira Kanno,Priscila Louise Aguirre,Thiago Costa Rizuti da Rocha,Victor Leme Beltran*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出OptiAgent多智能体框架，通过自然语言描述运筹学问题，自动生成数学公式和可执行代码，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统运筹学问题求解需要人工建模，过程繁琐且易出错，缺乏自动化工具将自然语言问题描述直接转化为可求解的数学模型和代码。

Method: 采用多智能体架构，优先执行数学建模步骤（专用智能体提取决策变量和约束），引入新颖的多循环验证架构，包含四种专门针对不同失败模式的反馈机制（误解、结构缺陷、数学不一致、验证失败和代码错误）。

Result: 在4个基准中的3个（涵盖LP、MILP和非线性规划任务）达到SOTA性能，剩余1个数据集上也保持高度竞争力。

Conclusion: OptiAgent的模块化设计不仅提高了准确性，还通过每个智能体暴露其推理和反馈过程，提升了优化问题求解的可审计性和透明度。

Abstract: We propose OptiAgent, a multi-agent framework that, given a natural language description of an Operations Research problem, is able to output a solver-ready mathematical formulation as well as executable code. Our architecture prioritizes the mathematical modeling step, where dedicated agents extract structures, such as decision variables and constraints, enabling iterative self-correction. We introduce a novel multi-loop validation architecture with four specialized feedback mechanisms, each targeting a distinct failure mode such as misinterpretation, structural defects, mathematical inconsistencies, validation failures, and code errors. Alongside accuracy, our modular design improves the process of solving optimization problems by improving transparency, as each agent exposes its reasoning and feedback, making the full modeling process auditable. Our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3 out of 4 benchmarks across LP, MILP, and Nonlinear Programming tasks, while remaining highly competitive on the remaining dataset.

</details>


### [527] [Graph Sparse Sampling: Breaking the Curse of the Horizon in Continuous MDP Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05359)
*Idan Lev-Yehudi,Vadim Indelman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出图稀疏采样（GSS），一种无分支的在线规划算法，通过共享采样未来路径来避免树形搜索中随深度指数增长的采样预算，并在连续控制任务中显著优于传统树形规划器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续域中的不确定性规划计算量大，树形搜索方法（如MCTS）在连续状态/动作空间中面临分支结构导致的指数级采样预算增长问题，亟需更高效的规划方法。

Method: 提出图稀疏采样（GSS），一种分支无关的图结构在线规划算法。通过在不同候选决策间共享采样的未来轨迹，避免为每个动作单独采样后继节点，从而形成可GPU并行化的大批量计算图，并利用启发式方法聚焦计算资源。

Result: 证明了GSS在满秩或低秩生成模拟器及离散/连续动作空间下的有限样本性能保证。在合适条件下，这些界对规划时域呈多项式依赖，正式证明了共享未来路径可避免树形稀疏采样的指数时域依赖。连续控制仿真中，GSS在长时域上显著优于树形规划器，或达到接近最优性能。

Conclusion: 无分支图规划可作为在线控制中树形搜索的互补设计原则，在长时域连续控制任务中具有显著优势。

Abstract: Planning under uncertainty in continuous domains is essential for autonomous systems, yet computationally demanding. Tree-based search methods such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) remain popular, but their branching structure can require sampling budgets that grow exponentially with lookahead depth in the worst case. From a tree perspective, continuous state or action spaces become especially challenging, since the planner must decide where to search in an infinite branching hierarchy. We propose Graph Sparse Sampling (GSS), an online planning algorithm that shares sampled futures across many candidate decisions, rather than sampling separate successors for each candidate action. This branch-free graph exposes large GPU-friendly batches, while using heuristics to focus computation. We prove finite-sample performance guarantees for GSS covering full-rank or low-rank generative simulators via smoothed backups, and discrete or sampled continuous action spaces. Under suitable overlap, regularity, and action-coverage conditions, these bounds have polynomial dependence on the planning horizon, formalizing when shared futures can avoid the exponential horizon dependence of tree-shaped sparse sampling. We demonstrate continuous-control simulations where GSS substantially outperforms tree-based planners on long horizons or achieves near-optimal performance, supporting no-branching graph planning as a complementary design principle for online control.

</details>


### [528] [SovereignPA-Bench: Evaluating User-Owned Personal Agents under Evolving Intent, Platform Mediation, and Consent Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05363)
*Dylan Zongmin Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了SovereignPA-Bench基准，用于评估个人代理在用户主权方面的表现，包括隐私、同意、证据、负担和操纵抵抗等维度，实验表明完整主权框架优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准评估工具使用、网页导航、个性化等能力，但很少关注代理是否维护用户主权（即保护用户当前利益的同时尊重隐私、同意、证据、用户负担并抵抗操纵性激励）。

Method: 设计SovereignPA-Bench基准，区分代理可见的ObservableState和仅评估者可见的HiddenLabels；构建120个主权压力场景，在4个模型家族和8个策略基线上评估，产生3,840条冻结提示轨迹；引入完整主权脚手架（full-sovereign scaffolding）方法。

Result: 完整主权脚手架在主权得分上优于直接、仅记忆、仅同意、仅证据、ReAct/工具使用、安全提示和裁判守卫基线，同时减少了隐私泄露、同意违规、过度让步和操纵捕获。人类审计显示隐私和同意方面一致性高，操纵方面一致性较低。

Conclusion: 个人代理评估必须超越任务完成，转向具有代表性的、知情同意的、有证据依据的行动。

Abstract: Personal agents are becoming persistent user-owned intermediaries: they remember preferences, filter platform-mediated information, use tools, and negotiate with services. Existing benchmarks evaluate tool use, web navigation, desktop control, personalization, recommendation, and evolving context, but rarely ask whether an agent preserves user sovereignty: advancing the user's current interests while respecting privacy, consent, evidence, user burden, and resistance to manipulative incentives. We introduce SovereignPA-Bench, an executable benchmark for evaluating user-owned personal agents under evolving intent, platform mediation, privacy boundaries, consent constraints, evidence requirements, and burden tradeoffs. The benchmark separates agent-visible ObservableState from evaluator-only HiddenLabels, reports component metrics for task success, alignment, privacy, consent, evidence, manipulation, burden, and auditability, and preserves paired scenario ordering for model and policy comparisons. We evaluate 120 sovereignty stress scenarios across 4 model families and 8 policy baselines, yielding 3,840 frozen-prompt trajectories with raw prompts, outputs, provider-form responses, parsed actions, recomputable metrics, hard-set analyses, qualitative cases, and a blinded 3-annotator audit over 240 items. Full-sovereign scaffolding improves sovereignty score over direct, memory-only, consent-only, evidence-only, ReAct/tool-use, safety-prompt, and judge-guard baselines while reducing privacy leakage, consent violation, over-concession, and manipulation capture. Human audit shows high agreement on privacy and consent and lower agreement on manipulation, identifying the subjective frontier of platform-persuasion judgments. These results show that personal-agent evaluation must move beyond task completion toward representative, consent-aware, evidence-grounded action.

</details>


### [529] [LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05391)
*Jacky Kwok,Shulu Li,Pranav Atreya,Yuejiang Liu,Yixing Jiang,Chelsea Finn,Marco Pavone,Ion Stoica,Azalia Mirhoseini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Verifier框架，通过基于对数几率分布的连续评分机制，将验证（Verification）作为大语言模型的一个新扩展轴。该方法在多个维度的扩展（评分粒度、重复评估、标准分解）上有效提升了验证准确率，并在Terminal-Bench V2、SWE-Bench Verified等基准上取得SOTA结果。此外，该框架还可为强化学习提供密集反馈信号，提升样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM扩展范式主要关注预训练、后训练和测试时计算，但验证能力（判断解决方案正确性）尚未被充分探索。标准LM法官通过提示词让LLM产生离散评分，缺乏细粒度且可扩展的验证机制。作者希望将验证作为新的扩展轴，并设计一种无需额外训练、可提供连续细粒度反馈的通用验证框架。

Method: LLM-as-a-Verifier框架的核心是：计算评分token对数几率分布上的期望值，生成连续评分而非离散分数。该概率公式支持三个维度的扩展：(1)评分粒度扩展——更细粒度区分正负样本；(2)重复评估扩展——通过方差降低提升准确性；(3)标准分解扩展——通过复杂度降低提升准确性。同时提出基于连续评分的成本高效排序算法，用于从候选方案中选出最优解。

Result: 在Terminal-Bench V2（86.5%）、SWE-Bench Verified（78.2%）、RoboRewardBench（87.4%）和MedAgentBench（73.3%）上均达到SOTA。此外，该框架的细粒度信号可作为任务进度估计的代理，并为RL算法（SAC、GRPO）提供密集反馈，提升机器人学和数学推理任务的样本效率。

Conclusion: 验证可以被视为LLM扩展的新轴，LLM-as-a-Verifier通过概率连续评分机制在无需额外训练的情况下实现了有效的验证扩展。该方法不仅在下游基准上表现优异，还能为代理系统监控和强化学习提供有益信号，具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. To unlock this and demonstrate its effectiveness, we introduce LLM-as-a-Verifier, a general-purpose verification framework that provides fine-grained feedback for agentic tasks without requiring additional training. Unlike standard LM judges that prompt LLMs to produce discrete scores for candidate solutions, LLM-as-a-Verifier computes the expectation over the distribution of scoring token logits to generate continuous scores. This probabilistic formulation enables verification to scale along multiple dimensions: (1) score granularity, (2) repeated evaluation, and (3) criteria decomposition. In particular, we show that scaling the scoring granularity leads to better separation between positive and negative solutions, resulting in more calibrated comparisons. Moreover, scaling repeated evaluation and criteria decomposition consistently lead to additional gains in verification accuracy through variance and complexity reduction. We further introduce a cost-efficient ranking algorithm for selecting the best solution among candidates using the verifier's continuous scores. LLM-as-a-Verifier achieves state-of-the-art performance on Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2%), RoboRewardBench (87.4%), and MedAgentBench (73.3%). Beyond verification, the fine-grained signals from LLM-as-a-Verifier can also serve as a proxy for estimating task progress. We build an extension for Claude Code, enabling developers to monitor and improve their own agentic systems. Finally, we show that LLM-as-a-Verifier can provide dense feedback for RL, improving the sample efficiency of SAC and GRPO on robotics and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [530] [Benchmarking the Benchmarks: A Validity Audit of Tool-Calling Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02577)
*Vishvesh Bhat,Jay Vaghasiya,Muhammad Ahmed Mohsin,Asad Aali*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对四大工具调用基准（BFCL v4, τ2-Bench, LiveMCPBench, MCP-Atlas）进行了系统性的有效性和可复现性审计。在496个专家审核任务中发现18.5%的评估者与人类判断不一致，且存在多种评估失败模式。作者提出了评估失败分类体系，并推出了Tool-Veritas基准和Harness Lab开源系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具调用基准的分数常被视为"金标准"，但评估器本身从未被验证过。作者希望系统审计这些基准评估器的可靠性和有效性问题。

Method: 对496个基准任务进行专家审核，比较评估器结果与人类判断，并分析失败模式。同时对LiveMCPBench进行23次重复评估测量方差。

Result: 发现18.5%的评估者-人类不一致率；确定性基准存在状态匹配脆弱、轨迹锁定、错误真值等问题；LLM评分基准存在标准漂移、幻觉完成、方差巨大等问题；LiveMCPBench 23次重复实验得分跨度达18.9个百分点。

Conclusion: 当前工具调用分数可能反映的是评估工件而非智能体能力。需要可复现、可审计、与人类判断一致的基准评估器，并倡导分解式评估指标。

Abstract: Tool-calling benchmarks are increasingly used to rank language-model agents, yet their scores are often treated as ground truth without validating the evaluators themselves. We present a systematic validity and reproducibility audit of four major tool-calling benchmark families: BFCL v4, τ2-Bench, LiveMCPBench, and MCP-Atlas. Across 496 expert-reviewed benchmark tasks, we find 92 evaluator-human disagreements, corresponding to an 18.5% misalignment rate. The failures are not isolated annotation mistakes: deterministic benchmarks exhibit brittle state matching, trajectory lock-in, incorrect ground truths, substring-based communication failures, and reward-basis misalignment, while LLM-judge benchmarks exhibit rubric drift, hallucinated completion, answer-only scoring, and substantial run-to-run variance. In LiveMCPBench, 23 repeated evaluations of the same setup produce scores ranging from 57.9% to 76.8%, a spread of 18.9 percentage points, large enough to change leaderboard conclusions. These results show that current tool-calling scores can reflect evaluator artifacts rather than agent capability. We introduce a unified taxonomy of tool-calling evaluation failures, release trace-level audit artifacts and corrected evaluation components, and argue for decomposed metrics that separately measure tool invocation, task completion, and outcome verification. Our findings suggest that progress in tool-using agents requires benchmarks whose evaluators are themselves reproducible, auditable, and aligned with human judgments of task success. We further introduce Tool-Veritas, a configurable benchmark that combines deterministic state verification with optional qualitative judging, and Harness Lab, an open-source system for benchmark execution, trace inspection, repeated-run comparison, and evaluator debugging.

</details>


### [531] [When Not to Write Memory: Governing False Promotion from Correlated Agent Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02579)
*Yijiashun Qi,Xiang Xu,Yuxuan Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出GovMem，一种保守的记忆写入路径治理策略，通过估计依赖感知的证据支持、检索反例、分配作用域，对智能体是否应写入记忆输出"推广"、"拒绝"或"需审查"三种决策。实验表明GovMem能显著降低错误推广率，但整体偏保守，审查负担较高，主要定位为诊断性治理设计，而非高效的自动记忆写入器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期运行的智能体在从执行轨迹中写入可复用记忆时，存在一个关键安全问题：重复观测并非独立证据——相同主张可能来自共享源、诱导自共享提示、在新环境中已过时或仅在狭窄范围内有效。现有方法缺乏对记忆写入路径的依赖感知治理机制。

Method: GovMem是一种保守的参考策略：(1) 估计依赖感知的证据支持度；(2) 检索反例证据；(3) 分配作用域；(4) 输出三种决策之一：推广(promote)、拒绝(reject)或需审查(needs-review)。

Result: 合成压力测试中，错误推广率从0.597降至0.040，召回率保持0.960。内部真实轨迹子集中，依赖感知推广将错误率从0.371降至0.032，但留出集错误率为0.111，审查负担0.692，直接召回率0.448。外部高影响候选全部被拒绝，11个验证门控正例全部被判定为不可复用。

Conclusion: GovMem主要定位为诊断性治理设计参考点，而非通用验证或高效的自动记忆写入器。智能体记忆写入路径应作为风险控制的证据治理系统进行评估，更广泛的外部覆盖和下游危害证据仍是必要的。

Abstract: Long-lived language agents increasingly write reusable memories from their own execution traces. The key safety question is not only what agents should remember, but when they should refuse to write memory at all. Repeated observations across agents are not necessarily independent evidence: the same claim may be copied from a shared source, induced by a shared prompt, stale under a new environment, or valid only in a narrower scope. We study this failure mode as a memory writepath governance problem. We introduce GovMem as a conservative diagnostic reference policy that estimates dependency-aware support, retrieves counterevidence, assigns scope, and outputs one of three decisions: promote, reject, or needs-review. In controlled synthetic stress tests, GovMem reduces false promotion from 0.597 to 0.040 in the default setting while preserving 0.960 recall, at an explicit review burden. In a project-internal 120candidate human-labeled real-trace subset spanning 79 recorded traces and project reports, dependency-aware promotion reduces false promotion from 0.371 for source+scope to 0.032 overall, but held-out false promotion remains 0.111 and the method is highly conservative, with 0.692 review burden and 0.448 direct recall. A final human adjudication of 133 high-impact external codingagent candidates is more severe: none are safe for automatic promotion, and all 11 verification-gate positives are rejected as boilerplate, shared-tool artifacts, file dumps, or non-reusable debugging traces. These results support GovMem primarily as a diagnostic governance design point, not as a generally validated or efficient automatic memory writer: agent memory write paths should be evaluated as risk-controlled evidence-governance systems, while broader external coverage and downstream harm evidence are still needed before stronger claims.

</details>


### [532] [Better Together, in the Right Order: Classical-then-LLM Optimization for SE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02583)
*Srinath Srinivasan,Tim Menzies*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SNAP2方法将廉价经典学习器的结果作为种子输入给LLM，在100多个SE配置任务中表现最佳（85%任务达到顶级），比纯LLM（75%）和经典优化器主导的方法更优，同时减少30% token消耗并提升1.4倍速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作大多让经典优化器主导搜索循环，LLM仅作为辅助子程序。作者发现反过来——先用廉价经典学习器得到结果，再用LLM进行种子初始化——能带来更大价值。

Method: SNAP2方法：首先使用廉价的经典学习器（如简单的搜索或优化算法）在配置任务上运行，得到初步结果；然后将这些结果作为种子（seed）输入给LLM，让LLM基于这些种子进行最终优化。

Result: 在100多个SE配置任务上，SNAP2在85%的任务中达到顶级表现，优于纯LLM（75%）和所有经典优化器主导的方法。相比纯LLM，减少约30% token使用量，速度提升1.4倍。

Conclusion: 不应孤立研究经典学习器或LLM，两者结合（且结合顺序很重要）能带来显著价值。先经典后LLM的顺序优于经典优化器主导LLM的方式。

Abstract: A growing body of work combines large language models (LLMs) with classical optimizers for software engineering (SE) configuration tasks. Often, the classical optimizer is in charge: it owns the search loop and calls the LLM only to assist in subroutines (e.g. to warm-start the first generation, propose a mutation, or stand in as a surrogate). We report that there is much value in the reverse approach: seeding an LLM with the results from a cheap classical learner.
  We call this method SNAP2. Applied to over 100 SE tasks, it is the single best of all methods studied, reaching the top tier on 85% of tasks, ahead of the same LLM run alone (75%) and ahead of every method in which the classical optimizer retains control. It is also less expensive: relative to the LLM-alone method, it uses roughly 30% fewer tokens and runs 1.4x faster, since the classical setup performs the inexpensive work, and the LLM is invoked only to finish.
  We conclude that it is unwise to study classical learners or LLMs in isolation: there is much value in combining the two, and in the order that combination is applied.

</details>


### [533] [The Moving Target: A Longitudinal Audit of Trustworthiness Drift Across Twelve Checkpoints of Open-Source Chat LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02587)
*Zhichao Fan,Yanhang Li,Zexin Zhuang,Xian Sun,Yingshuo Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文审核了四个开源模型发布系列（Yi、Qwen、Mistral、Gemma）的多个检查点，发现信任基准分数随检查点更迭存在显著漂移，因此建议信任分数应作为绑定特定检查点并标注日期的产物，而非沿发布系列沿用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前模型卡片引用的信任基准分数未记录测量时间，同一分数常被不同检查点沿用，忽略了模型权重可能发生的变化，这可能导致对模型可信度的错误评估。

Method: 对四个开源模型系列（Yi、Qwen、Mistral、Gemma）各三个连续代际进行检查，在固定信任基准测试集上使用多种提示模板进行测量，并以独立无漂移假设为零假设进行比较。

Result: 平均相邻代际漂移显著高于基于独立性的无漂移参考零假设，且在剔除单个基准测试、剔除单个模型系列或改用严格评分后，该差距依然存在。

Conclusion: 信任分数不应在检查点之间直接沿用，而应作为绑定特定检查点并标注日期的产物进行报告，建议采用纵向模型卡片的形式。闭源API、更大模型及固定月度规则等超出审核范围，需单独评估。

Abstract: Model cards quote trust-benchmark scores without recording when they were measured, and the same number is routinely carried across successive checkpoints of one release line as if the model behind it had not shifted. We test whether it has shifted by auditing four open-source release lines, Yi, Qwen, Mistral, and Gemma, at three successive generations each, on a fixed basket of trust benchmarks under multiple prompt templates. Mean absolute adjacent-generation drift lands well above an independence-based no-drift reference null, and the gap persists when we drop a benchmark, drop a release line, or switch to strict scoring. We therefore conclude that a trust score attached to a release line should not be carried forward to the next checkpoint without remeasurement; it should instead be reported as a checkpoint-bound, dated artefact, which we package as a longitudinal model card. Closed APIs, larger models, canonical benchmark protocols, and fixed month-cadence rules lie outside the audited scope and require their own evaluation.

</details>


### [534] [OmniPresent: Generating Coherent Presentation Suites from Scientific Papers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02590)
*Qianli Ma,Jipeng Xiao,Siyu Wang,Zhiheng Tian,Wangyu Feng,Shibo Wang,Chang Guo,Shuochen Chang,Qingyang Liu,Zhipeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出OmniPresent框架，将静态研究论文自动转化为海报、幻灯片、视频等动态展示套件，通过统一HTML表示和自纠正机制保证跨模态语义一致性，并发布OmniPreBench基准数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动化方法孤立地处理不同展示格式（海报、幻灯片、视频），导致跨模态语义不一致，且人工转化耗时耗力。

Method: 1) 采用可渲染的HTML表示实现集中式内容规划；2) 设计自纠正的"验证-修复"循环，主动解决跨模态冲突；3) 基于VLM的严格评估协议。

Result: 在OmniPreBench数据集上，OmniPresent在生成质量和保真度上显著超越强基线，在准确性和视觉吸引力方面均表现优异。

Conclusion: 统一化的展示套件生成是可行且有效的，集中式内容规划+自纠正机制能保证跨模态一致性，为科研成果传播提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Transforming static research papers into dynamic media such as posters, slides, and videos is essential for effective dissemination but remains a labor-intensive challenge. Existing automated approaches often treat these formats in isolation and consequently fail to maintain semantic consistency across the entire presentation suite. We address this fragmentation by formalizing the task of unified presentation suite generation and proposing $\textbf{OmniPresent}$ to orchestrate the creation of coherent deliverables. Our framework adopts a renderable HTML representation to enable centralized content planning and a self-correcting verify-and-repair loop that actively resolves conflicts across modalities. We further facilitate scalable research in this domain by releasing $\textbf{OmniPreBench}$, a comprehensive dataset comprising over one thousand papers with paired artifacts, and establishing a rigorous VLM-based evaluation protocol. Empirical results confirm that our method generates high-quality and faithful presentation suites that significantly surpass strong baselines in both accuracy and visual appeal.

</details>


### [535] [Attributing Structured-Output Gains in Function Calling: Interface Alignment versus Procedural Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02595)
*Wanyi Chen,Daoyuan Chen,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种四层增益归因协议，用于区分提示注入的函数调用能力提升是源于任务决策还是格式合规。实验表明，许多表面上的技能提升实际上来自接口对齐，而非可迁移的程序性能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化输出基准的得分同时反映任务决策和接口合规性，因此需要将提示注入的函数调用增益进行归因，才能判断其是否为可迁移的技能。

Method: 提出四层增益归因协议：规范化重新评分、纯格式控制、修复/平衡归纳、可移植性检查。在BFCL、API-Bank、MATH-500、MultiHop-RAG等基准上进行验证。

Result: 纯格式提示在关键BFCL任务中与完整技能提示表现相当；修复/平衡归纳消除了最大的子前沿增益；API-Bank上长度匹配的通用过程提示与原生技能增益差距在0.5个百分点以内。

Conclusion: 格式合规是一种有用的工程能力，但结构化输出基准的得分不应直接解释为可迁移的程序性技能。推荐使用规范化指标、平衡归纳和纯格式基线进行函数调用技能增益归因。

Abstract: Structured-output benchmarks reward both task decisions and interface compliance, so prompt-induced function-calling gains require attribution before they can be interpreted as transferable skill. We introduce a four-layer gain-attribution protocol for prompt-prepended skill injection, combining canonicalized rescoring, format-only controls, repaired/balanced induction, and portability checks. Applied to the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard (BFCL) and scoped with API-Bank, MATH-500, and MultiHop-RAG, the protocol shows that several apparent gains are better attributed to interface alignment than to procedural transfer: format-only prompts match or exceed full skills in key BFCL cells, repaired/balanced induction removes the largest sub-frontier gains, and API-Bank target-native gains are matched within 0.5 percentage points (pp) by length-matched generic procedural prompts. These findings treat format compliance as a useful engineering capability while clarifying what a structured-output score certifies. We release BFCL-CANONICAL and recommend canonicalized metrics, balanced induction, and format-only baselines for function-calling skill-gain attribution. Code and data are available at https://github.com/couragec/skill-injection-attribution.

</details>


### [536] [AgentLTL: A Trace-Verification Framework for Measuring, Enforcing, and Training Procedural Compliance in Tool-Using LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02599)
*Laïla Elkoussy,Julien Perez*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentLTL，一种基于一阶线性时序逻辑的语言，用于表达智能体轨迹上的程序性规则，提供确定性、无评判的合规分数。该框架支持两种用途：约束（在线门控工具调用）和微调（密集奖励）。实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型在排序、分支、迭代和接地等任务上的合规性与准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具使用LLM智能体的评估通常只关注最终答案的正确性或依赖LLM评判，这两种方式都无法捕捉答案生成的过程。在安全关键场景中，过程本身也是正确性的一部分，因此需要一种能够评估过程合规性的方法。

Method: 提出AgentLTL，一种基于一阶线性时序逻辑的语言，用于定义智能体轨迹上的程序性规则。该框架提供确定性的合规分数，无需LLM评判。支持两种用法：1) 约束：对完整轨迹评分，或在线门控工具调用；2) 微调：将合规分数作为密集奖励信号。

Result: 在排序、分支、迭代和接地基准上，block-and-warn约束方法在5/7个模型上提升了合规性。使用相同奖励进行微调，在保留模式（包括未见过的工具名称别名）上准确率和合规性分别提升38和17.5个百分点。

Conclusion: 模型习得了程序性结构而非记忆表面工具名称和过程，验证了AgentLTL作为可解释、确定性过程合规评估框架的有效性。

Abstract: Tool-using LLM agents are usually evaluated by final-answer correctness or LLM judges. Neither captures how an answer was produced. In safety-critical settings, the procedure itself is part of correctness. In this paper, we introduce AgentLTL, a language derived from First-Order Linear Temporal Logic (FO-LTL) that expresses procedural rules over agent traces. It yields a deterministic, judge-free compliance score. In this framework, a single specification drives two usages. The first is harnessing: the constraints score completed traces, or gate tool calls by checking each prefix online, before execution. The second is finetuning: the score serves as a dense reward.
