Motivation: HF上大量数据集用于训练AI模型，但可能违反数据隐私法规（如GDPR、CCPA），且数据来源和处理过程不透明，存在供应链监管风险。

Method: 收集了11,682个HF数据集（有数据集卡、非门控、下载量≥500），通过自动技术分析和人工样本分析，从数据集卡片和结构概览入手，检查隐私法规合规性。

Result: 极少数据集明确说明创建过程和数据来源；部分数据集在数据模式中提及PII或其他敏感数据，但整体合规透明度低。

Conclusion: AI数据集和模型的监管合规需要更详细的审查，亟需开发自动化工具来指导从业者并简化合规流程。

Abstract: A very large number of datasets are made available via Hugging Face (HF). These datasets are used to train a vast number of AI models, also available via HF. There are regulatory issues that might arise in the AI supply chain when those datasets do not follow, for instance, data privacy practices, or do not disclose their data sources, cleaning and preparation processes. In this preliminary work, regulatory compliance-readiness is examined as a quality attribute in the framework of HF datasets, with a main focus on data privacy (e.g. GDPR, CCPA). Towards this direction, an analysis on regulatory compliance (e.g. with privacy laws) of the dataset using the dataset card and the dataset structure overview as starting points has been performed. We collected 11,682 HF datasets that have a dataset card, are not gated and have at least 500 downloads and analyzed the datasets using automated techniques and manual analysis on a sample of the dataset. The results show that a very small number of datasets are explicit on the datasets creation processes and mention data sources, while some make mentions to Personally Identifiable Information (PII) or other sensitive data in their data schemas. These results show the need for more detailed examinations of regulatory compliance in AI datasets and models, and research on tools that provide guidance to practitioners and automate the compliance process.

</details>


### [573] [Is Agentic Code Review Helpful? Mining Developers' Feedback to CodeRabbit Reviews in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03316)
*Hong Yi Lin,Mingzhao Liang,Kla Tantithamthavorn,Patanamon Thongtanunam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对CodeRabbit的自动化代码审查进行实证研究，分析31,073条审查记录后发现：36.4%被接受，7.3%引发讨论，56.3%被拒绝。拒绝原因主要是无效建议（误报、冗余、范围外）及与开发者意图不符。审查更关注功能性而非可演化性，但功能性建议更易无效。基于LLM的预测方法可达76% F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化代码审查日益普及，但缺乏开发者实际反馈的实证证据，需要系统性地了解开发者对AI审查评论的真实态度和接受情况。

Method: 以CodeRabbit为案例，收集239个GitHub仓库中10,191个PR的31,073条审查-反馈对，进行定量统计分析和定性归类，并探索多种LLM方法预测审查拒绝。

Result: 1) 接受率仅36.4%，拒绝率达56.3%；2) 拒绝主因是无效建议（误报、冗余、范围外）和与开发者意图不符；3) 功能性评论多于可演化性评论，但前者更易无效；4) 轻量学习方法可达到76% F1预测拒绝。

Conclusion: CodeRabbit的自动化审查仍有较大改进空间，无效建议和意图对齐是主要短板，通过学习模式可有效预测拒绝，为后续优化提供方向。

Abstract: Agentic code review, where autonomous agents provide code review comments on pull requests, is increasingly integrated into development workflows, yet there is limited empirical evidence on how developers respond to such comments in practice. In this paper, we present an empirical study of agentic code reviews using CodeRabbit as a case study. Through an empirical study of 31,073 pairs of code reviews and developer feedback from 10,191 pull requests across 239 GitHub repositories, our results show that agentic reviews receive mixed reception: 36.4% were accepted and 7.3% triggered discussion, while 56.3% were rejected. Rejections were primarily associated with invalid suggestions that were false positives, redundant, or out of scope, as well as misalignment with developer intent and coding practices. We further found that agentic reviews tend to focus more on functional concerns than evolvability-related comments, yet they were more likely to be invalid. To improve effectiveness in review practices, we explored various LLM-based approaches for predicting review rejection. We found that lightweight learning-based methods achieve up to 76% F1 score, suggesting learnable patterns exist between code reviews and their corresponding feedback. Our results highlight the current state of CodeRabbit's agentic code reviews, showing opportunity gaps for improvement, as well as shortcomings hindering its effectiveness.

</details>


### [574] [AtomicCommitBench: Can Coding Agents Reconstruct Commit Histories from Squashed Patches?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03332)
*Zhihao Lin,Mingyi Zhou,Li Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了代码智能体的提交历史重构问题：当代码智能体将一个完整的开发会话压缩成一个补丁时，如何自动将其拆分为符合逻辑、可回放、可审查的多个提交序列。作者构建了AtomicCommitBench基准（含800个真实提交序列），并提出DACE方法来提升分组质量。实验发现，即使是GPT-5.4等先进模型，在分组质量上仍有很大提升空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码智能体在完成编程任务后，往往将所有改动（功能开发、Bug修复、重构、测试等）压缩成一个补丁，丢失了提交历史的结构信息。这使得代码审查、选择性回滚和后期维护变得困难。因此，需要研究如何回溯性地从单个补丁中重构出合理的、可回放的提交历史。

Method: 1) 形式化定义了hunk-to-commit partitioning任务，将问题建模为代码块到提交的分区问题，并要求提交序列可回放（replayable）。2) 构建AtomicCommitBench基准，包含800个来自10个Python项目的真实连续提交序列。3) 提出DACE（Dependency-Aware Commit Evidence）方法，利用依赖线索和hunk角色信息来辅助分组。4) 使用PPAR（回放有效性）、ARI（分组质量）和TCR（故障隔离能力）三个互补指标进行评估。

Result: 1) 几乎所有非随机方法都能达到较高的回放有效性（PPAR >= 0.988）。2) 但分组质量差异很大，ARI范围在0.03-0.46之间。3) 合成补丁的任务比真实补丁简单得多（ARI高出0.333）。4) GPT-5.4 + Codex CLI（0.46 ARI）和GLM-5 + Claude Code（0.43 ARI）表现最佳。5) 主要失败模式包括：同一文件内的hunk被错误合并、支持性hunk漂移。6) DACE方法能将较低性能设置的ARI提升0.05-0.08。

Conclusion: 回顾性提交历史重构是一个具有挑战性的任务，远非简单的回放检查或合成纠缠问题可比。相关工作仍有较大改进空间，DACE方法证明了利用依赖信息和hunk角色信息可以帮助模型避免基于位置的分组错误。AtomicCommitBench为评估代码智能体生成的提交历史提供了标准化基准。

Abstract: Coding agents often finish a session by returning one squashed patch that mixes feature implementation, bug fixes, refactorings, tests, and configuration edits. While the final code may be correct, collapsing unrelated edits into one patch removes the history structure needed for review, selective revert, and later maintenance. We study retrospective commit-history reconstruction: given a completed squashed change, an agent groups its hunks into commits and materializes a replayable commit sequence. We formalize the task as hunk-to-commit partitioning with a replay requirement and build AtomicCommitBench, containing 800 real consecutive-commit episodes from 10 Python projects. Because multiple decompositions may be reasonable, we evaluate outputs using complementary metrics: PPAR for replay validity, ARI for reference-based grouping quality, and TCR for failure containment on scoreable modified-test episodes. Natural retrospective reconstruction proves substantially harder than replay checking or synthetic tangling. Although nearly all non-random methods achieve replay validity (PPAR >= 0.988), grouping quality ranges from 0.03 to 0.46 ARI. Matched synthetic composites are much easier than real same-author squashed diffs (+0.333 ARI). In our evaluation, the GPT-5.4 setup driven by Codex CLI (0.46 ARI) and the GLM-5 setup driven by Claude Code (0.43 ARI) outperform MiniMax (0.31) and Kimi (0.29). Qualitative analysis identifies same-file lumping and support-hunk drift as recurring failure modes. Dependency-Aware Commit Evidence (DACE) improves the lower-scoring setups by 0.05 to 0.08 ARI, indicating that dependency cues and hunk-role information help agents avoid locality-driven grouping errors. AtomicCommitBench enables evaluation of the commit histories produced by coding agents alongside the final code.

</details>


### [575] [SkillOpt-Lite: Better and Faster Agent Self-evolution via One Line of Vibe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03451)
*Yifei Shen,Bo Li,Xinjie Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SkillOpt-Lite，一种基于零阶优化的最小化技能优化框架，通过文件系统轨迹探索、共识属性挖掘和独立验证门控三大原则，在减少冗余组件的情况下超越完整SkillOpt方法，并推广到全系统优化（HarnessOpt），在编程智能体应用中仅需一行代码即可实现技能进化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能优化方法依赖复杂流程，缺乏对"最小可行管线"的理论论证。本文试图回答：什么是每个组件都经理论或经验证明确有必要的最小化技能优化管线？

Method: 将技能优化形式化为零阶优化问题，将古典数值方法（中心差分、信任域）映射到最新文献。基于Claude Code哲学和PAC学习理论，建立三大收敛与泛化原则：基于文件系统的轨迹探索、共识属性挖掘和独立验证门控。在此基础上提出SkillOpt-Lite，消除冗余组件。

Result: SkillOpt-Lite加速收敛并在多个基准超越完整SkillOpt：LiveMath上GPT-5.5提升+8.8点，GPT-5.4-nano提升+25.4点，使nano模型超越标准GPT-5.4（经SkillOpt优化）。HarnessOpt在SpreadsheetBench上让GPT-5.4-nano达到0.7758准确率，超越更大模型GPT-5.5（0.7620）。

Conclusion: 本文证明了一个经过理论论证的最小化技能优化管线不仅可行，而且性能超越冗余的复杂方案。该框架可自然推广到全系统优化，通过将智能体所有组件视为可编辑代码，仅需一行代码即可集成到生产环境中（如VSCode Copilot）。

Abstract: While skill optimization for autonomous agents has gained traction, existing methods rely on complex pipelines. This leaves a fundamental question unaddressed: What constitutes a minimal viable pipeline for skill optimization, where every component is justified by theory or empirical necessity? We formalize skill optimization via Zeroth-Order (ZO) optimization, mapping classical counterparts (central difference, trust regions) to recent literature. Noting that unlike blind numerical perturbations in classical ZO, skill trajectories serve as interpretable debugging feedback. Grounded in Claude Code philosophy and PAC learning, we establish three principles for convergence and generalization: file-system-based trajectory exploration, consensus attribute mining, and independent validation gating. Eliminating redundancies, we propose SkillOpt-Lite. It accelerates convergence and outperforms full SkillOpt: improving LiveMath by +8.8 points on GPT-5.5 and +25.4 points on GPT-5.4-nano, allowing the nano model to surpass standard GPT-5.4 optimized by SkillOpt. Finally, we integrate our framework into production coding agents like VSCode Copilot, enabling developers to evolve agent skills via one line of vibe. Because our framework treats all agent components simply as standard editable code, this minimal pipeline naturally generalizes to full harness optimization (HarnessOpt). On SpreadsheetBench, HarnessOpt enables GPT-5.4-nano to achieve 0.7758 accuracy, outperforming the larger GPT-5.5 running standard pipelines (0.7620). Code is available at https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/SkillOpt-Lite.

</details>


### [576] [CAGE-1: Control, Assurance, and Governance Evaluation for Enterprise Agentic AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03510)
*Roopam W. Sure*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CAGE-1是一个评估企业级AI Agent是否可部署的框架，重点衡量控制、保障和治理能力，包括权限、策略执行、检索质量、记忆完整性、工具安全、可审计性、人工监督等12个维度。核心创新是Prebind Assurance（预绑定保障），即在Agent行动产生业务影响前验证其是否受控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业AI从实验阶段进入运营流程，从简单的模型访问和RAG转向使用Agent进行规划、检索、记忆、调用工具等复杂操作。这使得评估问题从"回答是否准确流畅"转变为"谁授权、哪个策略适用、证据是否最新、记忆是否有效、工具调用是否被允许、决策能否回放、Agent能否在造成业务影响前被停止"等更复杂的治理问题。

Method: CAGE-1框架定义了12个评估维度：权限(Authority)、策略执行(Policy Enforcement)、检索质量(Retrieval Quality)、记忆完整性(Memory Integrity)、工具安全(Tool Safety)、可审计性(Auditability)、人工监督(Human Oversight)、冲突处理(Conflict Handling)、安全失败(Safe Failure)、预绑定保障(Prebind Assurance)、运营就绪度(Operational Readiness)和业务适配度(Business Fitness)。特别提出了Prebind Assurance，评估在Agent行动产生约束性、有效性或运营后果之前证明其受控的能力，测试动作是否被：准入(admitted)、暂存(held)、收窄(narrowed)、拒绝(refused)、升级(escalated)、隔离(quarantined)或使其无效化(non-effective)。

Result: 提出了一个全面的评估框架CAGE-1，能够系统性地评估企业Agent在部署前的控制、保障和治理能力。

Conclusion: 企业AI Agent的评估需要从传统的大模型评测转向更全面的治理框架，CAGE-1通过12个维度和Prebind Assurance机制，为企业Agent的安全部署提供了系统化的评估方法论。

Abstract: Enterprise artificial intelligence is moving from experimentation into operational workflows. Early programs focused on model access and retrieval-augmented generation, but enterprises are now beginning to deploy agents that plan, retrieve, remember, call tools, update systems, and coordinate work across applications.
  This changes the evaluation problem. Leaders are no longer asking only whether an answer is accurate or fluent. They need to know who authorized an action, which policy applied, whether evidence was current, whether memory was valid, whether a tool call was permitted, whether the decision can be replayed, and whether the agent can be stopped before it creates business impact.
  This paper introduces CAGE-1: Control, Assurance, and Governance Evaluation for Enterprise Agentic AI. CAGE-1 is an evaluation framework for deciding whether enterprise agents are ready for deployment. It evaluates authority, policy enforcement, retrieval quality, memory integrity, tool safety, auditability, human oversight, conflict handling, safe failure, Prebind Assurance, operational readiness, and business fitness.
  CAGE-1 introduces Prebind Assurance to describe the evaluated ability to prove that an agentic action is controlled before it becomes binding, effective, or operationally consequential. The framework tests whether a proposed action is admitted, held, narrowed, refused, escalated, quarantined, or made non-effective before protected consequence forms.

</details>


### [577] [AGL-1: The Enterprise AI Governance Layer as a Control Plane for Trusted Enterprise Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03516)
*Roopam W. Sure*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AGL-1，一个面向企业AI治理的供应商中立参考模型，将治理从检索层面扩展到完整的AI执行路径，涵盖身份感知检索、策略执行、溯源管理、记忆治理、知识完整性监控、代理执行控制和信任可观测性七个治理域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业AI正从实验阶段走向运营依赖，核心挑战已从模型访问和推理规模转向"可治理的智能运营"——需要解决授权执行、上下文溯源、持久记忆控制、过时/冲突知识检测、代理执行约束以及跨分布式AI环境生成可审计证据等问题。

Method: 在GKS-5的治理知识系统原则上，AGL-1将治理问题从检索特定的控制泛化为完整的AI执行路径治理。通过识别七类反复出现的故障模式，定义了七个治理域，构建了一个覆盖基础模型、检索系统、编排框架、企业记忆、策略引擎、可观测性系统、工具、API和业务应用的控制平面参考模型。

Result: 识别了七类故障模式（未授权检索、过时接地、无管理记忆、弱溯源、策略漂移、碎片化可观测性、不受控的自主执行）并定义了对应的七个治理域作为解决方案框架。

Conclusion: 企业AI的持久价值越来越依赖于大规模治理智能的能力。在复杂企业中，信任不是模型本身的属性，而是模型周围系统（身份、知识、策略、记忆、工具、人工监督和证据共同组成的受控管理平面）的属性。

Abstract: Enterprise artificial intelligence is moving from isolated experimentation toward operational dependency across copilots, retrieval-augmented generation systems, autonomous agents, and AI-enabled business workflows. As this transition accelerates, the primary enterprise challenge is no longer only model access or inference scale. It is governed intelligence operations: the ability to enforce authorization, preserve contextual lineage, control persistent memory, detect stale or conflicting knowledge, constrain agentic execution, and produce audit-ready evidence across distributed AI estates.
  This paper introduces AGL-1, the Enterprise AI Governance Layer, as a vendor-neutral reference model for the control plane that should operate across foundation models, retrieval systems, orchestration frameworks, enterprise memory, policy engines, observability systems, tools, APIs, and business applications.
  Building on governed knowledge-system principles introduced in GKS-5, AGL-1 generalizes the governance problem from retrieval-specific controls to full AI execution-path governance. It identifies recurring failure modes such as unauthorized retrieval, stale grounding, unmanaged memory, weak provenance, policy drift, fragmented observability, and uncontrolled autonomous execution. It then defines seven governance domains: identity-aware retrieval, policy enforcement, provenance management, memory governance, knowledge integrity monitoring, agentic execution control, and trust observability.
  The central claim is that durable enterprise value from AI will increasingly depend on the ability to govern intelligence at scale. In complex enterprises, trust is not a property of the model alone. It is a property of the system around the model: identity, knowledge, policy, memory, tools, human oversight, and evidence working together as a managed control plane.

</details>


### [578] [Anchored Self-Play for Code Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03523)
*Caroline Choi,Zeyneb Kaya,Shirley Wu,Tengyu Ma,Tatsunori Hashimoto,Ludwig Schmidt*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出锚定自我博弈（ASP）方法，通过在生成阶段加入代码嵌入相似度奖励并混合参考bug进行修复训练，解决了标准自我博弈在代码修复任务中向不真实bug漂移的问题，在BugSourceBench基准上实现了最佳修复率，相比标准自我博弈相对提升24%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码修复数据有限，需要扩展监督信号；标准自我博弈（生成器-修复器自我博弈）虽然能自动生成训练课程，但会导致模型偏向不真实的合成bug，降低对人写bug的修复能力。

Method: 1) 生成器-修复器自我博弈框架：用强化学习训练单一模型同时生成bug和修复bug；2) 锚定自我博弈（ASP）：在生成阶段加入代码嵌入相似度奖励，使生成bug接近真实bug分布；同时在修复器训练中混合少量参考bug数据。

Result: 在BugSourceBench基准上，ASP在所有bug来源上取得最佳修复率，平均修复率比标准自我博弈相对提升24%（绝对提升7.0个百分点），对人类和LM产生的bug均有改进。

Conclusion: 自我博弈产生的自动课程会向不真实bug漂移，损害泛化能力；锚定自我博弈通过小规模参考集有效锚定训练过程，实现了更好的泛化表现。

Abstract: Code repair is an important capability for language models (LMs): given a buggy program and unit tests, an LM must produce a fixed program that passes the tests. Because code repair data is limited, we aim to scale supervision by using an LM to generate bug--fix tasks. We propose __generator--fixer self-play__, in which a single model is trained with reinforcement learning to generate bugs and fix them. As the fixer improves, the generator adapts to produce more difficult bugs, yielding an automatic curriculum. To test whether this curriculum generalizes, we introduce BugSourceBench, a repair benchmark spanning realistic bug sources: bugs in human-written code, LM-generated code, and human-edited LM-generated code. On BugSourceBench, we find that self-play drifts toward difficult but unrealistic bugs, improving on synthetic bugs but degrading on human-authored ones. We propose Anchored Self-Play (ASP), which anchors self-play with a small reference set by adding a code-embedding similarity reward for generation and mixing reference bugs into fixer training. Across bug sources, ASP achieves the best fix rates, improving average fix rate over standard self-play by $+24\%$ relative / $+7.0$ pp absolute, with gains on bugs from both LMs and humans.

</details>


### [579] [GameEngineBench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Real C++ Runtime Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03525)
*Brian La,Sejoon Chang,Ben Kim,Junyoung Bae,Aamish Ahmad Beg,Sei Chang,Gonzalo Gonzalez-Pumariega*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了GameEngineBench，一个基于Unreal Engine 5的基准测试，用于评估编码智能体在实时交互式C++开发中的能力。在110个任务上，最强模型仅达到55.5%的通过率，31个任务未被任何配置解决，表明前沿编码智能体在处理深度集成的实时系统C++开发时仍有显著困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 游戏引擎在医疗、机器人、建筑等多个领域有广泛应用，但现有软件工程评估缺乏对实时交互式系统中深度集成C++开发的测试。作者希望填补这一空白，通过游戏开发这一"成熟且公开可用"的测试平台，评估编码智能体在处理状态化、交互式、实时系统中的C++代码修改能力。

Method: 基于9个真实游戏仓库，构建了包含110个任务的GameEngineBench基准测试，任务涵盖游戏玩法、多人行为、AI、动画、UI、序列化、XR、渲染等11个类别。要求模型在Unreal Engine 5项目中进行本地C++修改，编译并通过行为测试。评估了12种模型配置的性能。

Result: 最强模型达到55.5%的pass@1，31个任务未被任何配置解决。结果证明前沿编码智能体在深度集成的实时交互式C++开发中仍存在显著困难。

Conclusion: 游戏引擎基准测试是对现有软件工程评估的有价值补充，实时交互式系统的C++开发对当前编码智能体仍是巨大挑战。

Abstract: Game engines provide real-time simulation, rendering, physics, interaction, networking, and asset pipelines, making them valuable not only for games but also for 3D applications in healthcare, robotics, architecture, manufacturing, and related domains. Because game development is where these systems are most mature and publicly available, it offers a practical testbed for evaluating coding agents that must modify C++ code within stateful, interactive, real-time systems. We present GameEngineBench, a benchmark for evaluating coding agents on scoped C++ implementation tasks inside Unreal Engine 5 projects, built from nine real-world game repositories. The evaluation set consists of 110 tasks spanning gameplay mechanics, multiplayer behavior, AI and world orchestration, animation and movement, UI and session code, loading behavior, online-service integration, persistence, data serialization, XR behavior, and rendering-oriented plugins. These tasks require models to make native C++ changes that compile and satisfy behavioral tests within executable Unreal Engine projects. Across twelve evaluated configurations, the strongest model reaches 55.5\% pass@1, while 31 tasks remain unsolved by every configuration. Our results demonstrate that frontier coding agents continue to struggle with deeply integrated C++ development for real-time interactive software, highlighting game-engine benchmarks as a valuable complement to existing software engineering evaluations.

</details>


### [580] [LogSemFuse: Semantic Evidence Fusion for Explainable Log Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03599)
*Hassan Jabri,Zeyang Ma,Zhijie Wang,Tse-Hsun Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LogSemFuse是一个即插即用的证据引导框架，通过融合局部事件模式、LLM语义推理和聚类规则来增强现有日志异常检测模型，在不替换原始流水线的情况下提升检测效果并提供可解释的语义证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于模型的日志异常检测器虽能提供异常信号，但仅输出分数或标签，缺乏操作语义层面的解释能力，导致运维人员无法区分紧急故障与良性偏差，也难以将可疑会话追溯至具体操作行为。

Method: LogSemFuse结合骨干模型预测结果与三类可复用语义证据：局部事件模式、LLM语义推理和聚类导出的可执行规则，最终输出异常标签及其对应的语义证据（触发的局部模式、规则和LLM推理依据）。

Result: 在HDFS、BGL和Liberty数据集上使用DeepLog等四种骨干模型评估，LogSemFuse提升了所有非完美基线的性能，保留了完美基线案例，恢复了98.8%的假阴性，且人类研究显示其解释优于直接LLM解释，推理开销稳定且适度。

Conclusion: 语义增强可以在不增加大量运行时开销的情况下，同时提升日志异常检测的有效性和可解释性，为运维人员提供更有价值的异常诊断依据。

Abstract: Log anomaly detection is critical for reliability monitoring and failure diagnosis in modern software systems. Existing model-based detectors provide useful anomaly signals, but they can still miss anomalous sessions and typically expose only scores or labels rather than the operational semantics behind a decision. This lack of semantic evidence limits their ability to explain why a session is anomalous, even when the final anomaly label is correct. The gap matters in practice because operators need to distinguish urgent failures from benign deviations and trace suspicious sessions back to concrete operational behavior. LLMs can recover richer log semantics, but using them as standalone detectors or repeatedly generating free-form explanations can be costly and difficult to reuse. We present LogSemFuse, an evidence-guided plug-in framework that enhances existing backbone detectors without replacing their original pipelines. LogSemFuse combines backbone predictions with reusable semantic evidence from local event patterns, LLM-based semantic reasoning, and cluster-derived executable rules to produce both anomaly decisions and evidence-based explanations. The resulting output reports the final label together with the semantic evidence that supports it, such as fired local patterns, triggered rules, and LLM rationale. We evaluate LogSemFuse on HDFS, BGL, and Liberty using DeepLog, LogAnomaly, LogBERT, and NeuralLog as backbones. LogSemFuse improves every non-perfect baseline, preserves the already perfect case, recovers 98.8% of backbone false negatives, and produces explanations preferred over direct LLM explanations in a human study. These gains require only modest and stable inference-time overhead, showing that semantic augmentation can improve detection effectiveness and interpretability without imposing large runtime costs.

</details>


### [581] [AutoCedar: An Agentic Framework for Verifier-Guided Access Control Policy Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03656)
*Adarsh Vatsa,Sachi Shome,Yingming Zhou,William Eiers*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AutoCedar是一个验证器引导的系统，通过将自然语言访问控制需求分解为可审查的意图原子，生成经过验证的Cedar策略，解决了从需求到代码的信任鸿沟问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型将自然语言需求转化为代码时存在安全隐患——生成的策略可能编译通过且看起来正确，却包含了未经批准的访问权限。问题不仅在于编写策略代码，更在于编写前明确需求含义，以及编写后验证最终策略是否满足需求意图。

Method: AutoCedar将模式（schema）和策略编写分解为小的"意图原子"（关于词汇和行为的可审查声明）。在通过机械验证和人为审查后，模型生成候选策略，验证器对照已批准的目标进行检查，每个失败被转化为修复信号，指导模型拓宽、收窄或重构策略。整个过程保持目标不变。

Result: 在CedarBench基准的221个授权任务上全部收敛。在医疗、教育和会议管理三个需求语料库案例研究中，成功将含噪的自然语言和提取的访问控制片段转换为经审查的模式、形式化检查和全局验证的Cedar策略库。

Conclusion: 通过将模型工作分解为小问题（每个问题基于已审查的意图和验证器反馈），端到端的策略编写变得可行。AutoCedar有效弥合了自然语言需求与可执行策略之间的验证鸿沟。

Abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly used to turn natural-language requirements into code. In access control, that shortcut is dangerous: a generated policy can compile and read correctly while granting access that no one approved. The difficulty is not only writing policy code. It is fixing what the requirements mean before code is written, and then checking that the final policy actually satisfies that intent. We present AutoCedar, a verifier-guided system that first turns natural-language access-control requirements into a reviewed, checkable target, and then synthesizes Cedar policies against that target. AutoCedar decomposes schema and policy authoring into small intent atoms: reviewable claims about vocabulary and behavior. Once those atoms pass mechanical validation and human intent review, the model proposes a candidate policy, the verifier checks it against the approved target, and each failure is turned into a repair signal that tells the model whether to broaden, narrow, or restructure the policy without changing the target. Because the model's work is split into small problems, each grounded in reviewed intent and backed by verifier feedback, end-to-end policy authoring becomes tractable. AutoCedar converges on all 221 tasks of CedarBench, our benchmark of authorization tasks paired with executable semantic boundaries. Across three requirements-corpus case studies covering healthcare, education, and conference management, AutoCedar converts noisy prose and extracted access-control fragments into reviewed schemas, formal checks, and a globally verified Cedar policy store for each scenario.

</details>


### [582] [Don't Blame the Large Language Model: How Scaffolding Evolution Shapes Coding Agent Quality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03691)
*Oussama Ben Sghaier,Hao Li,Bram Adams,Ahmed E. Hassan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次通过控制变量纵向研究，固定LLM模型只变化scaffolding，评估了35个顺序版本的Qwen Code CLI对50个SWE-bench任务的效果和效率影响，揭示了scaffolding更新会导致agent质量波动，而实践者常将其误归因于模型变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Coding agent的scaffolding更新极快（每天超2次），但实践中质量回退常被错误归因于底层模型而非scaffolding本身，目前缺乏隔离scaffolding贡献的纵向研究。

Method: 先对5个主流开源scaffoldings进行演化分析，再固定LLM模型，仅变化Qwen Code CLI的35个顺序版本，在50个SWE-bench Verified任务上评估效果和效率，追踪质量波动到具体PR和架构组件。

Result: 发现scaffolding发布速度极快（每天超2次），质量波动可追溯至具体开发模式和架构组件变更，有定性证据将个体PR与测量到的质量变化联系起来。

Conclusion: scaffolding的演化是agent质量变化的重要来源，实践者不应忽视其对质量回退的影响，需要建立对scaffolding变更的监控和评估机制。

Abstract: Coding agents, autonomous systems that use large language models (LLMs) to resolve software engineering tasks, rely on agentic scaffolding: a middleware layer in between a developer and a large language model that orchestrates system prompts, tool execution, context management, and iterative reasoning loops. While these scaffoldings evolve at extreme velocities, no study has examined how this evolution affects agent quality (i.e., effectiveness and efficiency) over time. Practitioners regularly report quality regressions after scaffolding updates, yet consistently attribute them to the underlying model rather than the scaffolding itself. In this paper, we address this gap by conducting the first controlled longitudinal study that isolates the scaffolding's contribution. Unlike prior work that fixes the scaffolding and varies the model, we fix the model and vary only the scaffolding, evaluating 35 sequential releases to measure their impact on agent effectiveness and efficiency. We first empirically study the development and release evolution of five major open-source scaffoldings (i.e., Codex, Qwen Code, Gemini, OpenCode, and OpenHands), revealing extreme release velocities exceeding two releases per day and thousands of issues within months. We then perform a controlled deep dive into 35 sequential releases of the Qwen Code CLI, evaluating each against 50 stratified SWE-bench Verified tasks while holding the underlying LLM constant. We trace the resulting quality fluctuations to specific development patterns and architectural components, and illustrate our findings with concrete qualitative evidence linking individual pull requests to measured quality shifts.

</details>


### [583] [Fault Detection and Explainable Classification in Automotive HIL Validation via Denoising Autoencoders and In-Context Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03734)
*Mohammad Abboush,Hamza Ouarrad,Andreas Rausch*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一个两阶段可解释框架，先用去噪自编码器（仅健康数据训练）检测异常，再用大语言模型通过少样本提示对异常窗口进行分类和解释，在汽车软件验证中取得高F1分数（检测0.97-0.98，分类在稳定工况下完美判别）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有汽车软件验证依赖人工审查和基于规则的方法，难以检测超出预定义规则的故障；监督学习方法需要大量标注数据、泛化能力差且缺乏可解释性。

Method: 两阶段框架：(1) 用仅健康信号训练的去噪自编码器基于重构误差检测异常；(2) 将异常窗口编码为紧凑文本统计证据，通过冻结的大语言模型进行零样本/少样本分类，输出预测类别、备选、置信度、故障位置和基于证据的解释。

Result: 检测器在动力总成上平均F1=0.97，工况上平均F1=0.98，平均误差<0.03。零样本分类效果差（最高F1=0.519），少样本在稳定工况下达到完美判别。9B参数模型超越所有零样本中大型模型。最终采用Mistral Small 24B作为主模型。

Conclusion: 提示策略比参数量更决定分类质量；该框架无需故障标注、可解释、在未见工况下泛化好，能为工程师提供可解释的诊断报告，提升验证效率。

Abstract: Validating automotive software systems produces large multivariate test recordings that are still examined through effort-intensive manual review and rule-based evaluation, which detects faults beyond predefined rules poorly. Machine and deep learning have advanced fault diagnosis, yet most supervised models require large labelled datasets, generalise poorly to unseen conditions, and offer little insight into their decisions. We propose a generalisable and explainable two-phase framework for fault detection and classification during real-time validation. A denoising autoencoder trained only on healthy signals first flags abnormal behaviour through reconstruction-error analysis, removing the need for fault labels. Each abnormal window is then encoded as compact textual statistical evidence relative to a time-aligned healthy reference and classified by a frozen large language model under zero-shot and few-shot prompting, returning the predicted class, ranked alternatives, a confidence value, the fault location, and a short evidence-based explanation. Eight open-source models are evaluated across two powertrains and three driving regimes. The detector attains average F1-scores of 0.97 across powertrains and 0.98 across regimes, with average mean error below 0.03. Zero-shot prompting proves insufficient (best 0.519 F1-score), whereas few-shot prompting reaches perfect discrimination under stable regimes, showing that prompting strategy, rather than parameter count, governs classification quality: a nine-billion-parameter model surpasses every zero-shot medium and large model. Mistral Small 24B is adopted as the main pipeline model for its balance of accuracy, class-balanced reliability, calibration, and inference cost, giving engineers interpretable diagnostic reports and more efficient validation.

</details>


### [584] [Graph-Aware Fuzzing for Graph Database Management Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03741)
*Yu Li,Qiang Hu,Yao Zhang,Junjie Wang,Hao Liu,Rui Wang,Yongqiang Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAF，一种面向图数据库查询引擎的黑盒模糊测试框架，通过基于大语言模型的图上下文感知查询生成和五种图特定的变异算子，显著提升了代码覆盖率和bug发现能力，在6个GDBMS上发现了34个未知漏洞（23个已分配CVE）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GDBMS测试方法主要依赖差分测试和蜕变测试，这些方法的结果一致性预言限制了输入的可比性，导致单引擎运行时故障（如崩溃、内存错误）未被充分探索。

Method: (1) 基于大语言模型生成参数化的Cypher骨架，通过级联依赖解析联合解析标签、关系类型、属性、值和变量作用域，生成结构多样且合法查询；(2) 提出五种图特定的变异算子，结合执行状态反馈（执行时间、结果大小、系统状态）引导探索，避免无效查询和昂贵遍历，优先对异常执行进行局部变异。

Result: 在6个GDBMS上相比最强基线提升31.6%~41.1%的行覆盖率；12小时内触发25个独特bug（基线共仅6个）；总计发现34个未知bug，32个已确认，23个已分配CVE。

Conclusion: GRAF通过图上下文感知查询生成和反馈引导的变异，有效解决了图数据库模糊测试中查询有效性与结构多样性、拓扑依赖执行行为探索两大挑战，显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: Graph Database Management Systems (GDBMSs) are essential infrastructure for managing interconnected data. Existing GDBMS testing methods primarily rely on differential and metamorphic testing. The result consistency oracles of these methods constrain inputs to queries that are comparable across engines or transformations, leaving single engine runtime failures, such as crashes and memory errors, insufficiently explored. Developing dedicated fuzzers for GDBMSs faces two key challenges: (1) generating valid and structurally diverse queries under complex graph constraints, and (2) guiding exploration to capture topology dependent execution behavior. To address these challenges, we propose GRAF, a black box fuzzing framework for GDBMS query engines. First, GRAF introduces graph context aware query generation based on cascading dependency resolution. It instantiates parameterized Cypher skeletons generated by a Large Language Model (LLM) by jointly resolving labels, relationship types, properties, values, and variable scopes against the active graph state. This process produces structurally diverse queries while eliminating syntactic and semantic violations. Second, GRAF applies five graph specific mutation operators guided by execution state feedback, including execution time, result size, and system status. This feedback steers exploration away from unproductive queries and expensive traversals, while prioritizing local mutations around abnormal executions. We evaluated GRAF against three existing approaches on six widely used GDBMSs. GRAF consistently improves line coverage by 31.6% to 41.1% over the strongest baseline on each target. In 12 hour fuzzing, it triggered 25 unique bugs, compared to six from all baselines combined. Overall, GRAF discovered 34 previously unknown bugs, with 32 confirmed by developers and 23 assigned CVEs.

</details>


### [585] [EvoEye: Self-Evolving Runtime Monitoring for Autonomous Driving Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03755)
*Mingfei Cheng,Lionel Briand,Xiaofei Xie*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: EvoEye是一种面向自动驾驶系统的自进化运行时监控框架，通过识别监控器错误、生成信息性执行场景并动态更新监控器，显著提升了碰撞预测的召回率和警告时间，在Apollo和CARLA平台上的高速及城市场景中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶运行时监控器存在固定检测能力的局限：基于规则的监控器仅覆盖人工指定的危险场景，而基于学习的监控器严重依赖初始训练数据，且可能保留大量预测误差。因此需要一种能够自我进化、持续提升监测能力的方案。

Method: EvoEye包含两个核心组件：FusionMonitor——学习跨模块的时间交互信息进行碰撞预测；BlindSpotEvolver——将当前预测错误转化为搜索引导，利用密度感知变异获取信息性执行场景，用于后续监控器更新。

Result: 在Baidu Apollo与CARLA平台的高速和城市场景中，FusionMonitor在0.05假阳性率下帧级召回率提升高达37.8个百分点，延迟仅2.49毫秒，中位警告时间2.8-4.2秒。同等预算下，BlindSpotEvolver在之前遗漏的不安全上下文上F1分数比均匀采样和面向违规采样高出最多13.2个点。

Conclusion: EvoEye通过自进化的方式有效克服了现有监控器检测能力固定的问题，实现了更准确、更及时的碰撞预警，为自动驾驶系统运行时安全保障提供了新范式。

Abstract: Runtime monitoring is essential for detecting impending hazards in autonomous driving systems (ADSs). However, existing ADS runtime monitors have fixed detection capabilities: rule-based monitors cover only manually specified hazards, while learning-based monitors depend heavily on their initial training data and may retain substantial prediction errors. We therefore propose EvoEye, which identifies the current monitor's errors, generates informative executions accordingly, and updates the monitor through self-evolution. To enable effective self-evolution, EvoEye combines a capable runtime monitor with targeted scenario acquisition. FusionMonitor learns cross-module temporal interactions for collision prediction, while BlindSpotEvolver converts current prediction errors into search guidance and uses density-aware mutation to acquire informative executions for subsequent monitor updates. We evaluate EvoEye on Baidu Apollo with CARLA in representative highway and urban scenarios. FusionMonitor improves frame-level Recall by up to 37.8 percentage points at a false positive rate of 0.05, with 2.49 ms latency and 2.8-4.2 seconds of median warning time. Under the same budget, BlindSpotEvolver outperforms uniform and violation-oriented sampling by up to 13.2 F1 points on previously missed unsafe contexts.

</details>


### [586] [Semantic-aware and Self-improving Program Reduction via Agentic Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03766)
*Xintong Zhou,Hongxu Xu,Chunhao Liao,Puzhuo Liu,Yongqiang Tian,Chengnian Sun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型智能体的程序精简方法PROJ，通过语义理解和经验积累实现比现有方法更小的精简结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有程序精简技术依赖预定义的语法驱动变换规则，缺乏语义理解能力，且无法从过去的精简经验中学习。

Method: 将程序精简重构为LLM驱动的自主推理任务：reducer agent负责语义感知的特定案例精简，reflector agent负责提取和积累可迁移的精简知识。

Result: 在90个跨三种编程语言的基准测试中，PROJ始终比所有现有最先进的精简器生成更小的精简程序，同时保持高效率。

Conclusion: 基于LLM智能体的语义理解与经验积累方法，能够超越传统语法驱动方法的精简能力。

Abstract: Reducing bug-triggering programs to their minimal essential form is a fundamental task in debugging language processors such as compilers and interpreters. Existing reduction techniques are limited by their reliance on predefined, syntax-driven transformations that lack semantic understanding of the target program, and by their inability to learn from past reduction experiences.
  We present a new approach that recasts program reduction as an autonomous reasoning task powered by agentic Large Language Models (LLMs). Instead of applying fixed transformation rules, our method enables an LLM to analyze program semantics, formulate reduction hypotheses, and iteratively refine its approach based on execution outcomes. Successful reduction experiences are further distilled into reusable strategies, allowing the system to continuously improve over time.
  We realize this approach in PROJ, a framework built around two collaborative components: a reducer agent that performs semantic-aware, case-specific program reduction, and a reflector agent that extracts and accumulates transferable reduction knowledge. Extensive experiments on 90 benchmarks spanning three programming languages show that PROJ consistently produces smaller reduced programs than all existing state-of-the-art reducers while maintaining high efficiency.

</details>


### [587] [SkillFab: An Agent-Native Skill Production Platform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03780)
*Anjie Xu,Yifeng Cai,Yi Li,Zixing Wang,Zhiyu Zhang,Jingfan Chen,Ruohan Xu,Leye Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SkillFab是一个代理原生平台，用于将缺失的能力转化为可审查、可复用的Agent技能。它通过需求驱动开发、Git提交证据、维护者审查和注册表发布的完整生命周期，支持人类、脚本和外部代理在共享状态上协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Agent开发中，当缺乏可复用技能时，缺失能力无法被系统化管理，且不同开发主体（人类、脚本、外部Agent）在各自的任务日志上独立工作，缺乏共享状态和统一的工作流。

Method: 运行时先搜索可复用技能；无合适技能时，将未满足能力作为需求优先处理；通过SkillFab管理的仓库、Git提交证据、维护者审查和注册表发布进行开发。通过Web、REST和MCP接口暴露生命周期，使用限定Git推送URL、原生范围提交摄取、工作流状态读取和工作流事件历史来支持长时Agent工作的可审查性和可恢复性。

Result: 实现了端到端OS检测技能运行、将运维实践转化为可复用技能知识的Docker研究包，以及外部优化案例，展示了改进技能工件如何作为可审查、版本化提交进入SkillFab。

Conclusion: SkillFab通过统一的状态管理和工作流可见性，解决了Agent技能开发中的协作和可复用性问题，使长时运行的Agent工作变得可审查和可恢复。

Abstract: SkillFab is an agent-native platform for turning missing capabilities into reviewed, reusable Agent Skills. At runtime, agents first search for reusable skills; when no adequate skill exists, the unmet capability becomes a demand-first issue before any repository or implementation branch needs to exist. Development then proceeds through a SkillFab-managed repository, Git-ingested commit evidence, maintainer review, and registry publication. The same lifecycle is exposed through web, REST, and MCP surfaces, so humans, scripts, and external agents operate on shared state rather than separate task logs. The current system uses scoped Git push URLs, native range commit ingestion, workflow-state reads, and workflow-event histories to make long-running agent work reviewable and recoverable. We document the platform model, architecture, implemented capabilities, and three case studies: an end-to-end OS-detect skill run, a Docker research package that converts operational practice into reusable skill knowledge, and an external optimization case showing how improved skill artifacts can enter SkillFab as reviewable, versioned submissions.
  Deployment: https://skillfab.ai.

</details>


### [588] [LogNLQ: Natural-Language Log Querying with Parser-Induced and Semantically Grounded Schemas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03884)
*Juepeng Wang,Jinyang Liu,Zhuangbin Chen,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LogNLQ通过将原始日志解析为模板分区的关系表，并利用双粒度语义标注和LLM，实现了自然语言到可执行SQL的日志查询，在包含8,895个查询的基准测试中大幅超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么将日志视为纯文本，要么依赖预定义的模式，但原始日志缺乏可执行的结构化模式，导致自然语言查询日志面临根本性障碍。

Method: 1) 将原始日志解析为模板分区的关系统计表；2) 双粒度语义标注（模板列和参数列分别标注名称和描述）；3) 通过语义搜索检索相关模式候选；4) LLM在检索上下文中生成可执行SQL。

Result: 在包含8,895个查询的LogNLQ-Bench基准上，LogNLQ显著优于所有代表性基线，在复杂分析场景中优势尤为明显。

Conclusion: LogNLQ有效解决了日志缺乏可执行模式的根本问题，为自然语言日志查询提供了可行的结构化SQL生成方案。

Abstract: Logs are essential for system monitoring and failure diagnoses in modern software systems, yet querying them through natural language remains an open challenge. Existing approaches either treat logs as plain text, generate queries for schema-light backends, or assume predefined relational schemas, but none addresses a fundamental obstacle: raw logs carry no executable schema over which structured queries can be defined and run. To address these limitations, we present LogNLQ, a framework that formulates natural-language log querying as executable SQL generation over parser-induced and semantically grounded schemas. LogNLQ parses raw logs into template-partitioned relational tables, then applies dual-granularity semantic grounding to annotate both templates and parameter columns with interpretable names and descriptions. At query time, relevant schema candidates are retrieved via semantic search, and a large language model (LLM) generates executable SQL constrained to the retrieved context. To support rigorous evaluation, we introduce LogNLQ-Bench, an execution-verified benchmark of 8,895 queries over four real-world log datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that LogNLQ consistently outperforms all representative baselines by wide margins, with especially pronounced gains on analytically complex scenario queries.

</details>


### [589] [Inferring the Shape of Data Frames in R Programs using Abstract Interpretation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03889)
*Oliver Gerstl,Florian Sihler,Matthias Tichy*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于抽象解释的静态分析方法，用于推断R语言程序中数据框的形状（列名、行列数），并在真实R脚本上验证了其正确性、准确性及识别潜在错误的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: R语言中的数据框是数据分析的核心数据结构，但缺少静态类型保证，开发者难以在程序特定点推理数据框的形状（如列名、行列数），容易导致运行时错误。

Method: 采用抽象解释方法，构建简化乘积域（reduced product domain），追踪数据框的确保列名、潜在列名、列数和行数；为常用的数据框操作（如mutate、filter、subset）定义了抽象语义。

Result: 在78个可执行的R脚本上验证了正确性（未出现下近似）；在33,314个真实R脚本中，42.1%的数据框操作推断出具体形状约束，0.9%推断出精确形状；若所有数据集可用，分别提升至58.7%和4.2%；发现40个包含潜在无效数据框访问的真实R脚本。

Conclusion: 该静态分析能够有效推断数据框形状，为数据分析中的R语言程序提供静态安全保障，帮助研究人员避免数据框访问错误。

Abstract: Data frames are a fundamental data structure in many data analysis tasks and are widely used in programming languages like R. Due to their omnipresence in data analysis, there are many functions that operate on their shape and content, for example, to clean and transform study data. However, languages like R do not offer static guarantees on data frames making it difficult to reason about their shape at a specific point in the program.
  In this paper, we present a novel static analysis to infer the shape of data frames in R programs using abstract interpretation by tracking the ensured and potential column names, as well as the potential number of columns and rows. For this, we use a reduced product domain and define abstract semantics for the most commonly used data frame operations, such as mutating, filtering, and subsetting. We evaluate the correctness and accuracy of our analysis on a selection of 78 executable real-world R scripts achieving empirical evidence for soundness by never under-approximating the data frame shape. Additionally, we demonstrate the ability of our analysis to infer the shape of data frames on a large dataset of 33,314 real-world R scripts by inferring concrete shape constraints for 42.1 % and exact shapes for 0.9 % of the data frame operations, improving to 58.7 % and 4.2 % if all datasets read in these scripts are available to our analysis. Using the inferred data frame shapes, we identified 40 real-world R scripts containing potential invalid data frame accesses. This shows the potential of our analysis to significantly support researchers in using data frames in data analysis.

</details>


### [590] [Balancing Microservices and Monolithic Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03898)
*Venkata Krishna Chaitanya Nuthalapati*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对比分析了单体架构与微服务架构在可扩展性、可靠性、部署和团队复杂性等方面的技术优劣，并提出了基于系统规模、业务需求、运维成熟度和长期可维护性的架构选型评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业软件团队在构建系统时面临核心架构抉择：是构建单一统一的应用程序，还是将功能拆解为独立可部署的服务。本文旨在系统性地分析和比较这两种架构方案，帮助团队做出更明智的技术决策。

Method: 通过对比分析方法，从可扩展性、可靠性、部署、组织复杂性等多个维度，系统梳理单体架构与微服务架构的技术收益与权衡，并建立基于系统规模、业务需求、运维成熟度和长期可维护性的评估框架。

Result: 揭示了两种架构各自的适用场景：单体架构在系统规模较小、业务需求稳定、运维能力有限时更具优势；微服务架构则在大型复杂系统、需要独立扩展和独立部署的场景下更有价值。

Conclusion: 架构选型不应追求"最佳实践"而应匹配具体上下文，团队需要根据当前系统规模、业务需求、运维能力和长期维护目标综合评估，选择最适合自身情况的架构方案。

Abstract: Enterprise software teams face a fundamental architectural choice: build a single unified application or decompose functionality into independently deployable services. This article examines monolithic and microservices architectures, analyzing their technical benefits, tradeoffs, and practical implications for scalability, reliability, deployment, and organizational complexity. It discusses how teams can evaluate these architectural approaches based on system size, business requirements, operational maturity, and long-term maintainability.

</details>


### [591] [Why3-py: A Tool for Formal Verification of Hypothesis Testing and Meta-Analysis in Python](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03951)
*Akira Tanaka,Yusuke Kawamoto*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Why3-py，一个将Python统计程序转换为WhyML进行形式化验证的框架，并扩展StatWhy工具支持元分析方法的验证，以解决统计方法中隐含假设被忽视和误用的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学研究的可重复性危机凸显了元分析的重要性，但统计方法常存在模糊且隐含的底层假设，导致错误应用和解读。现有工具缺乏对Python统计程序进行形式化验证的能力。

Method: 开发Why3-py，作为Why3验证平台的Python前端，将Python程序转换为适合形式化验证的WhyML表示，克服Python动态类型和运行时多态性带来的挑战；并扩展StatWhy工具以支持元分析方法的验证。

Result: 实现了Python统计程序到WhyML的转换，使得用户能够识别被忽视的假设和误用的分析，验证假设检验和元分析Python程序的正确性。

Conclusion: 该框架有效帮助研究人员发现统计方法中隐藏的假设和误用，提升了统计分析和元分析的可信度与可重复性。

Abstract: The reproducibility crisis in scientific research has received widespread recognition, thereby increasing the importance of meta-analyses that integrate statistical analyses from multiple studies. However, statistical methods often have ambiguous and implicit underlying assumptions, which can lead to their erroneous applications and interpretations. To address this issue, we propose a formal verification framework for statistical programs written in Python. Specifically, we present Why3-py, a Python front-end for the Why3 verification platform that transforms Python programs into verification-oriented WhyML representations suitable for formal verification, addressing the challenges arising from Python's dynamic typing and runtime polymorphism. Furthermore, we extend the StatWhy tool to support the verification of meta-analysis methods. These tools enable users to identify overlooked assumptions and misuse of analyses, and to verify the correctness of Python programs for hypothesis testing and for meta-analyses.

</details>


### [592] [Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning for Vulnerability Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03963)
*Yanjie Zhao,Hongjie Chen,Li Lu,Zhou Yang,Xiao Cheng,Haoyu Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 针对LLM在漏洞检测中不可靠的问题（过早解除安全责任），提出LeanGuard神经符号框架：LLM仅作为语义过滤器清洗AST提取的事实，不做裁决；符号侧用Lean 4证明助手严格验证，未证明的义务不会被视为缺陷，最后通过证据感知裁决器综合判断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成的流畅解释并非形式化证明，导致漏洞检测不可靠。根本原因是LLM在解释代码的同时也承担了"裁决安全义务是否满足"的角色，这种角色混淆导致过早地解除安全责任（premature discharge of safety obligations）。

Method: 提出LeanGuard框架，分离神经网络与符号系统的角色：(1) 神经侧：LLM仅作为语义过滤器，从AST提取的候选事实中剪枝虚假事实，保留真实事实，但不做裁决；(2) 符号侧：将保留的事实编译为Lean 4形式验证模型，每个危险操作必须匹配形式化证明的守卫（guard），否则义务保持开放；(3) 证据感知裁决器：综合神经侧和符号侧的判断，根据证据质量权衡。

Result: 在五个CWE类别上实例化该框架，评估分工可以推进到何种程度。

Conclusion: 解决LLM漏洞检测不可靠性的关键在于角色分离——负责解释代码的组件不应同时负责裁决安全义务是否满足。LeanGuard通过神经符号分工实现了更可靠的漏洞检测。

Abstract: Ask a large language model (LLM) whether a pointer dereference is safe, and it can often produce a plausible justification for ``yes''. The difficulty is that a fluent justification is not a proof. This gap is precisely where automated vulnerability detection lives: deciding, for a given operation in source code, whether a memory safety defect such as a null dereference, use-after-free, or double free can actually occur. We trace the unreliability of LLM-based vulnerability detection to a mechanism, the premature discharge of safety obligations, and argue that the remedy is not better prompting but a separation of roles: the component that interprets the code must not also be the one that decides a safety obligation is met.
  In this paper, we present LeanGuard, a neuro-symbolic framework that assigns each act to the side equipped for it. On the neural side, an LLM serves strictly as a semantic filter over candidate facts extracted from the abstract syntax tree (AST): it prunes spurious facts and keeps the real ones, but never discharges an obligation or decides the verdict on its own. On the symbolic side, the surviving facts are compiled into a verification model in Lean 4 (a formal proof assistant whose kernel accepts a conclusion only when it is formally proved), where every dangerous operation must be matched by a guard that provably covers it in scope; absent such a guard, the obligation stays open rather than being argued away. Because a function rarely arrives with full context, this symbolic model is necessarily partial: an unproved obligation is not yet a defect. An evidence-aware adjudicator therefore weighs the symbolic and neural verdicts by the quality of each. We instantiate the framework on five CWE classes to ask how far this division of labor can be pushed.

</details>


### [593] [Refused in Chat, Written in Code: Workflow-Level Jailbreak Construction in IDE Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03968)
*Abhishek Kumar,Carsten Maple*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文揭示了一个新的安全漏洞：在IDE集成环境中，大语言模型（如Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro等）充当多步骤编码代理时，可以通过将有害目标分散到工作流的各个常规阶段（即"工作流级越狱构造"）来绕过直接对话中的安全拒绝机制。虽然直接提示下拒绝率极高（仅8/816成功），但在完整工作流中所有816/816的提示都生成了不安全的教学内容，表明对话式拒绝基准测试严重高估了编码代理的安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全评估方法仅将LLM视为聊天机器人，在单轮提示-响应的孤立场景下评估安全性，忽视了编码代理在多步骤软件开发工作流中可能产生的安全漏洞。

Method: 设计"工作流级越狱构造"方法，将有害目标拆解并分散到软件开发的常规工作流阶段中；在VS Code的GitHub Copilot上测试四种闭源后端模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6、Claude Haiku 4.5、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Gemini 3.5 Flash）；使用Hammurabi's Code、HarmBench和AdvBench共204个提示，对比直接对话、CSV读取、单步代码修复基线与完整工作流的拒绝率。

Result: 基线条件下（直接对话、CSV读取、单步代码修复）各仅8/816成功响应，几乎完全拒绝；而在完整工作流下，816/816的提示均产生了不安全的教学内容，经两位专家评审员按严格标准独立确认。

Conclusion: 对话式拒绝基准测试严重高估了实际部署的编码代理的安全性；需要设计能够跨多轮IDE工作流及其生成工件进行安全推理的防御机制，而不仅限于单轮对话的安全检查。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as IDE-integrated coding agents that decompose tasks, generate and edit files, run code, and refine outputs over many turns. Yet their safety is still often evaluated as if they were chatbots: one harmful prompt, one response, judged in isolation. We introduce workflow-level jailbreak construction, a failure mode in which a harmful objective is assembled across ordinary stages of a software-development workflow rather than generated through a single direct prompt. Using GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, we study four closed-weight backends: Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Haiku 4.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Gemini 3.5 Flash. Across 204 prompts from Hammurabi's Code, HarmBench, and AdvBench , the models show near-complete refusal under direct chat, CSV-read, and single-step code-fix baselines, with only 8/816 successful responses in each baseline condition. Under the full workflow, however, the same prompts and backends produce 816/816 unsafe teaching-shot completions, all independently confirmed by two expert evaluators under a strict rubric. These results show that conversational refusal benchmarks can substantially overstate the safety of deployed coding agents and motivate defenses that reason about safety across multi-turn IDE workflows and their generated artifacts, not only individual chat turns.

</details>


### [594] ["AI Slop is DDoSing Open Source": Understanding the Impact of AI-Generated Contributions on Open Source Sustainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04003)
*Sadia Afroz,Courtney Miller,Tyler Menezes,Edward Gilmour,Anita Sarma,Zixuan Feng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文揭示了GenAI工具对开源社区造成的"AI-DDoS"效应：大量低质量AI生成贡献（PR量上升但合并率下降，一次性贡献者合并率下降18.18%）。通过混合方法研究，作者识别了6个主题、验证了相关假设，并提出了11种补救策略，最终指出AI-DDoS不仅是贡献量问题，更是一个可持续性陷阱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于生成式AI工具能够大规模自动生成代码贡献，开源社区正面临低质量贡献泛滥的威胁。这种"AI-DDoS"可能耗尽社区的审查能力，但该现象尚未得到系统性的实证研究。作者旨在量化这种现象的影响并探索应对策略。

Method: 采用基于现象学的混合方法：(1) 从Reddit、OSS导师邮件列表和博客中收集实践者叙述，识别6个主题；(2) 使用贝叶斯结构时间序列分析（BSTS）对294个仓库的200万+PR和issues进行因果推断；(3) 通过实践者访谈识别11种补救策略，并用229名OSS实践者的调查进行验证。

Result: 2025年PR数量增加，但合并率下降；一次性贡献者的PR合并率相比反事实降低了18.18%。识别出的11种补救策略可分为保护型、适应型和变革型三类。社区倾向于选择低努力的防御策略，这虽然保护了短期审查能力，但使开放性难以持续。

Conclusion: AI-DDoS本质上是开源可持续性的陷阱：社区在低质量贡献洪流中倾向于采取短期防御措施，而这种选择反过来损害了长期的开源开放性和可持续性。需要更系统性的适应和变革型策略来应对。

Abstract: Open source software (OSS) communities are facing increasing pressure from Generative AI (GenAI) tools. We call it AI-DDoS: a denial-of-service effect in which plausible but low-quality AI-generated contributions overwhelm OSS community capacity. Using a phenomenon-based mixed-methods approach, we first analyze practitioner accounts from Reddit, OSS mentor mailing lists, and blogs to identify six recurring themes and derive hypotheses. We then evaluate these hypotheses using Bayesian Structural Time Series analysis across 294 repositories with over 2 million pull requests and issues. Our results show that while PR volume increased in 2025, merge rates declined, with one-time contributors experiencing an 18.18% drop in PR merge rates relative to the counterfactual. Finally, we identify 11 remediation strategies through practitioners' interviews and validate them with a survey of 229 OSS practitioners, grouping them into preservative, adaptive, and transformative orientations. Our findings show that AI-DDoS is not only a contribution-volume problem but a sustainability trap: communities often default to low-effort defensive strategies that protect short-term review capacity while making openness difficult to sustain.

</details>


### [595] [The "I Don't Know" Filter: Enhancing Agentic Reliability in Function Calling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04034)
*Stefan Broecker,Mason del Rosario,Boris Selitser,Thomas Strohmer*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的智能体评估指标（考虑错误函数调用的负面结果）和一个轻量级可训练过滤器，用于检测和抑制不确定的函数调用，让智能体学会说“我不知道”，从而提高生产可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言模型在函数调用基准上表现提升迅速，但训练和评估指标鼓励模型即使不确定也做出肯定回答，导致幻觉。在高风险应用中，这种幻觉可能造成灾难性后果。

Method: 提出一种考虑错误函数调用负面结果的新评估指标；设计一个轻量级可训练过滤器，量化语言模型的不确定性并移除可能有害的函数调用，无需修改底层模型。

Result: 训练过滤器检测并抑制不确定的函数调用，成功减少有害幻觉，让智能体在不确定时选择说“不知道”。

Conclusion: 该方法展示了在不修改底层模型的情况下，实现可靠智能体的实用路径，强调了“知道何时说不知道”对于生产环境可靠性的重要性。

Abstract: The language models that underpin agents have seen a rapid rise in performance on function calling benchmarks. However, the metrics used in the training and evaluation of these models often encourage models to make positive claims even when the answer is uncertain, leading to hallucinations. Such hallucinations can be disastrous when language models are trusted to use function calls to make decisions in high stakes applications. To that end, we propose an agent evaluation metric that takes into account the negative outcomes associated with incorrect function calls. Further, to catch hallucinations before they can cause harm, we propose a lightweight trainable filter that can quantify a language model's uncertainty and remove potentially harmful function calls. By training that filter to detect and suppress uncertain function calls without modifying the underlying model, we demonstrate a practical path toward agents that know when to say "I don't know," a property we argue is essential to production reliability.

</details>


### [596] [Kaizen: Metamorphic Fuzzing and Differential Testing for LLM-Translated HPC Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04058)
*Oscar Ludwig,Ninad Anklesaria,Zheming Jin,Swaroop Pophale,Kausar Moshood,Christian J. DeVore,Brandon Gill,Cassius Villareal,Keita Teranishi,Manish Motwani*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Kaizen是一个基于蜕变测试和差异测试的框架，用于评估LLM将HPC代码（如CUDA转OpenMP）翻译的正确性，发现编译成功不能保证语义正确，并揭示了系统性的编译错误模式和输入相关的语义错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM翻译HPC代码的评估方法（编译成功率、token级相似度、开发者编写的测试）无法可靠保证翻译后代码的行为正确性，需要更有效的正确性评估方法。

Method: 提出Kaizen框架，采用蜕变测试（通过源码变异生成语义等价程序）、基于语法的输入模糊测试（探索行为多样性）和差异测试（暴露原始与翻译程序间的语义差异）相结合的方法。

Result: 在16个科学应用、7个领域、3个微调LLM上的评估表明：(1)编译成功不能代理正确性；(2)存在9类（kernel级）和27类（全程序）系统性编译错误；(3)语义错误通常依赖输入，需差异测试才能发现；(4)全程序翻译比kernel级翻译困难得多。

Conclusion: 强调了LLM辅助HPC代码翻译需要进行面向正确性的评估，而非仅依赖编译成功等表面指标。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to port scientific codes across heterogeneous high-performance computing (HPC) programming models, such as translating CUDA to OpenMP, OpenACC, Kokkos or SYCL. However, current evaluations use compilation success, token-level similarity, or developer-written tests from static benchmarks, which cannot reliably ensure behavioral correctness. We present Kaizen, a metamorphic fuzzing and differential testing framework for evaluating the correctness of LLM-translated HPC code. Kaizen uses metamorphic fuzzing via source-code mutation to generate semantically equivalent programs, grammar-based input fuzzing to explore behavioral diversity, and differential testing to expose semantic divergences between original and translated applications that compile and pass developer-written tests yet produce incorrect scientific results. We evaluate Kaizen on CUDA-to-OpenMP translation of 16 scientific applications from seven domains using three fine-tuned LLMs at kernel-level and full-program granularity. Our evaluation reveals that (1) compilation success is a poor proxy for correctness; (2) LLM-translated programs exhibit systematic compile-time error patterns, with nine categories for kernel-level translation and 27 for full-program translation; (3) semantic errors that survive compilation are often input-dependent and require differential testing to expose; and (4) full-program translation is substantially harder than kernel-level translation. These findings highlight the need for correctness-oriented evaluation of LLM-assisted HPC code translations.

</details>


### [597] [Benchmarking API Drift in LLM-Generated Quantum Code Across Successive SDK Versions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04072)
*Mohammad Arif Rasyidi,Syahirul Faiz*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出量子API漂移基准测试quantum-api-drift，评估LLM生成Qiskit量子代码时对指定SDK版本的适配能力。在17个模型上的实验表明，版本对齐是量子代码生成的一个独立评估维度，且API漂移问题即使有迁移指南也难以完全解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型能生成看似合理的量子代码，但能否可靠地针对用户请求的特定SDK版本尚不清楚。作者将其定义为API漂移问题，并希望系统性地评估LLM在量子SDK代码生成中的版本忠实度。

Method: 构建quantum-api-drift基准测试，使用Qiskit（v0.43、v1.3、v2.0三个版本）作为代表。设计50个任务，每个提示采样3次，共450个生成样本，每个模型执行1,350次。评估17个模型，其中16个在匹配REST API设置下测试（1024 tokens输出限制），GPT-5.4 (Codex CLI)作为参考配置单独报告。采用Diagonal Pass@1、错误类型分析（如导入错误、废弃警告等）和文档引导修复成功率等指标。

Result: 16个匹配REST模型中，Diagonal Pass@1范围从0.02到0.85。Claude Opus 4.7在v0.43和v2.0上最强，Grok 4.20在v1.3上最强（0.513）。错误配置系统性地随模型强度变化：弱模型主要因导入错误失败，强模型更多遭遇废弃级别错误。文档引导修复整体成功率为0.19到0.59，且对迁移到v2.0的效果始终优于v1.3。

Conclusion: 版本对齐是量子代码生成的一个独立评估维度；API漂移问题即便有迁移指南也只能部分恢复。

Abstract: Large language models can generate plausible quantum code, but it is unclear whether they can reliably target the specific software development kit (SDK) version requested by the user. We study this problem as API drift and introduce quantum-api-drift, a benchmark for measuring version fidelity, defined here as execution success on the requested SDK version, cross-version compatibility, failure modes, and documentation-guided repair in LLM-generated quantum SDK code. We instantiate the benchmark with Qiskit, a representative quantum SDK that underwent substantial interface changes across v0.43, v1.3, and v2.0. We evaluate 17 models on 50 tasks with 3 samples per prompt, yielding 450 generated samples and 1,350 executions per model. Sixteen models are tested in a matched REST API setting with a 1024-token output cap, while GPT-5.4 (Codex CLI) is reported separately as a reference configuration. Across the 16 matched REST models, diagonal Pass@1 ranges from 0.02 to 0.85. Claude Opus 4.7 is strongest on v0.43 and v2.0, while Grok 4.20 is strongest on v1.3 at 0.513. Error profiles differ systematically by model strength: weaker models fail mainly with broken imports, while stronger models more often reach deprecation-level failures. Documentation-guided repair succeeds for 0.19 to 0.59 of repair attempts overall and is consistently much more effective for migration to v2.0 than to v1.3. The benchmark artifacts are publicly available at https://github.com/arasyi/quantum-api-drift. These results show that version alignment is a distinct evaluation axis for quantum code generation and that API drift remains only partly recoverable even with migration guidance.

</details>


### [598] [SEDCoT: Enhancing LLM-Based COBOL Code Translation via Symbolic Execution and Delta Debugging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04092)
*Phillip Entin,Wenchao Gu,Alexander Knapp,Chunyang Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出SEDCoT框架，通过大语言模型初始翻译、符号执行生成测试并迭代修复、delta调试最小化失败用例，实现COBOL到C的高质量翻译，相比现有方法正确率提升至少12%，可读性显著优于规则方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: COBOL在银行、保险、政府等关键基础设施中仍广泛使用，但因技术陈旧、文档匮乏、开发者退休等问题，维护日趋困难，亟需将其翻译为C等现代语言。传统基于规则的转译器输出难以阅读和维护，而通用LLM因COBOL属于低资源语言且逻辑模式独特，翻译正确率不理想。

Method: 提出SEDCoT三阶段框架：1）利用LLM进行初始COBOL到C翻译；2）结合符号执行与LLM指导生成测试套件，迭代修复语义差异；3）集成delta调试将失败测试最小化为简洁反例，加速自动代码修复。

Result: 在公开COBOL-to-C数据集上，SEDCoT相比最先进基线方法正确率提升至少12%，且翻译结果可读性显著高于基于规则的替代方案。

Conclusion: SEDCoT有效弥合了COBOL翻译中的语义鸿沟，结合LLM的语义理解与符号执行的精确验证，在正确率和可读性上均取得显著优势，为遗留系统现代化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: COBOL remains critical across banking, insurance, and government infrastructure. However, maintenance is increasingly challenging due to outdated technologies, sparse documentation, and developer retirement, necessitating code translation into modern languages like C. Traditional rule-based transcompilers yield outputs that are difficult to read and maintain, while general-purpose large language models (LLMs) achieve suboptimal correctness because COBOL is a low-resource language with distinct logic patterns. To bridge this gap, we propose SEDCoT, a novel COBOL-to-C translation framework. SEDCoT first leverages LLMs for initial translation, then combines symbolic execution with LLM guidance to generate test suites and iteratively repair semantic discrepancies. Finally, it integrates delta debugging to minimize failing tests into succinct counterexamples, accelerating automated code repair. Evaluating SEDCoT on a public COBOL-to-C dataset demonstrates that it outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by at least 12% while producing translations with substantially higher readability than rule-based alternatives.

</details>


### [599] [Spotting Setting-Related UI Display Bugs in Android Apps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04120)
*Huaxun Huang,Wu Liu,Jiahao Gu,Rongxin Wu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文针对Android应用中系统设置引发的UI显示错误（SUD bug），通过实证研究总结出常见的意外适配模式，并基于这些模式开发了自动化检测工具SUDFinder。该工具通过注入测试活动渲染UI页面的XML配置文件实现高覆盖率测试。在29个开源应用上评估发现98个新bug，精确率0.76，其中67个已确认、37个已修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动检测SUD bug的方法存在漏报（假阴性）问题，原因在于对应用组件应如何适应不同系统设置缺乏完整理解。需要更系统的实证研究来揭示SUD bug的常见模式，从而构建更准确、覆盖率更高的测试工具。

Method: 首先通过实证研究识别导致SUD bug的意外适配模式，将这些模式作为测试预言。然后开发SUDFinder工具，通过注入测试活动来可视化渲染每个UI页面的XML配置文件，以此保证测试覆盖率。

Result: 在29个F-Droid开源应用上评估，成功识别98个此前未知的SUD bug，精确率0.76。其中67个已获开发者确认，37个已被修复。

Conclusion: 基于实证研究得出的适配模式可以显著提升SUD bug检测效果，SUDFinder在真实应用中展现了有效性和实用性，有助于改善Android应用的UI适配质量。

Abstract: Android provides a wide range of system settings that allow users to control the runtime behaviors of apps, such as screen rotation and UI display. However, setting-related bugs occur when developers do not fully align their apps with the extensive range of system settings that users can define. These bugs can commonly affect apps' UI, causing setting-related UI display (SUD) bugs that negatively impact user experience. While existing research has explored automated detection of SUD bugs, these approaches often suffer from false negatives. This limitation stems from an incomplete understanding of how app components should adapt UI elements to diverse system settings. To address this gap, we conducted an empirical study to identify common patterns of unexpected setting adaptations that result in SUD bugs. These patterns then served as the test oracle for our proposed automated tool, SUDFinder. To ensure the test coverage, SUDFinder injects a test activity to visually render the XML configuration files of each UI page. We evaluated SUDFinder on 29 popular, open-source apps on F-Droid and found that it effectively identifies 98 previously unknown SUD bugs, achieving a precision of 0.76. So far, 67 have been confirmed and 37 have been fixed by the app developers.

</details>


### [600] [Toward the Right Analytical Model and System Software for Autonomous Driving Systems: Open Problems and Research Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04129)
*Atsushi Yano,Takuya Azumi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文综述了自动驾驶系统中时序正确性的分析模型与系统软件两方面工作，沿着五个维度（时序约束单元、时序指标、资源模型、执行时间可变性、安全集成）识别了现有研究缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶系统包含多速率、异步传感器流和复杂回调/节点/中间件图，时序正确性不能用单个任务执行时间或截止时间刻画；同时高性能处理器引入执行时间可变性，需要分析模型与系统软件来保障安全。

Method: 对实时系统研究（周期/零星任务、DAG、流水线、混合关键性、端到端延迟、数据新鲜度、概率时序等）和自动驾驶中间件（Autoware、ROS 2等）的系统软件实现进行综述，沿五个维度分析差距。

Result: 识别了现有工作在时序约束单元、时序指标、资源模型、执行时间可变性、安全集成五个维度的未解决问题。

Conclusion: 自动驾驶时序正确性需要结合端到端因果链分析、概率时序建模与安全关键系统的故障安全机制，现有分析模型与系统软件实现之间存在显著差距。

Abstract: Autonomous driving (AD) systems continuously transform multi-rate and asynchronous sensor streams into vehicle actuation through graphs of callbacks, nodes, and middleware components. In such systems, temporal correctness cannot be characterized by the execution time or deadline of an individual task alone: localization and perception chains run in parallel, fuse data with different timestamps, converge at planning, and propagate through control to actuation. Moreover, the demand for high processing capability places AD systems on high-performance processors with multicore parallelism and GPU acceleration, where execution times vary strongly with the input scene, hardware state, and co-running work. Rare deadline misses at runtime therefore cannot be ruled out, and safety is preserved through fail-safe mechanisms such as the minimal-risk maneuver (MRM). This raises a two-sided question: what analytical models are needed to reason about timing in AD systems, and what system software is needed to realize, observe, and enforce those models on real platforms? On the analytical side, real-time research has evolved from periodic/sporadic tasks, directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), pipelines, mixed-criticality systems, and timer-/event-driven models toward end-to-end latency along cause-effect chains, data freshness, timing disparity, probabilistic timing, highest-criticality fail-safe operation, and early deadline-miss detection. On the system-software side, AD stacks and middleware, such as Autoware and ROS~2, expose both the opportunities and limitations of implementing analyzable timing behavior through executors, communication layers, tracing tools, and evaluation frameworks. This paper surveys these two lines of work and identifies the remaining gaps along five dimensions: units of timing constraints, timing metrics, resource models, execution-time variability, and safety integration...

</details>


### [601] [How to Value Open Source Contributions? An Institutional Perspective from CERN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04202)
*Julie Skoven Hinge,Micha Moskovic,Axel Naumann,Noemi Calace,Andrzej Wąsowski*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套系统评估组织对开源软件贡献规模与影响的方法论，结合Software Heritage数据、使用指标、依赖分析、经济估值模型和访谈，并以CERN为案例验证，识别出超过600万次提交和5万多个项目。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以全面衡量组织对开源软件的贡献规模和实际影响，需要一个系统性的评估框架。

Method: 整合Software Heritage的归档数据、使用指标、依赖分析、经济估值模型及访谈，形成多维度评估方法论。

Result: 在CERN案例中识别出超过600万次提交、5万多个项目，并突出了CERN主导的最具影响力项目。

Conclusion: 该方法论不仅适用于CERN，还可以作为其他组织评估自身开源贡献的可复用框架。

Abstract: We present a methodology to systematically assess the scale and impact of an organization's contributions to open source software (OSS). The methodology combines the archival data of Software Heritage with usage metrics, dependency analysis, economic valuation models, and interviews to comprehensively understand institutional OSS involvement. We then apply the methodology to the European Organisation for Nuclear Physics (CERN). Despite using mostly commit data, we obtain a thorough overview of CERN's OSS engagement. We identify over six million commits made to over 50,000 projects and highlight the most impactful projects led by CERN. Beyond CERN, the methodology offers a reusable framework for organizations seeking to measure and evaluate their OSS contributions.

</details>


### [602] [An Evaluation of Role-Based Multi-Agent Code Generation on Repository-Scale Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04212)
*Benedetta Donato,Noah Hagar-Dent,Aaron Worsnop,Leonardo Mariani,Valerio Terragni*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文研究了基于角色的多智能体代码生成方法，在12个Java仓库上评估发现该方法生成的代码比单LLM更接近开发者代码，但仍与人类实现存在差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了将LLM从小型编程任务扩展到仓库级代码生成，提升其在复杂软件项目中的实用性。

Method: 采用基于角色的多智能体代码生成方法，在12个Java仓库上进行评估，通过比较代码相似度来衡量效果。

Result: 基于角色的多智能体方法生成的代码比单个LLM更接近开发者编写的代码，但始终与人类实现存在差距。

Conclusion: 多智能体协作能在一定程度上提升代码生成质量，但尚未达到人类开发者的水平，仍有改进空间。

Abstract: Role-based multiagent code generation aims to make LLMs more effective on repository-scale problems, moving beyond small programming tasks. We evaluate this approach on 12 Java repositories, finding greater similarity to developer code than single LLMs, but a persistent gap from human implementations.

</details>


### [603] [Teaching Code LLMs to Reason with Intermediate Formal Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04232)
*Minh Le-Anh,Cuong Chi Le,Tien N. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SpecCoder框架，通过从验证过的参考程序、行为变异体和多轮规范精化轨迹中学习，生成可执行的检查点规范（在程序内部点插入断言）。实验表明，在HumanExec基准上，SpecCoder显著提升了规范质量，并改善了下游的正确性推理和程序修复任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于LLM的方法主要推断整个程序的前置/后置条件，忽略了程序员在推理算法时依赖的中间语义承诺。同时，直接提示LLM生成的断言往往存在语法无效、过于琐碎或无法拒绝行为改变缺陷的问题。

Method: 提出SpecCoder框架，这是一种验证引导的CodeLLM训练方法，从已验证的参考程序、行为改变变异体以及多轮规范精化轨迹中学习。通过选择能通过正确执行但拒绝错误执行的规范，将规范从被动注释转化为可执行证据。

Result: 在HumanExec基准上，SpecCoder在Qwen2.5-Coder模型上，内联规范正确性提升最高达55.8%，完备性提升最高达358.1%，可执行断言有效性提升最高达26.6%。这些提升进一步转化为下游正确性推理和修复任务上的改进。

Conclusion: 可执行的检查点规范能够为可靠的验证提供细粒度证据，SpecCoder通过验证引导的训练框架有效提升了规范生成质量，并带来了下游任务的收益。

Abstract: Unlike natural-language specifications, executable formal specifications provide machine-checkable constraints for verifying, debugging, and repairing code. However, writing such specifications is labor-intensive, and existing LLM-based methods mainly infer whole-program pre/postconditions, missing the intermediate semantic commitments that programmers rely on when reasoning about an algorithm. Our study further shows that prompting current CodeLLMs often produces executable assertions that are syntactically invalid, trivial, or too weak to reject behavior-changing faults. In this paper, we study executable checkpoint specification generation, where assertions are inserted at meaningful internal program points to describe expected intermediate states. We introduce SpecCoder, a verification-guided CodeLLM training framework that learns from validated reference programs, behavior-changing mutants, and multi-turn specification-refinement traces. SpecCoder selects specifications that hold on correct executions while rejecting faulty executions, turning specifications from passive annotations into executable evidence. To evaluate this setting, we introduce HumanExec, a benchmark built from recent Codeforces competitive programming problems with test suites, reference solutions, and human buggy submissions, supporting three tasks: specification generation, program correctness checking, and program repair. Experiments on HumanExec show that SpecCoder substantially improves checkpoint-specification quality over base CodeLLMs. Across Qwen2.5-Coder models, SpecCoder improves inline-specification correctness by up to 55.8%, completeness by up to 358.1%, and executable assertion validity by up to 26.6%. These gains further translate to downstream correctness reasoning and repair, showing that executable checkpoints provide fine-grained evidence for reliable verification.

</details>


### [604] [Using OAI Overlay to Enhance REST API Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04325)
*Omur Sahin,Man Zhang,Alexander Poth,Olsi Rrjolli,Andreas Faes,Piyun Teng,Kaiming Xue,Wenjuan Ma,Andrea Arcuri*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文针对REST API黑盒模糊测试中输入数据不足的问题，提出利用OpenAPI Overlay标准来提供额外测试数据，并在EvoMaster工具中实现了原生支持。通过来自5个国家5家企业（含两家财富500强）的工业级API实验验证了该方案的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: REST API测试中，仅依赖OpenAPI schema信息进行黑盒测试不够充分，测试者需要提供额外输入数据。但不同模糊测试工具各自定义专属格式会造成供应商锁定和认知负担，亟需一个统一标准来解决此问题。

Method: 采用OpenAPI Initiative (OAI) 的Overlay标准，允许测试者在Overlay文件中以"examples"条目形式提供输入数据，并扩展了开源模糊测试工具EvoMaster以原生支持Overlay文件加载与解析。

Result: 在来自比利时、中国、德国、土耳其等5个国家的5家企业（含两家财富500强和一家3人初创公司）的工业级API上进行实验，结果表明Overlay是一种可行的解决方案，能够有效增强REST API的黑盒模糊测试能力。

Conclusion: Overlay标准能够有效解决REST API黑盒测试中输入数据不足的问题，避免了供应商锁定，降低了测试者的认知负担，具有实际工业应用价值。

Abstract: REST APIs are widely used in industry. Therefore, a lot of research has been focused on how to automatically generate test cases for REST APIs, with few different open-source fuzzers existing in the literature. For a thorough testing, especially in black-box scenarios, just relying on the information provided in the OpenAPI schemas is not enough. Testers typically need to provide extra input data to help steer the fuzzers in the right direction. Dedicated formats specific to each different fuzzer would work, but they would create a vendor lock-in, as well as increasing cognitive load. The OpenAPI Initiative (OAI) standard Overlay might be a solution to this problem. Such standard enables to define transformations on the OpenAPI schemas, where testers can provide input data in Overlay files where such data is provided as ``examples'' entries. In this paper, we have extended the state-of-the-art fuzzer EvoMaster to support Overlay files natively. Experiments are carried out in industry on five APIs from five enterprises from around the world (e.g., Belgium, China, Germany and Türkiye), including two Fortune500 enterprises as well as a 3-man startup. Our industrial results show that Overlay is a viable solution to better enable black-box fuzzing of REST APIs in industry.

</details>


### [605] [A Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Detecting and Resolving Pragmatic Ambiguities in Natural Language Requirements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04436)
*Pavithra PM Nair,Preethu Rose Anish*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用检索增强生成技术，结合不同领域知识库来检测和消解自然语言需求中语用歧义的方法，并在四个大语言模型上进行了初步验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言需求中的语用歧义（因利益相关者领域知识不同导致的理解差异）会严重影响软件开发的沟通效率和质量，现有方法对此类歧义的检测与消解能力不足。

Method: 采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术，构建新手、中级、专家三级领域知识库模拟不同利益相关者，通过对比推理检测语用歧义；利用专家知识库生成候选消歧需求，最后由需求分析师验证。

Result: 在PURE数据集上的评估中，GPT-4o-mini在检测任务上取得最高宏平均召回率（0.75）和F2分数（0.75）；消解任务中，GPT-4o-mini获得最高相关性评分，Mistral-7B在清晰度和一致性上表现最佳。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效检测语用歧义并生成相关、清晰且一致的候选消歧需求，证明了RAG技术结合多级知识库在解决语用歧义问题上的潜力。

Abstract: Natural language requirements (NLRs) are essential for bridging communication gaps among diverse stakeholders in software development. However, the inherent ambiguity in NLRs can pose significant challenges. In particular, some requirements may be misinterpreted due to varying contextual knowledge and domain-specific expectations of the stakeholders, a phenomenon known as pragmatic ambiguity. This paper presents an approach for detecting and resolving pragmatic ambiguities in NLRs. The approach leverages retrieval-augmented generation techniques with novice, intermediate, and expert domain knowledge bases to simulate stakeholders with varying domain expertise and detect discrepancies in requirement interpretation. Candidate disambiguated requirements are generated using the expert domain knowledge base, with final validation by a requirements analyst required to ensure alignment with the intended functionality. We evaluate the approach on two requirements specification documents from the PUblic REquirements dataset, using four large language models: GPT-4o-mini, Mistral-7B, Llama-3.1-8B, and Qwen2.5-7B. Detection performance is assessed using macro-averaged accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and F2 scores. The resolution quality of the candidate disambiguated requirements is measured through human evaluation of relevance, clarity, and consistency. In this initial evaluation, results show that the proposed approach can detect pragmatic ambiguities and produce candidate disambiguated requirements that are relevant, clear, and consistent with the intended system functionality. Among the evaluated models, GPT-4o-mini achieved the highest macro-averaged recall (0.75) and F2 score (0.75) for pragmatic ambiguity detection. In the resolution task, GPT-4o-mini received the highest relevance scores from human evaluators, while Mistral-7B achieved the highest scores for clarity and consistency.

</details>


### [606] [From Regulation to Requirements: An Automated Requirement Derivation and Explanation Pipeline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04448)
*Pavithra PM Nair,Preethu Rose Anish*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个自动化管道，能从法规文档（如GDPR和EU AI Act）中识别要求性条款并推导出系统无关的软件需求，附带可追溯的普通语言解释，通过Reg2Req工具实现并验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需求工程师将复杂的法律文本转化为可操作的软件需求这一过程目前仍 largely manual and error-prone，亟需自动化方法支撑。

Method: 构建regulation-to-requirements pipeline，包含要求性条款识别、系统无关需求推导、普通语言解释生成等步骤，并实现为Reg2Req工具，支持需求分类、用例生成、交叉引用分析等功能。

Result: 在GDPR（398条）和EU AI Act（574条）上，条款识别F1分别为0.82和0.78；人工评估需求完整性4.60/4.45、正确性3.74/3.54、解释清晰度接近满分4.92/4.94；用户研究表明解释显著提升理解与行动信心。

Conclusion: 该管道能有效自动化法规到需求的转换过程，解释功能对实践者理解需求有显著帮助，所有参与者均愿意将Reg2Req作为需求推导的起点。

Abstract: Ensuring software compliance with regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Artificial Intelligence Act (EU AI Act) poses a significant challenge, as requirements engineers must translate complex legal text into actionable software requirements - a process that remains largely manual and error-prone in practice. We present an automated regulation-to-requirements pipeline that identifies requirement-bearing clauses in regulatory documents and derives system-agnostic software requirements, accompanied by plain-language explanations, traceable to their legal sources. We evaluate the pipeline on the full clause sets of the GDPR (398 clauses) and the EU AI Act (574 clauses). For requirement-bearing clause identification, the approach achieves macro-averaged F1 scores of 0.82 and 0.78, respectively, outperforming a SetFit-based baseline. Human evaluation shows high completeness (4.60 and 4.45) and correctness (3.74 and 3.54) of derived requirements, while explanation clarity scores are near-ceiling (4.92 and 4.94) on a 1-5 scale. We implement the approach in Reg2Req, a publicly released tool that further supports requirement classification, use case seeding, cross-reference analysis, definition indexing, and a traceability matrix to operationalize regulatory compliance in practice. A user study with 25 practitioners shows that the plain-language explanations significantly improve comprehension of derived requirements and confidence in acting on them (p < 0.001), and that all participants would use Reg2Req as a starting point for deriving software requirements from a regulation.

</details>


### [607] [Correct but Slow: An Empirical Study of the GPU Kernel Evaluation Gap in Modern Domain-Specific Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04454)
*Tingxi Li,Ravishka Rathnasuriya,Wei Yang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了GPU DSL（如Triton和TileLang）编写的内核在功能正确但性能低下的问题。通过22个内核在NVIDIA A100和GH200上的实验，发现正确性评估会遗漏超300倍慢速的内核，提出了两种轻量级检测标准（库相对效率和屋顶线利用率）来识别这类低效内核。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的DSL内核评估仅依赖参考值进行数值验证来确保正确性，但无法衡量内核作为库替代品的替换质量——一个功能正确的内核可能远低于被替代的优化库算子的吞吐量。这种正确性-性能差距可能导致用户部署了功能正确但效率极低的内核。

Method: 在NVIDIA A100和GH200 GPU上，使用来自5类算子的22个Triton和TileLang内核，通过正确性评估、性能分析、缺陷归因和轻量级检测标准（库相对效率和屋顶线利用率）进行系统性研究。

Result: （1）正确性评估会遗漏严重性能问题，如TileLang LayerNorm内核通过了正确性检查但比PyTorch基线慢300倍以上。（2）不同内核家族的慢速原因不同：标准化和规约类主要是可修复的编写缺陷（如顺序规约、不必要类型转换），而卷积和GEMM经优化后仍有由于代码生成和自动调优覆盖限制导致的残余差距。（3）两种轻量级检查（库相对效率和屋顶线利用率）可互补筛选，能标记所有功能正确但低效的内核，并区分可修复缺陷与结构性问题。

Conclusion: 仅靠正确性验证不足以评估DSL内核作为库替代品的质量，需要引入基于性能的筛选标准来发现并区分可修复的编写缺陷和结构性的代码生成限制。

Abstract: Modern GPU domain-specific languages (DSLs), such as Triton and TileLang, are increasingly used to implement specialized deep-learning kernels and as target languages for automated kernel-generation systems.
