We first confirm that the phenomenon holds under the original setup, which uses earlier-generation LLMs, restrictive prompting and constrained decoding settings. We subsequently introduce a series of extensions to investigate the underlying causes of the noise effect, examining the authors' original design choices including the use of different models, instruction prompting, and relaxed output length constraints. Across these ablations, the Power-of-Noise pattern proves highly sensitive to inference configuration: it can appear, weaken, or disappear under small changes to prompt formulation and decoding limits. Combined with our error analysis, which shows substantial contributions from truncation and malformed generations, this variance indicates that the original effect cannot be robustly confirmed as a general benefit of noisy retrieval under these experimental conditions. More broadly, our work highlights the importance of carefully scrutinizing inference design in retrieval-augmented generation systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/ina0105/The-Power-of-Noise-Reproduction.

</details>


### [643] [Next-Gen Sponsored Search: Crafting the Perfect Query with Inventory-Aware RAG (InvAwr-RAG) Based GenAI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03880)
*Md Omar Faruk Rokon,Weizhi Du,Zhaodong Wang,Musen Wen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出InvAwr-RAG模型，通过结合语义检索和实时库存数据，为搜索查询动态生成相关广告关键词，显著提升广告填充率68%，平衡了相关性与用户体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大量搜索查询无法匹配到任何赞助广告，导致广告收入和用户参与度损失。现有方法面临关键词库庞大、意图模糊和主题多样性等挑战。

Method: 提出Inventory-Aware RAG-based Generative AI模型(InvAwr-RAG)，整合高级语义检索和实时库存数据，结合动态生成的查询与历史成功查询，多样化重写查询以提升相关性和用户参与度。

Result: 初步结果显示填充率提升68%，相关性指标保持平衡，表明有显著的广告收入增长潜力。

Conclusion: InvAwr-RAG模型在动态查询优化方面树立了新标准，显著提升了广告相关性、广告商投资回报率和Walmart数字平台的用户体验。

Abstract: Sponsored search plays a crucial role in e-commerce revenue generation, where advertisers strategically bid on keywords to capture the attention of users through relevant search queries. However, the process of identifying pertinent keywords for a given query presents significant challenges because of a vast and evolving keyword landscape, ambiguous intentions, and topic diversity. This paper highlights an opportunity for to earn a considerable amount of Ads revenue and user engagement where a significant proportion of queries fail to retrieve any sponsored ads. To utilize this opportunity, we introduce the Inventory-Aware RAG-based Generative AI model (InvAwr-RAG), which integrates advanced semantic retrieval and real-time inventory data. This model combines dynamically generated and historically successful queries to align with available inventory and ad campaigns while diversifying rewritten queries to enhance relevance and user engagement. Preliminary results show a significant 68% increase in fill rate and balanced relevance metrics, indicating a strong potential for increased ad revenue. The InvAwr-RAG model sets a new standard in dynamic query optimization, significantly improving ad relevancy, advertiser ROI, and user experience on Walmart's digital platform.

</details>


### [644] [Enhancement of E-commerce Sponsored Search Relevancy with LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03886)
*Md Omar Faruk Rokon,Andrei Simion,Weizhi Du,Musen Wen,Hong Yao,Kuang-chih Lee*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出基于LLAMA2 7B模型和LoRA微调的广告相关性模型，在电商搜索广告中实现89.43%的准确率，优于GPT-4等先进模型，显著提升了搜索精度、成本效率和操作隐私性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电商搜索广告中关键词与查询匹配面临关键词空间庞大、意图模糊、多语言多主题等挑战，现有方法在精准度和效率上存在不足，亟需更优的广告相关性模型来提升用户满意度和业务效益。

Method: 基于LLAMA2 7B预训练大语言模型，采用Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)进行高效微调，构建了查询-广告标题三分类器（相关、部分相关、不相关），在电商赞助搜索大规模数据集上训练。

Result: 微调模型在测试集上达到89.43%的准确率，超越了基线模型和GPT-4等先进语言模型，同时实现了更优的成本效率和操作隐私性。

Conclusion: LoRA+LLAMA2的适配策略成功将通用大语言模型定制化为电商搜索场景，在精度、成本和隐私三大关键维度取得突破，为大型电商平台（如Walmart.com）的搜索广告系统提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Sponsored search plays a crucial role as a revenue stream for search engines, wherein advertisers competitively bid on keywords that align with the users' search queries. The task of matching relevant keywords to these queries is complicated by the vast and ever-evolving space of keywords, the ambiguity of user and advertiser intentions, and the wide range of topics and languages involved. Consequently, ensuring that ads are pertinent to user queries presents significant challenges. In the fast-paced world of e-commerce, the accuracy of sponsored search results is vital for boosting user satisfaction and optimizing business operations. This paper presents the development of an advanced Ad Relevance Model within a sponsored search framework, utilizing the power of a pretrained large language model. We detail a pioneering adaptation of the LLAMA2 7B model through Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), which markedly enhances search precision and operational efficiency, thus opening new avenues for improving user interactions in extensive online marketplaces such as Walmart.com. We introduce a novel query and ad title classifier, which discerns the relevance of search interactions across three categories: Relevant, Partially Relevant, and Irrelevant. Our approach involved adapting the pretrained model specifically for the e-commerce sponsored search context, training it on a large dataset. The fine-tuned model demonstrated a marked improvement in ad relevance accuracy, achieving 89.43% accuracy on a comprehensive test dataset -- outperforming both the baseline model and other advanced language models like GPT-4. The integration of LoRA with the based model represents a significant stride in customizing language models for e-commerce applications, resulting in enhanced search accuracy, cost efficiency, and operational privacy -- a triad essential for the modern digital marketplace.

</details>


### [645] [Beyond Item Order: Temporal Gap Tokenization for Generative Recommendation with Semantic IDs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03918)
*Chengkai Huang,Tianqi Gao,Hongtao Huang,Quan Z. Sheng,Lina Yao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出ChronoSID，一种轻量级时间增强框架，通过注入时间信号到语义ID生成式推荐中，解决现有模型忽略交互时间间隔的问题。包括时间感知场感知掩码自编码（TA-FAMAE）和将历史交互间隔离散化为log尺度间隔令牌两种策略，在Amazon基准测试上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义ID生成式推荐方法将用户历史建模为静态物品标识序列，忽略了连续交互之间的时间间隔。然而，交互间隔蕴含着兴趣持续性和偏好漂移的重要信息，时间盲区限制了模型捕捉用户动态兴趣的能力。

Method: 1) 时间感知场感知掩码自编码（TA-FAMAE）：在物品表示学习中引入辅助的时间间隔预测目标。2) 将历史交互间隔离散化为log尺度间隔令牌，并将其与语义ID元组交错拼接，作为序列到序列生成器的编码器输入。

Result: 在Amazon评论数据集上，ChronoSID一致优于ReSID及其他生成式推荐基线方法。消融实验验证了两个时间组件的贡献，诊断分析表明在长间隔场景下（用户兴趣更易漂移）增益更为明显。

Conclusion: ChronoSID通过轻量级的时间增强，有效提升了语义ID生成式推荐的性能，尤其在用户兴趣漂移的长间隔场景下优势显著，证明了时间信号在序列推荐中的重要性。

Abstract: Semantic-ID-based generative recommendation has recently emerged as a scalable paradigm for sequential recommendation, where each item is represented by a compact sequence of discrete codes and next-item prediction is formulated as code generation. Existing methods, however, typically construct user histories as sequences of static item identifiers, leaving the elapsed time between consecutive interactions outside the generative input. This temporal blindness is problematic because inter-interaction gaps provide useful cues about interest continuity and preference drift. In this paper, we propose ChronoSID, a lightweight temporal augmentation framework for semantic-ID-based generative recommendation. ChronoSID injects temporal signals into the standard three-stage semantic-ID pipeline from two complementary perspectives. First, we introduce Time-Aware Field-Aware Masked Auto-Encoding (TA-FAMAE), which regularizes item representation learning with an auxiliary time-gap prediction objective. Second, we discretize historical interaction intervals into fixed log-scale gap tokens and interleave them with semantic ID tuples as the encoder input of the sequence-to sequence generator. This design preserves the compact SID generation paradigm while enabling the model to capture time-aware transition patterns. Experiments on Amazon review benchmarks show that ChronoSID consistently improves over ReSID and other competitive generative recommendation baselines. Ablation studies further verify the contribution of both temporal components, and diagnostic analyses show clearer gains under long-gap scenarios where user interests are more likely to drift.

</details>


### [646] [Patient-Conditioned Dual Hypergraph Reasoning for Auditable Traditional Chinese Medicine Prescription Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04025)
*Weizhi Nie,Shaojin Bai,Weijie Wang,Yuting Su*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一种患者条件双重超图框架，用于可审计的中医处方支持，通过动态加权实现个性化辨证论治和药剂量推荐，同时保留病例级可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接使用语言模型生成处方难以审计，且静态中医知识资源无法为个体患者确定哪些诊断和处方关系应被强调，需要一种既能个性化又具有可审计性的处方支持方法。

Method: 构建两个超图：第一个超图组织症状、舌脉等临床证据用于辨证推理；第二个超图组织证候、治疗、疾病背景、草药、检索和剂量先验证据用于处方构建。两个超图均由患者表征动态加权，实现个性化路径激活。

Result: 在TCM-SD上，辨证超图使MacBERT准确率达0.8297，macro-F1为0.3288；在TCM-BEST4SDT上，处方超图平均Herb-F1为0.3111，完整流水线达0.3074；50例CAP审计显示实用审查潜力。

Conclusion: 动态超图框架在个性化辨证和处方推荐上表现良好，兼顾可审计性，但需进一步的前瞻性剂量安全验证。

Abstract: Traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) prescription support requires patient-specific reasoning from clinical narratives to syndromes, treatment principles, herbs, and doses. Direct language-model generation can produce fluent prescriptions, but its decisions are difficult to audit against explicit clinical evidence. Static TCM knowledge resources provide useful priors, but they cannot determine which diagnostic and prescription relations should be emphasized for an individual patient. We propose a patient-conditioned dual hypergraph framework for auditable TCM prescription support. The first hypergraph organizes symptom, tongue, pulse, and other clinical evidence around syndrome and treatment-principle reasoning. The second hypergraph organizes syndrome, treatment, disease-context, herb, retrieval, and dose-prior evidence for prescription construction. Unlike static knowledge graphs or fixed hypergraphs, both hypergraphs are dynamically weighted by the patient representation. This design enables individualized activation of diagnostic and prescription paths, supporting personalized syndrome differentiation and herb-dose recommendation while preserving case-level auditability. Experiments on TCM-SD show that dynamic weighting in the first hypergraph improves MacBERT syndrome differentiation to 0.8297 accuracy and 0.3288 macro-F1. On TCM-BEST4SDT, the second hypergraph achieves the best mean Herb-F1 of 0.3111 across three seeds, and the full connected pipeline reaches 0.3074 Herb-F1, close to the oracle setting. A 50-case real-world CAP audit further suggests practical review potential, while highlighting the need for prospective dose-safety validation.

</details>


### [647] [Claim2Source at CheckThat! 2026: Improving Multilingual Scientific Claim-Source Retrieval with Verification-based Re-Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04043)
*Tobias Schreieder,Harsh Khandelwal,Yu-Ling Zhong,Michael Färber*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多阶段检索框架，用于多语言科学声明的来源检索，通过结构化表示和渐进式候选精炼，在CheckThat! 2026竞赛中取得第一名（MRR@5达0.7628）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体上的科学声明与原始论文之间在语言、措辞和细节层面存在差异，导致声明与证据之间的连接薄弱，亟需有效的跨语言科学声明-来源检索方法。

Method: 提出多阶段检索框架：1）构建结构化声明表示和元数据增强的来源表示；2）采用双语声明表示和语言特异性稠密检索模型；3）第一阶段生成候选来源池；4）基于相似性的重排序；5）基于验证信号的重排序以确定最佳支持来源。

Result: 在英语、德语和法语声明上，平均MRR@5达到0.7628，在CheckThat! 2026排行榜上排名第一。

Conclusion: 多阶段检索框架能有效缓解跨语言声明-来源匹配中的语义鸿沟问题，验证信号在重排序阶段发挥了关键作用。

Abstract: Multilingual scientific claim-source retrieval aims to identify the scientific publication supporting a claim shared on social media. This task is challenging because claims often differ from source publications in terms of language, wording, and level of detail, which weakens the connection between claims and their underlying evidence. In this paper, we present our approach for the CheckThat! 2026 Lab Task 1: Source Retrieval for Scientific Web Claims. We propose a multi-stage retrieval framework for multilingual scientific claim-source retrieval that combines structured claim and source representations with progressive candidate refinement. To address multilingual retrieval challenges, the framework employs bilingual claim representations, metadata-enhanced source representations, and language-specific adaptation of dense retrieval models. Building on this setup, a first-stage retriever generates an initial pool of candidate sources, after which similarity-based re-ranking improves the ranking of highly relevant sources and verification-based re-ranking identifies the candidate source that best supports the claim using verification signals. Our approach achieves an average MRR@5 score of 0.7628 across English, German, and French claims, ranking first on the CheckThat! 2026 leaderboard.

</details>


### [648] [UniSGR: Unified Framework for Semantic ID Generation and Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04068)
*Jiawei Sun,Jun Yang,Ziyue Guo,Dongyue Xu,Jianan Yan,Lifang Deng,Xiaoyi Zeng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: UniSGR 提出了一种统一框架，通过两阶段训练（多场景预训练+场景特定对齐）和 STARK 推理策略，解决生成式检索在细粒度多目标排序中的不足，并在大规模电商平台验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生成式检索方法在处理细粒度多目标排序时仍存在局限，无法很好地满足电商平台对多场景、多目标的排序需求。

Method: 采用两阶段训练范式：多场景预训练 + 场景特定对齐阶段（联合优化 VA-PMTP 和统一多目标排序模块）；引入 Task-Aware Tokens (TAT) 和 Funnel-Aware Contrastive Learning；提出 STARK 推理策略优化 KV 缓存。

Result: 在大规模电商平台的离线实验中，UniSGR 展示了较好的有效性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: UniSGR 通过语义 ID 生成与排序的统一框架，有效解决了生成式检索在多目标排序中的问题，为工业级推荐系统提供了可行的方案。

Abstract: Recommendation systems play a pivotal role in modern e-commerce platforms. While generative retrieval has emerged as a promising paradigm for alleviating the limitations of multi-stage cascade architectures, existing methods still struggle with fine-grained multi-objective ranking. To bridge this gap, we propose UniSGR, a Unified framework for Semantic ID Generation and Ranking. UniSGR adopts a two-stage training paradigm: a multi-scenario pre-training stage that learns from mixed business-scenario data, followed by a scenario-specific alignment stage that jointly optimizes Value-Aware Parallel Multi-Token Prediction (VA-PMTP) and a unified multi-objective ranking module. To better align generation with downstream ranking, we introduce Task-Aware Tokens (TAT) guided by Funnel-Aware Contrastive Learning. Furthermore, we propose Semantic Tree Attention with Reorganized KV cache (STARK), an inference strategy that removes key efficiency bottlenecks in conventional beam search. Extensive offline experiments on a large-scale e-commerce platform demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of UniSGR.

</details>


### [649] [Submitted and Diagnostic Analysis of Full-Text Temporal Retrieval for LongEval-Sci](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04088)
*Yingdong Yang,Haijian Wu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: LongEval-Sci评估科学检索在语料库变化下的表现，研究发现全文检索是最强基础，时间整合能提升纵向效果，引用特征无明显额外增益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学文献检索面临语料库随时间累积变化（Collection Change）的挑战，现有检索系统对新语料表现良好，但随着文档积累，系统在旧语料上的可用性会下降。本文旨在系统评估不同检索方法在这种动态环境下的表现。

Method: 基于PyTerrier BM25和Qwen3稠密检索基线，对比了全文BM25、加法变体、路由器变体、时间全文检索、时间+引用检索、RM3查询扩展、交叉编码器重排序以及倒数秩融合（RRF）等多种方法。在官方DCTR评估和内部快照诊断上进行测试。

Result: 时间化全文运行在官方评估中表现最佳（三个快照nDCG@10分别为0.285、0.267、0.180），将快照3相对变化从0.481降至0.368。内部诊断中全文BM25是最强单一开发检索器（nDCG@10=0.3302），RRF获得最佳深度召回（Recall@1000=0.9667）。引用特征与纯时间变体表现相当但无额外增益。

Conclusion: 全文检索是最强基础，时间整合能提升官方纵向效果，引用证据仍需更干净的消融和校准。此外还进行了基于摄入速度和陈旧覆盖漂移的定性周级IR系统更新监测分析。

Abstract: LongEval-Sci evaluates scientific retrieval under collection change, where a system should be effective on the current corpus and remain usable as documents accumulate over time. This paper reports both official Task 1 results and development diagnostics for LongEval-Sci 2026. We compare the official PyTerrier BM25 and Qwen3 dense baselines with full-text BM25, additive and router variants, temporal full-text retrieval, temporal+citation retrieval, RM3 query expansion, cross-encoder reranking, and reciprocal rank fusion (RRF). In the official DCTR evaluation, the temporalized full-text runs are our strongest submissions: FT BM25+temporal and FT BM25+temporal+citation obtain the best ARP on all three snapshots (0.285, 0.267, and 0.180 nDCG@10) and reduce snapshot-3 relative change from 0.481 for the BM25 pivot to 0.368. Citation features match the temporal-only variant but do not provide a measurable additional gain in the official summary. Our internal snapshot-1 diagnostics show a complementary pattern: full-text BM25 is the strongest single development retriever (DCTR nDCG@10 = 0.3302, MAP = 0.2853), RRF gives the best deep recall (Recall@1000 = 0.9667), and some uncalibrated overlays can sharply degrade top-rank quality. We therefore conclude that full-text retrieval is the strongest foundation, temporal integration can improve official longitudinal effectiveness when applied to that foundation, and citation evidence still requires cleaner ablation and calibration. Beyond ranking, we also report a qualitative weekly IR-system update-monitoring analysis based on ingestion velocity and stale-coverage drift.

</details>


### [650] [LBR: Towards Mitigating Length Bias in Large Language Models for Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04270)
*Hongchen Li,Bohao Wang,Jingbang Chen,Weiqin Yang,Hang Pan,Bingde Hu,Can Wang,Jiawei Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 论文发现LLM-based推荐系统存在"长度偏差"问题：长物品描述在输入侧占据更多注意力，在输出侧因似然求和而被不公平对待。提出LBR框架，通过长度感知注意力校准和有效信息长度归一化来缓解此偏差，在三个Amazon数据集上NDCG@5平均提升16.82%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推荐系统使用文本描述表示物品，但不同长度描述导致系统性的输入/输出侧偏差，这个问题被广泛忽视。

Method: 提出LBR框架：(1) 输入侧：长度感知注意力校准，在注意力logits中加入长度相关偏移量；(2) 输出侧：有效信息长度归一化，利用前缀树分支结构替代简单token计数。

Result: 在三个Amazon数据集和两个LLM推荐模型上，LBR有效缓解长度偏差，提升推荐准确率和公平性，NDCG@5平均提升16.82%，额外开销可忽略。

Conclusion: 长度偏差是LLM推荐系统中一个真实且有害的问题，LBR通过轻量级、模型无关的方式同时缓解输入和输出侧偏差，显著提升推荐性能与公平性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently emerged as powerful backbones for recommender systems by reformulating recommendation as a token-level generation task. Despite their promise, we identify a pervasive yet underexplored issue: $\textit{Length Bias}$. Because items are represented by textual descriptions of varying lengths, LLM-based recommenders can be systematically biased in two ways. On the input side, longer item descriptions occupy more tokens in the context and thus receive disproportionately large aggregate attention mass during user preference modeling. On the output side, decoding based on summed autoregressive log-likelihood score inherently disfavors long items. Worse still, conventional length normalization can introduce an additional bias and even degrade recommendation performance.
  To address this problem, we propose $\textbf{LBR}$ ($\textbf{L}$ength $\textbf{B}$ias $\textbf{R}$eduction), a lightweight and model-agnostic framework for mitigating length bias in LLM-based recommendation. LBR mitigates input-side bias via Length-Aware Attention Calibration, which incorporates a length-dependent offset into attention logits to neutralize attention skew. For the output side, LBR introduces Effective Information Length Normalization, replacing naive token count with an information-theoretic length surrogate derived from the branching structure of the prefix tree. Extensive experiments on three real-world Amazon datasets and two representative LLM-based recommenders demonstrate that LBR substantially alleviates length bias while consistently improving recommendation accuracy and fairness, with negligible additional training and inference overhead (with an average NDCG@5 gain of 16.82%). The code is available at https://github.com/Void-JackLee/LBR.

</details>


### [651] [Autonomous Information Seeking: A Roadmap for Agentic Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04433)
*Xinyu Lin,Yashar Deldjoo,Sunhao Dai,Honghui Bao,Xiaopeng Ye,Fatemeh Nazary,Wenjie Wang,Tommaso Di Noia,Jun Xu,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文综述了基于大语言模型Agent的推荐系统，提出了以自主性为核心的三范式分类法（Agent辅助推荐、Agent即推荐系统、Agent即用户模拟器），并系统分析了各范式的架构、评估方法及未来挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM Agent快速融入推荐系统，传统静态排序范式正向自主交互范式转变，但该领域缺乏统一的系统性梳理和分类框架，亟需建立体系化的理解基础。

Method: 提出统一的自主性层次分类法，从主动性、上下文感知、交互灵活性和自适应性四个维度组织现有方法；将Agentic推荐系统划分为三个核心范式：Agent辅助推荐、Agent即推荐系统、Agent即用户模拟器；从架构组件（画像、记忆、工具使用、工作流、优化机制）和评估方法（自动化指标、LLM评判、模拟评估）两个维度进行系统分析。

Result: 建立了Agentic推荐系统的统一分类体系，揭示了不同范式在架构设计上的差异；指出了现有评估方法在推理质量、用户体验和系统行为捕捉方面的局限性；识别了轨迹级评估、Agent贡献分析、用户模拟校准等未解决的关键评估问题。

Conclusion: Agentic推荐系统正从静态排名向自主交互演进，未来需要在终身用户建模、上下文抽象、多模态对齐、可控性、可信性、隐私、可扩展性和效率等方面取得突破，以构建更自主、可靠且与人类对齐的推荐Agent。

Abstract: The rapid integration of large language model-based agents into recommender systems has driven a shift from static, ranking-based pipelines toward autonomous and interactive systems that can reason, plan, and act. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of this emerging landscape by introducing a unified taxonomy grounded in the level of autonomy and three core paradigms of agentic recommender systems: agent-assisted recommendation, agent-as-recommender, and agent-as-user-simulator. The autonomy framework organizes existing methods along increasing capabilities in proactivity, context awareness, interaction flexibility, and adaptivity. Building on this framework, the survey analyzes how each paradigm adopts different agentic architectures and how agents enhance key components such as profiles, memory, tool use, workflows, and optimization mechanisms. We further examine evaluation methodologies for agentic recommendation, covering automated metrics, LLM-based judging, and simulation-based assessment, and discuss their limitations in capturing reasoning quality, user experience, and system behavior. Beyond existing evaluation protocols, we further discuss unresolved issues in evaluating agentic recommender systems, including trajectory-level assessment, agent contribution analysis, and calibration of user simulation. Lastly, the survey outlines open challenges in lifelong user modeling, contextual abstraction, multimodal alignment, controllability, trustworthiness, privacy, scalability, and efficiency. Together, these analyses establish a unified foundation for understanding the current progress of agentic recommender systems and highlight promising opportunities for developing more autonomous, reliable, and human-aligned recommendation agents.

</details>


### [652] [Evaluation and Explainability of Unsupervised Scholarly Collaboration Recommendations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04529)
*Md Asaduzzaman Noor,John W. Sheppard,Jason A. Clark*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文比较了三种无监督内容协作推荐方法（TF-IDF、主题模型、嵌入检索），发现在信息受限时，基于主题和嵌入的方法比TF-IDF更稳定，并探讨了两种可解释性视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协作推荐多依赖词法匹配，缺乏对语义相似性和可解释性的系统比较，尤其是在信息受限场景下的表现差异。

Method: 在无监督设置下，使用出版物文本进行协作推荐，比较TF-IDF、LDA/BERTopic（主题模型）和SciBERT+Faiss（嵌入检索）。引入约束设置（移除部分出版重叠），以历史合著关系作为代理标签进行后验评估，并从两类可解释性（内在主题解释与后验语言模型解释）进行分析。

Result: TF-IDF在完全信息下表现最佳，但重叠减少后性能显著下降；主题模型和嵌入方法更稳定，能捕获分布相似性而非仅依赖词法重叠。

Conclusion: 在信息受限场景下，基于主题和嵌入的方法更鲁棒；两类可解释性方法在透明度和可读性之间存在互补权衡。

Abstract: In this paper, we examine unsupervised, content-based collaboration recommendations using publication text in scholarly settings. We compare three families of methods: a TF-IDF baseline, topic-based models (LDA and BERTopic, including clone variants), and embedding-based retrieval using SciBERT with Faiss. To evaluate model behavior beyond simple lexical matching, we introduce a constrained setting where publication overlap between researchers is partially removed while still using historical co-authorship as proxy ground truth for post-hoc evaluation. Results show clear differences across methods. TF-IDF performs best under full information but drops significantly as overlap is reduced. In contrast, topic-based and embedding-based approaches show more stable performance, suggesting they capture broader distributional similarities, rather than relying only on direct lexical overlap. We also examine explainability through two perspectives: intrinsic topic-based explanations and post-hoc, retrieval-based explanations generated using language models. These provide complementary trade-offs between transparency and human readability.

</details>


### [653] [Do All Visual Tokens Matter Equally? Object-Evidence Preserving Token Merging for Vision-Language Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04605)
*Suhyeong Park,Junha Jung,Jungwoo Park,Jaewoo Kang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SaMer是一种目标感知的token合并框架，通过保留目标级证据来压缩多向量视觉-语言检索中的图像侧token，在去除93%以上token的同时提升检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有token压缩方法会移除或塌缩目标/区域级别的视觉证据，影响未来查询token的选择能力。需要一种既能高效压缩又能保留细粒度目标级证据的方法。

Method: 提出SaMer框架，在训练时利用目标标注作为合并先验（避免跨实例混合），将图像侧后投影token合并为K个代表中心点；推理时不需边界框或检测器，仅微调共享投影层，冻结视觉和语言骨干网络。

Result: K=64时去除93%以上图像侧token，ColPali存储压缩16.09倍；在Flickr30K和MSCOCO上R@1提升；优于其他压缩基线，短语级定位能力更强。

Conclusion: 高效的多向量检索不仅依赖于减少token数量，更关键在于保留未来查询token所需选择的目标级证据。目标感知合并优于剪枝或特征池化。

Abstract: Multi-vector vision-language retrieval preserves fine-grained visual evidence through maximum-similarity late interaction, but dense image-side tokens make storage and scoring expensive. Existing token compression methods reduce this cost, yet they can remove or collapse object- and region-level evidence that future query tokens may need to select. We propose SaMer, an object-aware token merging framework that compresses image-side post-projector tokens into $K$ representative centroids while preserving the original late-interaction interface. SaMer uses object annotations only during training as a merge prior to discourage cross-instance mixing, requires no ground-truth bounding boxes or detectors at inference time, and adapts only the shared projection layer with frozen vision and language backbones. With $K=64$, SaMer removes more than 93% of image-side tokens and reduces ColPali storage by $16.09\times$, while improving R@1 on Flickr30K and MSCOCO. These gains arise because object-aware merging preserves query-selectable object evidence that pruning or feature-only pooling can remove or collapse. SaMer also outperforms compression baselines and shows stronger phrase-level grounding, suggesting that efficient multi-vector retrieval depends not only on reducing token count, but on preserving the evidence future query tokens need to select.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [654] [Epistemic Horizon Minority Games: When Abundance Reduces Strategic Value](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02765)
*Faruk Alpay,Levent Sarioglu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出认知视野少数博弈（EHMG），形式化描述了当选项变得可见时其战略价值下降的机制，并证明了若干理论性质，包括势函数约化、单调收敛性、均衡唯一性条件，以及从静态拥堵博弈的不可约性。同时区分了信息的目标价格与总福利损失，分析了不同信号结构的影响，并通过大量实验验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当一项策略、路线或机会被少数人发现时具有战略价值，但一旦公开，这种优势便会消散。现有博弈模型未能充分捕捉这种“可见性导致价值下降”的认知动力学机制。

Method: 形式化定义认知视野少数博弈（EHMG），在有限格点上构建认知转移博弈；证明固定认知势函数约化、有限单调认知收敛性、Logit均衡唯一性条件；理论分析信息价格与福利损失的分离；设计多种信号结构（私密/公开/关联披露）；进行广泛的数值实验和战略轨迹编码分析。

Result: 证明认知视野博弈可约化为势博弈；给出Logit均衡在显式范数条件下唯一的充分条件；从静态拥堵博弈不可约；信息的目标价格与福利损失可以一致、分歧或推荐相反的披露政策；实验复现了认知扫荡、公开可见性冲击等关键现象。

Conclusion: 该工作为理解信息可见性与战略价值之间的动态关系建立了严谨的理论框架，并为信息披露政策设计提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: Strategic value can fall when an option becomes visible. A route, signal, bet, or opportunity may be attractive because few agents see it; public attention can erase the advantage it reveals. We formalize this mechanism as an epistemic-horizon minority game (EHMG), where agents have bounded observation horizons, action-specific awareness, desire-biased utilities, and payoffs that decline with crowding, and where the object is not a fixed congestion game with omitted actions but an awareness-transition game on a finite lattice. We prove fixed-awareness potential-game reduction, finite monotone awareness convergence, logit mean-field uniqueness under an explicit norm condition, non-reducibility from static count-based congestion games, and sensitivity bounds for nonlinear revelation. We separate the target price of information from aggregate welfare loss, showing that they can coincide, diverge, or recommend opposite disclosure policies, while modeling private revelation, public common revelation, and correlated group disclosure as distinct signal structures with different equilibrium effects. Experiments regenerate awareness sweeps, public visibility shocks, horizon-desire grids, information-constrained Braess examples, disclosure optimization, minimum harmful revelation, and counterfactual baselines isolating the epistemic mechanism from ordinary full-awareness congestion. Strategic trace encodings are evaluated as a controlled regime-recognition benchmark using raw trajectories, Fourier summaries, recurrence and Gramian images, image bundles, local-filter features, leakage probes, phase-scrambled controls, resolution and recurrence-threshold sweeps, spectral carriers, and IAAFT-matched null parameter-shift controls to test whether trace encodings recover strategic structure under robust nulls.

</details>


### [655] [A Tractable Continuous-Time Model for Designing Interventions for Time-Inconsistent Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02835)
*Yasunori Akagi,Hideaki Kim,Daichi Fushihara,Ryosuke Nakahama,Hiroyasu Miyazaki,Takeshi Kurashima*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对时间不一致性智能体，在截止日期约束的基于进度任务中，提出了一个可处理的连续时间模型。利用广义双曲贴现的简洁解析表征，刻画了任务完成、立即放弃或部分进展后放弃的行为，并研究了最优目标设定和最优奖励调度两种干预设计问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间不一致性智能体（如人类）在长期任务中常因非指数贴现而中途放弃，但现有干预设计缺乏连续时间框架下的理论分析。

Method: 建立连续时间模型，智能体重复选择最小化感知成本并遵循初始方向的未来进度轨迹。利用广义双曲贴现函数的解析表征，推导出轨迹的闭式解。

Result: 推导了任务完成、立即放弃、部分进展后放弃的精确条件；在最优目标设定中，给出了允许/禁止剥削性奖励时的最优目标；在最优奖励调度中，等长周期等额奖励最优，且更细的奖励分割单调提升最终进度。

Conclusion: 提供了一个连续时间框架用于时间不一致性智能体的干预设计，并阐明了与现有离散时间模型的差异。

Abstract: Designing effective goals and rewards for time-inconsistent agents is a central problem in many long-term tasks, such as learning, exercise, work, and project completion. An agent may initially plan to complete a task, but later abandon it because, under non-exponential discounting, the perceived trade-off between immediate effort and delayed reward changes over time. This paper develops a tractable continuous-time model for analyzing and designing interventions for such agents in deadline-constrained progress-based tasks. In the model, an agent repeatedly chooses a future progress trajectory that minimizes perceived cost and then follows its infinitesimal initial direction. Although this leads to a continuous-time dynamic behavior defined through a variational problem, we show that the resulting trajectory admits a concise analytical representation under generalized hyperbolic discounting, a broad class of discount functions that includes exponential and hyperbolic discounting as special cases. Using this representation, we characterize when the agent completes the task, abandons it immediately, or exhibits time-inconsistent abandonment after making partial progress. We then study two intervention design problems: optimal goal setting and optimal reward scheduling. For goal setting, we derive optimal goals both when exploitative rewards are allowed and when they are prohibited, and we identify conditions under which exploitative rewards are ineffective. For reward scheduling, we show that, for a fixed number of stages, equal-length periods and equal rewards are optimal, and that finer reward splitting monotonically improves final progress up to a discount-independent limit. These results provide a continuous-time framework for intervention design for time-inconsistent agents and clarify how optimal interventions differ from those in existing discrete-time models.

</details>


### [656] [Teaming Up with AI: Coordination and Cooperation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03181)
*Nicole Immorlica,Inbal Talgam-Cohen*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 论文探讨如何通过结合理论计算机科学和经济学的方法，设计算法工具来优化人-AI协作。提出两个关键工具层级：协调工具（算法管理相互依赖关系）和合作工具（契约激励对齐），旨在提升人机协作的经济价值，实现赋能而非替代人类工作者。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI在劳动力中的成功扩散取决于其为人类带来的经济价值。将AI引入劳动力不仅仅是部署一项新技术，而是开启一种新的协作形式。人类工作者现在拥有一组AI代理，可以将工作委派给这些代理，而人类的角色转向管理和监控。核心问题是如何最大化与AI协作的经济价值，以及如何实现真正的协作——赋能人类工作者而非取代他们。

Method: 采用理论计算机科学与经济学相结合的方法，提出两个层级的算法工具：(1) 协调工具——通过算法管理相互依赖关系来优化协作；(2) 合作工具——通过契约激励对齐来促进合作。这些工具基于算法和经济研究的原理性方法。

Result: 研究表明，基于算法和经济研究的原理性方法能够同时增强协调与合作，为人机协作中的经济价值最大化提供了可行路径。

Conclusion: 该工作为人-AI集体工作效能的提升提供了理论框架，并指出了未来研究的方向，以指导AI市场的形成和发展。

Abstract: Successful diffusion of AI in the workforce hinges on the economic value that AI brings to human endeavors. Bringing AI into the workforce is more than deploying a powerful new technology -- it is launching a new form of collaboration. Each human worker is now endowed with a team of AI agents; work can be delegated to these agents, and the role of the human shifts towards managing and monitoring. How can we maximize the economic value from collaboration with AI in the workforce? How can we make it a "true" collaboration that empowers human workers rather than replacing them?
  We take an approach that combines the fields of theoretical computer science and economics, highlighting the potential of algorithmic tools grounded in economic principles to improve the effectiveness of human-AI collective work. We consider two tiers of tools: (1) tools for better coordination, via algorithmic management of interdependencies; (2) tools for better cooperation, via contractual incentive alignment. We show how a principled approach based on algorithmic and economic research enhances both coordination and cooperation, charting a pathway for future research to inform AI markets.

</details>


### [657] [An Asymptotic Analysis of the Shapley Value for Dataset Valuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03374)
*Mélissa Tamine,Benjamin Heymann,Maxime Vono,Patrick Loiseau*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文对数据集估值中的Shapley值进行了渐近分析，证明了在RKHS均值嵌入框架下，Shapley值可由一个简单的主导项近似捕获，该主导项反映了数据集相对于数据总体的一阶贡献，并为大规模数据集场景下的Shapley值估计提供了理论基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Shapley值在数据集估值中虽有坚实的博弈论基础，但其组合定义导致计算成本高昂，尤其当数据源数量很大时。作者希望通过渐近分析揭示Shapley值在大规模数据源场景下的本质行为，从而简化计算并提供理论理解。

Method: 将效用函数建模为通过RKHS均值嵌入的、关于经验分布的平滑泛函，对Shapley值进行渐近展开分析，证明其渐近主导项的存在性及其形式。

Result: Shapley值渐近地由一个简单的主导项捕获，该主导项可解释为数据集相对于总体数据的一阶贡献，并揭示了Shapley值的规模随数据源数量增长的规律。

Conclusion: 该主导项为大规模数据集场景下的Shapley值估计提供了可计算的参考基准，有助于评估和改进现有Shapley值估计器的性能。

Abstract: We propose an asymptotic analysis of the Shapley value in a dataset valuation setting in which utilities are modeled as smooth functionals of empirical distributions via reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) mean embeddings. We prove that, despite its combinatorial definition, the Shapley value of a data source is asymptotically captured by a simple leading term. This term can be interpreted as the first-order contribution of a dataset relative to the surrounding data population. It also identifies the scale of the Shapley value as the number of data sources grows and provides a framework for analyzing existing Shapley value estimators. Moreover, for practitioners working with large numbers of datasets, the leading term becomes a tractable reference against which Shapley value approximations can be benchmarked.

</details>


### [658] [Random Serial Dictatorship is $\sqrt{2}$-Envy-Free](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03463)
*Frank Connor,Max Dupré la Tour,Louis-Roy Langevin,Vishnu V. Narayan,Ndiamé Ndiaye,Neil Rahman,Adrian Vetta*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文量化分析了随机序列独裁机制（RSD）在房屋分配问题中的嫉妒比率，证明了其紧的上界√2，并进一步分析了其扩展机制在多种估值类下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管RSD机制被广泛认为在事前是公平的，但它并非期望无嫉妒的。已有研究仅给出了√2的下界，其上界未知且紧性未定，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 通过构造匹配上界的理论分析，建立RSD机制嫉妒比率的上界为√2；并针对非对称设置（代理与物品数量不等）研究了随机循环赛和迭代RSD两种扩展机制，覆盖加性、子模、XOS和次可加等多种估值类别。

Result: RSD的嫉妒比率紧界为√2；随机循环赛的嫉妒比率在1.5到1.707之间；迭代RSD保持√2。对子模估值，两种机制的嫉妒比率有常数上下界；对XOS和次可加估值，嫉妒比率无界。

Conclusion: 该研究首次给出了RSD及其扩展机制近似无嫉妒性的紧或几乎紧的量化保证，深化了对这些经典机制公平性理解。

Abstract: We analyze the house allocation problem, in which a set of agents must be matched to a set of objects for which they have cardinal utilities. A central mechanism for this problem is random serial dictatorship (RSD), which has long served as a canonical subject of study due to its simplicity and the existence of exact characterizations by its properties. Despite this extensive understanding, a basic quantitative question about the fairness of this mechanism remains unresolved. Although RSD is often viewed as fair ex ante, surprisingly, it is not envy-free in expectation. We quantify its deviation from envy-freeness via the envy-ratio, which is the maximum over all instances and pairs of agents of the ratio between an agent's expected utility for another agent's random object and for its own random object. Prior work shows a factor-$\sqrt{2}\approx 1.414$ lower bound on the envy-ratio of RSD. Our headline result is a matching upper bound, showing that RSD is $\sqrt{2}$-envy-free in the house allocation problem.
  We further analyze the two natural extensions of RSD (the randomized round-robin mechanism and the iterated-RSD mechanism) to settings with unequal numbers of agents and objects and more general valuation classes. For additive valuations, this ratio increases to at least $1.5$ and at most $1.707$ for randomized round-robin, but remains exactly $\sqrt{2}$ for iterated-RSD. For submodular valuations, we prove constant-factor upper and lower bounds for both mechanisms, leaving only a small constant gap in both cases. For the more general classes of XOS and subadditive valuations, we present a tight analysis for both mechanisms, showing that the envy-ratio is unbounded in the number of agents. These results provide the first tight or nearly tight quantitative guarantees on the extent to which random serial dictatorship and its natural generalizations approximate envy-freeness.

</details>


### [659] [New bounds on randomized metric distortion of top-$k$ voting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03564)
*Alec Sun,Daniel Zhu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究随机社会选择机制的度量失真问题。在一人选票制下，提出按候选人得票率的 n/(n-1) 次方比例随机选择候选人的简单规则，达到最优最坏情况失真度 3 - 2/n。还研究了实例特定失真度，得到唯一最优规则，并将结果推广到 top-k 投票场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有随机社会选择机制在最坏情况度量失真方面存在理论空白，需要更简洁、最优的决策规则。同时，实例特定失真度和 top-k 投票场景下的失真界限也需要进一步探索和完善。

Method: 理论证明与下界构造。针对一人选票制，提出按 ν_i^(n/(n-1)) 比例随机选择候选人的规则；针对实例特定失真，推导出基于投票向量 ν 的公式 1 + 2/∑(ν_i/(1-ν_i))；针对 top-k 投票，推导任意 k≥2 的最坏情况失真公式，并构造循环偏好族下界。

Result: 一人选票制下达到最优最坏情况失真度 3 - 2/n；实例特定失真度存在唯一最优规则；top-k 投票下推导出一般公式，循环偏好族下界改进之前文献结果。

Conclusion: 提出的规则简洁且最优，填补了随机社会选择机制在度量失真方面的理论空白，为后续设计更高效的投票机制提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We prove new upper and lower bounds on metric distortion for randomized social choice mechanisms. Under first-choice voting where each voter reports only their most preferred candidate, we show that selecting a candidate with probability proportional to the $\frac{n}{n-1}$-th power of their vote share achieves the optimal worst-case distortion of $3 - \frac{2}{n}$. This is a simpler single-rule alternative to prior work. We also study instance-specific metric distortion of first-choice mechanisms in terms of the vote vector $ν$. We show that there is a uniquely optimal rule achieving distortion $1 + \frac{2}{\sum_i \frac{ν_i}{1 - ν_i}}$. Finally, we extend our results to top-$k$ voting where each voter reports their $k$ nearest candidates. We derive a formula for the worst-case distortion for any $k\ge 2$. For the cyclic profile family this improves the previously best known $3 - \frac{2}{\lfloor \frac{n}{k} \rfloor}$ lower bound.

</details>


### [660] [Congestion Games with Heterogeneous Valuations: An Optimal Transport Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03625)
*Pan-Yang Su,Negar Mehr,Shankar Sastry*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的非原子拥塞博弈框架，其中智能体具有异构目的地估值，并证明了纳什均衡和社会最优均存在有限维表示，利用最优传输理论提供了新几何视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有拥塞博弈和资源分配模型无法同时捕捉异构目的地偏好和聚合拥塞外部性，而新兴城市出行与物流应用（如先进空中交通、电动汽车充电）中这一特征至关重要。

Method: 构建了基于测度空间的异构目的地估值非原子拥塞博弈模型，利用最优传输理论中的Kantorovich对偶性，引入阈值向量和对偶势函数实现有限维表示。

Result: 证明了纳什均衡和社会最优均存在有限维表示；估值空间被划分为不同区域，决定智能体的目的地选择；对偶结构刻画了均衡与最优解的特征。

Conclusion: 为异构估值拥塞博弈提供了新的几何视角，拓展了经典拥塞博弈理论，有助于分析城市交通等实际应用中的资源配置问题。

Abstract: In emerging urban mobility and logistics applications, such as advanced air mobility, electric vehicle charging, and shared service systems, agents with heterogeneous valuations choose among multiple destinations while sharing congested network resources. However, existing congestion game and resource allocation models do not simultaneously capture heterogeneous destination preferences and aggregate congestion externalities. We introduce a new nonatomic congestion game framework in which agents are endowed with heterogeneous destination valuations modeled by a measure space. We characterize Nash equilibria and social optima in this setting and show that both admit finite-dimensional representations in terms of threshold vectors and dual potentials. These structures induce a partition of the valuation space that determines agents' destination choices. Our analysis leverages Kantorovich duality from optimal transport theory and provides a new geometric perspective on congestion games with heterogeneous valuations.

</details>


### [661] [Mechanism Design for Locating a Bridge Between Regions with Prelocated Facilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04309)
*Genjie Qin,Chenhao Wang,Jianan Lin,Qizhi Fang,Wenjing Liu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 论文研究了在连接两个已设设施的桥选址机制设计问题，针对最大成本和社会成本目标，分析了策略证明性、群体策略证明性和强群体策略证明性下的近似比上下界，提出了多种确定性及随机化机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在城市规划中，需要建桥连接两个被障碍物分隔的区域，每个区域已有设施，用户通过桥前往最近设施。传统设施选址模型假设同一平面上的连续选址，而本文考虑两个离散区域与桥的特殊约束，需要设计激励相容的机制来最小化社会成本或最大成本。

Method: 本文采用机制设计方法，通过刻画最优解、设计确定性/随机化近似机制，以及建立下界证明来系统分析不同策略证明性（SP、GSP、SGSP）约束下的可解性。

Result: 最大成本目标：最优解满足GSP；SGSP下确定性3-近似、随机化2-近似机制，下界为2。社会成本目标：GSP下确定性3-近似、随机化2-近似机制，下界分别为2和1.1；SGSP下确定性下界1+min{m,n}，上界1+2min{m,n}；随机化下界1.1，上界1+2mn/(m+n)。

Conclusion: 本文完整刻画了桥选址问题在不同激励相容约束下的可逼近性，给出了上下界结果，表明群体策略证明性会显著增加确定性机制的设计难度，而随机化机制能提供更好的近似比。

Abstract: In many urban planning projects, social planners require the construction of a bridge to connect two regions separated by obstacles such as rivers or highways. This paper studies the mechanism design problem for locating a bridge between two separate regions, each of which has been equipped with a facility. There are a set of agents located in each region and each agent has her location as private information. Once the bridge is built, the agents will go to the nearest facility to receive service and each agent's cost is the distance from her location to the nearest prelocated facility via the bridge. We investigate social cost and maximum cost under strategyproof (SP) mechanisms, with stronger notions of group-strategyproof (GSP) and strong group-strategyproof (SGSP).
  For the maximum cost objective, we characterize the optimal solution and show that it satisfies GSP. Under the SGSP, we propose a deterministic 3-approximation mechanism and a randomized 2-approximation mechanism, while proving a lower bound of 2 for any deterministic SGSP mechanism. For the social cost objective, we present a deterministic 3-approximation mechanism and a randomized 2-approximation mechanism that satisfy GSP. We establish lower bounds of 2 and 1.1 for deterministic and randomized SP mechanisms, respectively. Under the SGSP, the lower bound for deterministic mechanisms increases to 1 + min{m, n}, and we provide a (1 + 2 min{m, n})-approximation mechanism. For randomized mechanisms, the lower bound remains 1.1, while an upper bound of (1 + 2mn/(m+n)) is achieved.

</details>


### [662] [Beyond Self-Resolution: Settlement Factorization for Robust Natural Language Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04382)
*Nicolas Della Penna*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究如何设计激励机制，使得AI/人类顾问在提供建议时不会操纵评估标准（即“自己写答案”）。作者提出“结算因子化”（settlement factorization）框架，将建议记录与评估标签分离，并证明这种分离是机制设计的规范形式，且报告泄漏量（ε）是机制的内在不变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型（以及人类顾问）越来越多地提供付费建议，但存在一个根本性矛盾：顾问的报告既影响决策，又可能被用来评估其自身。这会导致作弊、谄媚或策略性操纵。作者希望形式化“建议与评估分离”这一直觉，并量化其成本。

Method: 作者提出“结算因子化”（settlement factorization）：将报告硬化（hardened）为官方记录，决策记录Z使用所有建议，但每个顾问的评分基于一个独立于其自身报告的标签（label），该标签的条件仅依赖于Z。核心结果是“启示原则”的类比：通过从已承诺的幽灵分布（ghost distribution）中重采样付费报告，任何机制都可以在最优解的2倍因子内实现无影响参考。报告泄漏量ε（自身报告对评估的影响，以总变差距离衡量）被识别为机制的固有不变性。

Result: 1) 结算因子化是机制的规范形式（normal form），自身报告泄漏ε是内在不变量。2) ε有精确代价：当支付核的标签敏感性为L时，诚实边际最多退化2Lε（一半来自自身标签操纵，一半来自谄媚有偏评估者）。3) 当外部化边际γ > D + 2Lε时，忠实建议可以存活。4) 在共享决策记录上结算群体稀释了指数的边际；因子化的留一标签在单位赌注下保持恒定边际。5) 随机参考结算使诚实成为阈值物品；评估者对付费报告的差分隐私可以构建性地保证ε。

Conclusion: 结算因子化是处理付费建议激励机制的基本原则框架。自身报告泄漏ε是机制设计的核心不变量，决定了诚实建议能否存活。论文提供了理论保证和构建性方法（如差分隐私），使激励机制能够抵御操纵，确保决策质量。

Abstract: Language models increasingly mediate paid advice: agents submit open-ended forecasts, recommendations, plans, and evidence; a principal acts on the reports; and the mechanism later pays the contributors. Advice should influence the public decision, but no adviser should write the answer key used to evaluate it. We formalize the separation as settlement factorization: reports are hardened into official records, a public decision record Z may use all advice, and each paid adviser is scored against a label whose production is externalized from their own report, conditional on Z. The central result is an analogue of the revelation principle for this setting: resampling the paid report from a committed ghost distribution inside the settlement channel equips every mechanism with an influence-free reference within a factor of two of the best achievable, so factorization is a normal form, and own-report leakage varepsilon -- measured in total variation -- is an intrinsic invariant of any mechanism, identified behaviorally by worst-case incentive erosion. The invariant has an exact price: with payment kernels of label sensitivity L, truthful margins degrade by at most 2L varepsilon, and the constant is tight -- half own-label manipulation, half pandering to a biased evaluator -- so faithful advice survives outside decision interests D whenever the externalized margin satisfies gamma >D+2L varepsilon. Settling a growing crowd on the shared decision record dilutes every margin exponentially in the informational redundancy, while a factorized leave-one-out label sustains a constant margin at unit stakes. Stakes outbid decision interests but never evaluator capture; randomized reference settlement makes integrity a threshold good priced per unit of total variation; and differential privacy of the evaluator in the paid report certifies varepsilon by construction.

</details>


### [663] [Multi Choice Min Prophet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05085)
*Yossi Azar,Itamar Biran,Amos Fiat*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了最小化版本的先知不等式（成本先知不等式），发现在最小化设定下，算法需要近乎线性的选择次数才能达到常数竞争比（对抗顺序），而在随机顺序（先知秘书模型）下，仅需对数级别的期望选择次数即可实现常数竞争比，并给出了紧的下界证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最大化版本的先知不等式已有成熟的结果（简单阈值算法即可达到1/2竞争比），但最小化版本被证明难度显著更高（即使独立同分布变量也存在指数级下界）。作者希望探索能否通过"多选一"（选择多个变量取最小值）的松弛策略，在最小化问题中以少量选择次数实现常数竞争比。

Method: 1. 对抗顺序：证明常数竞争比需要Ω(n/ln n)的期望选择次数。2. 先知秘书模型（随机顺序）：提出算法仅需O(ln n)期望选择次数即实现常数竞争比；进一步优化后，定义M为单变量期望最小值与全局期望最小值之比，提出O(min{ln ln M, ln n})的算法。3. 确定性选择次数下界：证明任何常数竞争比算法在最坏情况下需要n次选择（即使i.i.d.）。4. 多单元变体：将技术扩展到i.i.d.变量的多单元最小化版本。

Result: 1. 对抗顺序：常数竞争比需Ω(n/ln n)期望选择次数。2. 先知秘书模型：常数竞争比仅需O(ln n)期望选择次数，并进一步优化为O(min{ln ln M, ln n})，且该结果紧至对数因子。3. 确定性下界：常数竞争比算法在最坏情况下需要n次选择。4. 多单元变体：i.i.d.下实现常数竞争比且期望选择次数很小。

Conclusion: 最小化先知不等式问题中，变量顺序（对抗 vs 随机）对所需选择次数有指数级影响；随机顺序下可以通过精巧的算法以极少的期望选择实现常数竞争比，且结果在理论上是紧的。

Abstract: We study the minimization counterpart of the classic prophet inequality, often termed the min prophet or cost prophet inequality. Unlike the maximization setting, where simple threshold algorithms achieve half of the prophet's value, the minimization setting is significantly harder, with an exponential lower bound even for i.i.d.\ variables.
  We study a multi-choice relaxation in which the algorithm may select multiple variables and gets to choose the best amongst them (the minimum amongst those selected). Our goal is to minimize the expected number of selections while achieving a constant competitive ratio. For adversarial order, we show that a constant competitive ratio requires a nearly linear number of choices in expectation, ergo, $Ω(n/\ln n)$. In contrast, we show that for the prophet secretary model (random order) one can attain constant competitiveness while requiring only an exponentially smaller expected number of choices i.e. $O(\ln n)$. We give a refined analysis and define $M$ to be the ratio of the minimum expected value of any single variable to the expected minimum value of all variables (the prophet's value) and present an algorithm that achieves a constant competitive ratio with $O(\min\{\ln \ln M, \ln n\})$ choices in expectation for the prophet secretary. We show that this is tight up to low order log factors even for the special case of the i.i.d. model. We also show that if we insist on a deterministic bound on the number of choices then every constant competitive algorithm requires $n$ choices. This holds even in the i.i.d.\ setting
  Finally, we consider a variant where both the algorithm and the adversary choose $r$ values and pay their sum, this is the minimization multi unit version. We extend our techniques to the multi-unit variant for i.i.d.\ variables, achieving a constant competitive ratio with a small expected number of choices.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [664] [Auditing the Audit: Five Failure Modes in Benchmark-Validity Audits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02586)
*Yanhang Li,Zhichao Fan,Zexin Zhuang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出基于扰动的构念效度审计本身是脆弱的——其结论可能被不可见的实现细节无声操纵。作者通过自我审计展示了五类管道故障，并提出六点尽职调查门控，结果显示所有测试单元均未达到可确认水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有治理框架要求AI提供者和审计师提供文档化的评估证据，但基于扰动的构念效度审计作为常见证据形式，其结论可能因实现细节而被无声操纵，读者无法从报告的数字中察觉。

Method: 作者定义了五类管道故障（F1-F5），并在安全基准测试和开放权重指令调优模型上进行自我审计实验，同时提出六点尽职调查门控作为评估标准。

Result: 在统一的六点尽职调查门控下，所有测试单元均落入非确认性桶中，无一达到确认性水平。但该证据仅基于单一的两个模型、五个基准测试的案例研究。

Conclusion: 六点门控被定位为一种用于保证级证据的保留和披露协议，是对经典构念效度证据的补充而非替代，并不作为基准效度判定的路径。

Abstract: Governance frameworks ask AI providers and auditors for documented evaluation evidence, and perturbation-based construct-validity audits are a common form of that evidence. We argue the audits are themselves fragile: their conclusions can be silently manufactured by implementation details that readers cannot see in the reported numbers. We name five classes of pipeline failure and demonstrate each in a self-audit over safety benchmarks and open-weight instruction-tuned models. Under a unified six-point due-diligence gate, every cell lands in a non-confirmatory bucket, and no cell reaches confirmatory. The evidence here is a single two-model, five-benchmark case study, and F1--F5 is an illustrative, deliberately non-exhaustive starting taxonomy -- not a comprehensive partition of audit failures. We position the gate as a withholding and disclosure protocol for assurance-grade evidence, supplementary to (not a replacement for) classical construct-validity evidence, and not as a route to benchmark-validity verdicts.

</details>


### [665] [Evaluating Time Series Foundation Models for Electricity Price Forecasting: Contamination Risk, Distributional Shifts, and Covariate Dependence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02623)
*Zhenghua Pan,Ahmed Aziz Ezzat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）在电价预测（EPF）中的零样本泛化能力，提出了双数据集基准框架进行评估，发现TSFMs表现有竞争力但依赖协变量支持，与领域专用方法互补，集成两者效果更佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列基础模型在零样本预测中表现优异，但在协变量驱动的非平稳场景（如电价预测）中的泛化能力尚未充分探索。

Method: 提出双数据集基准框架以降低数据污染风险；从点预测、概率预测、尾部行为、价格尖峰等维度全面评估TSFMs，并与领域专用方法对比。

Result: TSFMs在电价预测中表现有竞争力，优于通用基线，但未一致超越领域专用方法；其性能严重依赖协变量支持；TSFMs与领域专用方法存在互补性，简单集成可提升效果。

Conclusion: TSFMs在电价预测中有潜力，但与领域专用方法各有优劣，两者互补集成是未来有前景的方向。

Abstract: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) have shown strong zero-shot forecasting performance, but their generalization in covariate-driven, non-stationary settings is underexplored. Electricity price forecasting (EPF) presents a challenging testbed due to complex temporal dependencies, distributional shifts, and strong reliance on structural and contextual information. We propose a two-dataset-benchmarking framework for EPF to mitigate contamination risk and enable fair evaluation of TSFMs. We examine key aspects of EPF including point and probabilistic forecasting performance, tail behavior, price spikes, and comparisons against domain-specific methods. We find that TSFMs are highly competitive and often outperform general-purpose baselines. Yet, their performance depends critically on covariate support, and they do not consistently surpass domain-specific methods tailored to EPF. Interestingly, simple ensembles of TSFMs and domain-specific methods appear to have significant potential, suggesting that the two approaches capture complementary predictive information.

</details>


### [666] [QuantFlow: A Federated Mamba-Based Post-Transformer Foundation Model for Time-Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02632)
*Shah Nawaz Haider,Steve Austin,Arnab Barua,Sarowar Morshed Shawon,Hadaate Ullah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: QuantFlow是一个结合倒置序列嵌入、双向Mamba状态空间解码器、分位数回归和联邦学习的概率预测框架，在多个时间序列数据集上取得良好效果，支持隐私保护和不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型依赖中心化数据和Transformer注意力机制，难以处理长序列、高维度和隐私敏感的信号，需一种可扩展、支持不确定性量化且保护隐私的预测框架。

Method: 采用倒置序列嵌入（每个变量在完整观测窗口上嵌入）、双向Mamba状态空间解码器（正向和反向处理）、分位数回归（预测五个条件分位数）以及联邦学习（20客户端非独立同分布部署），并引入TSMixup通过狄利克雷加权插值扩展时间多样性。

Result: 在ETTm1上MSE为0.2834，Weather上为0.2218；20客户端非IID联邦部署经三轮通信后仍保持可用精度，无需集中原始数据。

Conclusion: 选择性状态空间建模是可扩展、不确定性感知且隐私保护的时间序列预测的有前途的基础，但在不规则的流行病信号和长期泛化方面存在局限。

Abstract: Time-series forecasting supports decisions in finance, en-ergy, transportation, public health, and industrial monitoring. Recent foundation models improve transfer across forecast-ing tasks, but many depend on centralized data and Trans-former attention, which restricts their use for long, high-di-mensional, and privacy-sensitive signals. This paper presents QuantFlow, a probabilistic forecasting framework that com-bines inverted sequence embedding, bidirectional Mamba state-space decoders, quantile regression, and federated learning. Each variable is embedded over the complete ob-servation window, processed in forward and reverse direc-tions, and projected to five conditional quantiles. TSMixup expands temporal diversity through Dirichlet-weighted inter-polation while preserving sequence structure. Experiments cover cryptocurrency, traffic, electricity, Electricity Trans-former Temperature, influenza, and weather data. QuantFlow obtains mean squared errors of 0.2834 on ETTm1 and 0.2218 on Weather, and a 20-client non-IID deployment retains use-ful accuracy after three communication rounds without cen-tralizing raw records. The results indicate that selective state-space modelling is a promising basis for scalable, uncer-tainty-aware, and privacy-conscious time-series prediction, while also revealing limitations on irregular epidemiological signals and long-horizon generalization.

</details>


### [667] [GRAFT: Grafted Reference Audio for Fine-grained Pronunciation in Zero-shot Text-to-Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02633)
*Antonis Asonitis,Francesco Verdini,Aref Farhadipour,Vijeta Avijeet,Pierre-Edouard Honnet,Marzieh Razavi,Juan Pablo Zuluaga Gomez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GRAFT是一种基于词级发音条件的文本转语音编解码器语言建模方法，通过从短语音样本中提取发音提示并绑定到文本位置，显著提升了对罕见专有名词、外来词和技术术语的发音准确性，同时保持说话人相似度和自然度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TTS系统虽具有高可懂度和自然度，但继承了文本的歧义性，在罕见专有名词、外来词和技术术语上容易发音错误。即使是音素条件模型也无法提供对每个词的直接声学控制。

Method: GRAFT通过从短语音样本中提取发音提示，用模型自身的语音分词器编码后绑定到文本中的对应词位置；在训练数据构建中使用语音转换技术将提示说话人与目标说话人解耦，使提示可来自任意声音而输出保持目标音色。

Result: 在盲听英语研究中，GRAFT在困难词汇的发音上被评价为最接近参考录音。在五语言客观基准上，目标词音素错误率比纯文本基线降低22-39%，优于竞品零样本系统，同时保持说话人相似度和自然度。

Conclusion: GRAFT通过词级发音条件机制有效解决了TTS中困难词汇的发音问题，在不牺牲其他性能指标的前提下显著提升了发音准确性。

Abstract: We present GRAFT, a per-word pronunciation conditioning mechanism for text-to-speech neural codec language modeling. Existing systems reach high intelligibility and naturalness but inherit the ambiguity of text and mispronounce rare proper nouns, loanwords and technical terms. Even phoneme-conditioned models offer no direct acoustic handle for per-word pronunciation. GRAFT controls the pronunciation of a chosen word from a short spoken sample of it, encoded with the model's own speech tokenizer and bound to the word's position in the prompt. Voice conversion during training-data construction disentangles the hint speaker from the target speaker, so the hint may come from any voice while the output stays in the target voice. In a blind English listening study, human raters rank GRAFT first by a clear margin, judging its rendering of the difficult word closest to a reference recording of that word. On a five-language objective benchmark, GRAFT reduces target-word phoneme error rate by 22-39% over the identical text-only backbone and outperforms competitive open-source zero-shot systems, both phoneme- and text-conditioned, on target-word pronunciation, while preserving speaker similarity and naturalness.

</details>


### [668] [Federated Learning for Object Detection: Enabling Collaborative Drone Learning Without Centralizing Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02636)
*Daniel M. Jimenez-Gutierrez,Enrique Zuazua,Georgios Kellaris,Joaquin del Rio,Oleksii Sliusarenko,Xabi Uribe-Etxebarria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用联邦学习（FL）实现无人机分布式目标检测，在保持数据本地的同时提升模型性能。在KIIT-MiTA数据集上，FL方法在mAP指标上接近集中式训练，远超单无人机训练，轻量级YOLO26 nano模型相对增益达52.89%和67.80%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无人机目标检测需要集中存储大量航拍图像数据，面临隐私、法规、存储和带宽等挑战。分布式无人机部署中，机载生成的视觉数据传输到集中基础设施不切实际或不可取。

Method: 采用联邦学习框架，利用Sherpa.ai FL平台实现分布式目标检测。在KIIT-MiTA数据集上训练，与单无人机训练和集中式训练进行对比，使用mAP@0.50和mAP@0.50:0.95作为评估指标。

Result: 联邦学习接近集中式训练性能，大幅优于单无人机训练。YOLO26 nano轻量模型的mAP@0.50提升52.89%，mAP@0.50:0.95提升67.80%。

Conclusion: 联邦学习能够在无需数据集中化的情况下，实现分布式无人机舰队的高性能、可扩展且保护隐私的目标检测。

Abstract: Object detection is a fundamental capability for AI-driven perception in safety-critical drone and edge-vision systems, including disaster response, operational security environments, infrastructure monitoring and defense applications. Robust model performance in such environments depends on large, continuously updated datasets. However, training high-performing detectors typically requires centralizing aerial imagery, which raises privacy, regulatory, storage, and bandwidth challenges. This is especially problematic in distributed drone deployments, where visual data is generated onboard and is often impractical or undesirable to transfer to a centralized infrastructure.
  In this work, we apply Federated Learning (FL) for object detection, enabling drones to improve a shared model while keeping image data local and private. We implement a federated object detection pipeline using the Sherpa.ai FL platform on the KIIT-MiTA dataset, and compare it with Single-drone and Centralized baselines using mean Average Precision (mAP) at IoU thresholds of 0.50 and 0.50-0.95. In our experiments, the proposed FL approach remains close to Centralized training while dramatically improving over Single-drone training, with the best lightweight model (YOLO26 nano), suitable for deployment even on very limited edge infrastructure, achieving relative gains of 52.89% and 67.80% in mAP@0.50 and mAP@0.50:0.95, respectively. These results show that FL enables scalable, high-performing, and privacy-preserving object detection across distributed drone fleets without data centralization.

</details>


### [669] [Rank-Order N-of-M Codes for Sparse Distributed Memory: Disentangling Representation and Learning Effects in Noise Robustness Against Contemporary Neuromorphic Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02967)
*Joy Bose*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估了Rank-Order N-of-M编码作为CALM中阈值二进制编码的替代方案，发现RankOrderSDM在容量上优于StandardSDM，且鲁棒性提升主要来自编码与MAX-Hebbian学习的交互作用，而非编码本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型作为持续学习系统存在局限性，CALM提出的阈值二进制编码器是一个开放的设计问题，因此需要探索更优的编码方案。

Method: 忠实复现CALM架构并验证等价性；进行多种子容量实验对比RankOrderSDM与StandardSDM；设计BER鲁棒性实验分离编码与学习效应；在GloVe-100和句子嵌入上进行验证；分析编码能耗。

Result: 1) WheelSDM与RankOrderSDM完全等价(余弦相似度1.0000)；2) RankOrderSDM在容量上优于StandardSDM最多13.4个百分点；3) 鲁棒性提升主要来自rank-order编码与MAX-Hebbian学习的交互；4) 理想rank-order编码能耗仅为SI-LIF神经元的一半。

Conclusion: 明确了rank-order SDM架构中各组件对当代记忆增强AI系统的可衡量贡献，为CALM等架构提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Large language models remain limited as continual learning systems, motivating renewed interest in Sparse Distributed Memory (SDM) as an explicit online episodic memory. CALM (Nechesov and Ruponen, 2025) identifies its threshold-binary encoder as an open design question. This paper evaluates rank-order N-of-M encoding (Furber et al., 2007) as an alternative. We make three contributions. First, a faithful reimplementation validates the published architecture by confirming exact equivalence between WheelSDM and RankOrderSDM (cosine similarity 1.0000 across 10 seeds) and reproducing the documented divergence of RDLIF neurons under interference. Second, multi-seed capacity experiments show RankOrderSDM outperforming StandardSDM by 13.4 percentage points at saturation in the scaled configuration and by 0.8 percentage points at the published architecture scale. Third, BER robustness experiments disentangle representation and learning effects, showing that the large robustness gain arises primarily from the interaction of rank-order encoding with MAX-Hebbian learning, while the encoder alone provides only a small advantage under matched learning conditions. Experiments on GloVe-100 embeddings confirm this small but consistent encoding benefit on real structured data, whereas sentence embeddings exhibit a ceiling effect at low memory load. A secondary analysis shows that idealized rank-order encoding requires half the component-level encoding energy of SpikingMamba's SI-LIF neurons at four-bit precision, although decoder costs dominate overall system energy. These results identify which components of the original rank-order SDM architecture provide measurable benefits for contemporary memory-augmented AI systems, offering practical guidance for architectures such as CALM.

</details>


### [670] [Post-Generation Curation of Synthetic Images via Homogeneous-Heterogeneous Splitting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02637)
*Disheng Liu,Tuo Liang,Chaoda Song,Yu Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种生成器无关的合成数据后选择方法，通过将真实类别分为同质（Homogeneous）和异质（Heterogeneous）子集，并基于保真度-多样性标准挑选合成图像，以克服生成器过度生产典型模式、低估类内多样性的结构性偏差。该方法无需重新训练，在多个基准上优于现有数据选择基线，且可使用最多40%更少的合成样本匹配真实数据性能，在分类和分割任务上均有提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有利用生成模型合成数据的方法要么需要训练或微调生成器，要么依赖提示工程或推理时引导等轻量级后适应，这些方法往往针对特定生成器且需要专业知识。作者试图回答一个互补性问题：给定固定的一批生成图像，能否仅通过选择信息子集来提升下游效用？

Method: 首先将每个真实类别划分为同质（Homogeneous, HO）子集（典型模式）和异质（Heterogeneous, HE）子集（非冗余变体），然后通过保真度-多样性（fidelity-diversity）标准对合成图像进行评分：奖励语义对齐，同时惩罚典型冗余。该方法完全与生成器无关，无需重新训练。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法一致优于最先进的数据选择基线，并且可用最多40%更少的合成样本匹配真实数据性能。当应用于更强的任务微调生成器时，该标准仍然有效，在分类和分割任务上均获得提升。

Conclusion: 后生成选择（post-generation selection）并非更好生成器的替代品，而是提升合成数据效用的互补机制。

Abstract: Recent generative models can produce high-quality synthetic images, offering scalable training training data for data-hungry models. Existing approaches to exploiting this potential typically involve 1) training or fine-tuning generators, or 2) using lightweight post-hoc adaptation like prompt engineering or inference-time guidance, making them generator-specific and expertise-intensive. We study a complementary question: given a fixed pool of generated images, can downstream utility be improved purely by selecting an informative subset? The answer is yes. We show that effective selection must counter a structural bias of modern generators: they tend to over-produce canonical modes of each class while underrepresenting intra-class variation. Building on this insight, we split each real class into a canonical Homogeneous (HO) subset and a non-redundant Heterogeneous (HE) subset, then score synthetic images by a fidelity-diversity criterion that rewards semantic alignment while penalizing canonical redundancy. The method is generator-agnostic and requires no retraining. Across multiple benchmarks, it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art data selection baselines and matches the real-data performance with up to 40% fewer synthetic samples. The same criterion remains effective when applied on top of stronger task-tuned generators, with gains on both classification and segmentation tasks. Post-generation selection is therefore not a substitute for better generators, but a complementary mechanism for improving the utility of synthetic data.

</details>


### [671] [A Granularity-Aware EEG Feature Framework for Psychopathology Dimension Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02670)
*Haofan Cheng,Jingjing Hu,Jingrong Pei,Shuaiqi Fu,Meilun Shen,Shuai Fang,Meng Wang,Dan Guo,Jie Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究开发了一种粒度感知的EEG特征管道，将多尺度特征组织为全局、区域和通道级别，用于预测儿童精神病理维度。在HBN队列中，基于树模型和粒度平衡特征选择在部分条件下优于传统方法，但效应量较小。选定的标记显示出与已知神经生理知识一致的空间和频谱模式，并在独立PEARL队列中进行了交叉数据集验证。结论是多尺度EEG特征含有微弱但可检测的精神病理信号，粒度感知选择可作为有用的特征降维策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG提供了一种检查维度精神病理学神经生理关联的非侵入性方法，但目前跨EEG范式和特征粒度的系统证据仍然有限，需要开发更有效的特征分析方法。

Method: 开发粒度感知的EEG特征管道，将多尺度描述符组织为全局、区域和通道三级；使用HBN队列，在四种EEG范式下预测四种精神病理维度（p因子、内化、外化、注意问题）；采用树模型和粒度平衡特征选择策略。

Result: 在选定条件下，树模型和粒度平衡特征选择相较于传统方法有改进，但效应量仍较小；标记可视化显示与已知神经生理知识一致的维度特异性空间和频谱模式；在PEARL队列中交叉验证表明技术可行性。

Conclusion: 多尺度EEG特征中含有微弱但可检测的维度精神病理信号，粒度感知选择可作为未来EEG表型研究中一个有用的特征降维策略。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) offers a noninvasive approach for examining neurophysiological correlates of dimensional psychopathology, yet systematic evidence across EEG paradigms and feature granularities remains limited. Here, we develop a granularity-aware EEG feature pipeline that organizes multi-scale descriptors into global, regional, and channel levels. Using the Healthy Brain Network (HBN) cohort, we evaluate the prediction of four psychopathology dimensions: p-factor, internalizing, externalizing, and attention problems, across four EEG paradigms. Given the heterogeneity of pediatric psychopathology and the moderate reliability of questionnaire-derived scores, this setting represents a challenging feasibility test rather than a clinical screening scenario. Tree-based models and granularity-balanced feature selection showed promising improvements over conventional approaches in selected conditions, although effect sizes remained modest. Visualization of selected markers revealed dimension-specific spatial and spectral patterns that were broadly aligned with existing neurophysiological knowledge. An exploratory cross-dataset sanity check on the independent PEARL cohort suggested that the proposed selection principle remains technically feasible under protocol shifts, without claiming cross-dataset generalizability. Overall, multi-scale EEG features contain weak but detectable signals related to dimensional psychopathology, and granularity-aware selection may serve as a useful feature-reduction strategy for future EEG-based phenotyping studies.

</details>


### [672] [LiNO: Lifting based multiresolution neural operator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02715)
*Himanshu Pandey,Subham Patel,Ratikanta Behera*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于二代小波提升方案的Lifting Neural Operator (LiNO)，通过自适应、可逆的多分辨率分解，实现了同时捕捉全局动力学和细尺度结构的神经算子，在多个偏微分方程基准测试中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子在学习微分方程解算子时，难以同时捕捉全局动态和细尺度结构，缺乏能够表示多尺度特征的有效算子框架。

Method: 基于二代小波提升方案构建多分辨率算子LiNO，通过参数化提升变换直接从数据学习多分辨率分解，该变换自适应于解函数且严格可逆，在提升后的多分辨率空间中分别演化粗尺度系数和方向细节系数。

Result: 在Darcy流、泊松方程、Allen-Cahn方程、可压缩Navier-Stokes方程和Gray-Scott反应扩散系统等多个基准测试上，LiNO相比现有最先进神经算子表现出更强的性能。

Conclusion: 自适应多分辨率算子为科学机器学习提供了有前景的发展方向。

Abstract: Recently, neural operators have shown promising outcomes for learning solution operators of differential equations directly from data. This framework learns a functional mapping from the parameter field to the solution field, enabling the prediction of an entire class of solutions rather than a specific instance. However, existing operators often struggle to capture both global dynamics and fine-scale structure simultaneously. To design an effective operator capable of representing multiscale features, a hierarchical multiscale decomposition framework is required. In this study, we develop the Lifting Neural Operator (LiNO), a multiresolution operator built on the second-generation wavelet lifting scheme. LiNO learns a multiresolution decomposition directly from data by parameterizing the lifting transform. This lifting transformation is adaptive to the underlying solution function and exactly invertible by construction, enabling information-preserving multiscale operator learning. In the lifted multiresolution space, the operator evolves coarse and directional detail coefficients separately, resulting in scale-aware modeling of the underlying physics. We evaluate LiNO on several benchmarks, including Darcy flow, the Poisson equation, the Allen-Cahn equation, the compressible Navier-Stokes equation, and the Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion system. Together, these benchmarks cover a wide range of physical behaviors, including multiscale phenomena, transport-dominated dynamics, and chaotic systems. LiNO demonstrates strong performance on these challenging benchmarks compared with state-of-the-art neural operators. These results suggest that adaptive multiresolution operators provide a promising direction for scientific machine learning.

</details>


### [673] [Weighted Conformal Prediction for Lab-to-Track Thermal Transfer in EV Motorsport Powertrains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02722)
*Varshith Roy Kotla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究利用共形预测（Conformal Prediction）解决电动汽车动力总成热预测中的“实验室到赛道”迁移问题。实验发现，标准EnbPI方法在分布偏移下覆盖率从95%降至70.13%；引入加权EnbPI后仅恢复至72.42%，改进有限。在F1真实遥测数据上的无监督检测也显示高报警率，表明共形域适应在此问题上是部分可行但远未完善的工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高性能电动汽车动力总成的热波动难以预测，因为内部温度在实验室外几乎不可观测，且基于实验室标准工况（如FUDS）标定的模型在真实载荷下会失效。因此，需要能够在分布偏移下提供可靠不确定性保证的方法。

Method: 使用EnbPI（集成批量预测区间）作为基础共形预测方法，并在真实分布偏移（CALCE US06工况，45°C）下评估。提出加权EnbPI，将EnbPI的集成残差与密度比加权（Tibshirani et al., 2019）结合，其中密度比通过概率性域分类器估计。此外，在2023年F1遥测数据上进行无监督的分布外检测。

Result: EnbPI在分布内实现95.00%的名义覆盖率，在真实偏移下降至70.13%。加权EnbPI仅恢复至72.42%，改进幅度有限。F1数据上，Monza报警率65.6%，Silverstone 58.0%，远高于分布内的5%基线，且与刹车/DRS区域关联不一致。

Conclusion: 共形域适应是解决实验室到赛道热预测问题的有前景但仅部分可用的工具，论文诚实地指出了具体不足之处，即加权方法改进有限，且无监督检测结果尚不可靠。

Abstract: Predicting thermal volatility in high-performance EV powertrains is difficult as internal temperatures are rarely observable outside the lab, and models calibrated on lab drive cycles fail when deployed against real-world loads. We study this lab-to-track transfer problem using conformal prediction, offering distribution-free uncertainty bounds. We implement Ensemble Batch Prediction Intervals (EnbPI; Xu & Xie, 2021), a leave-one-out bootstrap-ensemble conformal method for autocorrelated time series, and calibrate it on real CALCE lithium-ion cycler data (A123 SP20 cells, FUDS profile). We evaluate it under a genuine, measured covariate shift: a second real CALCE test condition (US06 Highway Driving Schedule at 45°C). The unweighted EnbPI bound, achieving its nominal 95% coverage in-distribution (measured: 95.00%), degrades to 70.13% empirical coverage under this real shift. We introduce a weighted EnbPI procedure combining EnbPI's ensemble residuals with density-ratio weighting (Tibshirani et al., 2019), estimating the density ratio via a probabilistic domain classifier. This recovers coverage to 72.42%, a modest, honestly-reported improvement, not a complete fix. We additionally apply the calibrated model to real 2023 Formula 1 telemetry (Monza and Silverstone, driver VER) as an unsupervised out-of-distribution diagnostic. Because no internal thermal channel exists in public trackside telemetry, we report only unsupervised flag rates (65.6% at Monza, 58.0% at Silverstone, well above the 5% in-distribution base rate) and note inconsistent associations between flags and braking/DRS zones. We conclude that conformal domain adaptation is a promising but only partially solved tool for this problem, detailing exactly where it falls short.

</details>


### [674] [Out-of-Distribution Generalization of Risk Aversion in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02755)
*Kristina Zhang,Junior Chinomso Okoroafor,Benjamin Maltbie,Andrew Lin,Abhitej Bokka,Elliott Thornley*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现，在低 stakes 下训练AI的风险厌恶倾向可以在一定程度上泛化到极端高 stakes 场景（跨越98个数量级），但尚不足以作为可靠的安全机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 如果AI出现对齐问题，风险厌恶的AI会更倾向于选择合作而非叛乱等高风险高回报策略，从而限制失控的负面影响。但关键在于，人工只能训练AI在低赌注下的风险厌恶，这种能力是否能泛化到天文数字级别的赌注场景尚不清楚。

Method: 构建了RiskAverseOOD基准测试，使用SFT、DPO、激活引导等多种方法让Qwen3-8B在低 stakes 下选择风险厌恶行为，然后测试其在极高 stakes 下的泛化能力。同时在不同规模（1.7B/14B）和模型家族（Gemma-3-12B-IT, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct）上进行复现验证。

Result: 基线2%的安全合作选择率提升至：SFT和tie training约70%、DPO约52%、激活引导约39%。训练的奖励模型在区分风险厌恶推理方面达99.6%的配对准确率。风险厌恶在跨98个数量级上实现了部分泛化。

Conclusion: 低 stakes 下习得的风险厌恶可以部分泛化到极端高 stakes 场景，但一致性仍不足以作为可靠的安全保障，实现完全一致性是待解决的关键问题。

Abstract: Training AIs to be risk-averse in resources could offer a failsafe in the event that AIs turn out misaligned. Misaligned but risk-averse AIs would tend to prefer low-risk, low-reward strategies like cooperation over high-risk, high-reward strategies like rebellion, limiting the downsides of any misalignment. But we can only feasibly train AIs to be risk-averse on low-stakes gambles, and we will only be safe if their risk aversion generalizes to astronomically-high-stakes gambles. Will it? To shed light on this question, we introduce RiskAverseOOD: a benchmark for measuring how well risk aversion generalizes out of distribution. We then offer some initial results. Using a variety of methods to make Qwen3-8B choose risk-aversely when the stakes are low, we find that we can induce substantial risk aversion when the stakes are astronomically high. Our models' learned risk aversion generalizes at least partially across 98 orders of magnitude. From a baseline 2% rate of choosing a safe `Cooperate' option, we see rates around 70% (SFT and tie training), 52% (DPO), and 39% (activation steering). In another experiment, our fine-tuned reward model reliably scores risk-averse reasoning above risk-neutral or excessively risk-averse alternatives (99.6% pairwise accuracy). We replicate these effects at different scales (Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-14B) and across model families (Gemma-3-12B-IT and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct). Overall, we find that risk aversion learned at low stakes can generalize OOD to astronomically high stakes, though not yet consistently enough to serve as a reliable failsafe. Achieving that level of consistency is an open problem.

</details>


### [675] [Safe Inference-Time Alignment via Lagrangian Reward Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02781)
*Yaswanth Chittepu,Ativ Joshi,Sohini Chintala,Scott Niekum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LARA框架，通过在推理时引入对偶变量将安全约束转化为增强奖励，在不重新训练模型的情况下实现安全对齐，在序列级和词级推理方法上均取得更好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法仅优化单一标量分数，无法显式处理安全约束，要么忽略安全约束，要么通过手动调节惩罚来编码，缺乏原则性方法。

Method: 从KL正则化的约束优化目标出发（含奖励模型和成本模型），将对偶约束简化为一维凸优化问题，通过小规模校准集估计对偶变量，定义增强奖励，可即插即用于现有推理时对齐方法。

Result: LARA改进了有用性与无害性之间的权衡，其中Best-of-N方法在推理时方法中表现最佳，接近基于微调的直接对齐基线。

Conclusion: LARA提供了一种原则性的、无需重新训练模型的推理时安全对齐框架，在序列级方法中可精确满足期望成本约束，在词级方法中提供有理论依据的启发式方案。

Abstract: Inference-time alignment steers a frozen language model during decoding using auxiliary reward signals, avoiding the cost of repeated weight updates. However, existing inference-time alignment methods typically optimize a single scalar score, so explicit safety constraints must either be ignored or encoded through manually tuned penalties. We propose Lagrangian Reward Augmentation (LARA), a general inference-time alignment framework under safety constraints. Starting from a KL-regularized constrained objective with a reward model and a cost model, LARA dualizes the constraint and reduces the optimization problem to a one-dimensional convex problem over a nonnegative dual variable. Estimated on a small calibration set, this dual variable defines an augmented reward that can be used as a drop-in scoring signal within existing inference-time alignment methods. For sequence-level sampling methods, such as Best-of-N reranking, the calibrated dual variable corresponds to the solution of the expected-cost constrained problem. For token-level reward-guided decoding methods, the same construction yields a principled dual-calibrated heuristic rather than an exact constrained-policy guarantee. We evaluate LARA on both sequence-level and token-level inference-time alignment methods, and find that LARA improves the helpfulness-harmlessness tradeoff, with Best-of-N achieving the best performance among inference-time methods, approaching finetuning-based direct alignment baselines.

</details>


### [676] [Induction Heads Interpolate N-Grams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02800)
*Francesco D'Angelo,Oguz Kaan Yuksel,Swathi Shree Narashiman,Nicolas Flammarion*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Transformer中的归纳头（induction heads）在基于阶-k马尔可夫链的上下文学习中所实现的平滑估计机制，揭示了两种互补策略：软上下文匹配估计和BOS令牌引入的伪计数平滑，并证明训练后的Transformer能恢复这些模式，在多种设置下匹配或超越经典计数基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 归纳头被认为是Transformer中上下文学习的关键注意力回路，但其具体实现的估计器一直缺乏精确刻画。本文旨在通过理论分析和可解释性工具，揭示归纳头在统计平滑中的具体作用机制。

Method: 研究团队在阶-k马尔可夫链上训练Transformer，分析归纳头的注意力模式。他们构建了一个解耦的Transformer模型，显式实现两种平滑机制：1) 软上下文匹配估计（类似Jelinek-Mercer平滑），通过指数加权的重叠度聚合精确和部分上下文匹配；2) BOS令牌引入的伪计数（类似Dirichlet平滑）。并通过实验验证训练模型是否恢复预测的注意力模式。

Result: 训练后的Transformer能够恢复理论预测的注意力模式。在伪计数平滑最优或低阶上下文提供结构化证据的场景中，训练后的Transformer匹配或超越了传统的基于计数的基线方法。

Conclusion: 本文桥接了归纳头的机械可解释性与经典统计平滑理论，揭示了Transformer并非简单地计数，而是学习对上下文估计进行正则化（平滑）处理。这表明Transformer具有隐式的统计平滑能力，是其上下文学习成功的关键因素之一。

Abstract: Induction heads are attention circuits believed to underlie in-context learning in transformers, yet a precise characterization of the estimators they implement remains elusive. We study transformers trained on order-$k$ Markov chains and identify two complementary smoothing mechanisms. First, at finite attention-weight scale, the circuit implements a soft context-matching estimator: it aggregates contributions from exact and partial context matches, weighted exponentially by their overlap, and induces a data-dependent interpolation across context orders analogous to Jelinek-Mercer smoothing. Second, a beginning-of-sequence (BOS) token induces additive pseudo-counts, recovering Dirichlet-style smoothing. We construct a disentangled transformer implementing both mechanisms and show that trained transformers recover the predicted attention patterns. Across settings where pseudo-count smoothing is optimal or lower-order contexts provide structured evidence, trained transformers match or outperform classical count-based baselines. Our results bridge mechanistic interpretability of induction heads with classical statistical smoothing, revealing that transformers learn to regularize in-context estimation rather than simply count.

</details>


### [677] [Training Hybrid Block Diffusion Language Models with Partial Bidirectionality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02805)
*Pranshu Chaturvedi,Parth Shroff,Tarun Suresh,Hangoo Kang,Kaiyue Wen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BDLM Mamba-H，一种混合Mamba和Attention的块扩散语言模型，通过限制反向Mamba扫描到当前去噪块来实现精确缓存，在长上下文生成中实现19.7x吞吐量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文生成受限于内存带宽而非计算能力，因为每个解码步骤都需要从内存中流式读取KV缓存。先前工作尝试将高效注意力变体/线性时间混合器（如Mamba）与块级并行生成相结合，但双向Mamba扩散模型的反向扫描需要扫描整个序列，无法实现缓存复用。

Method: 提出BDLM Mamba-H架构，将反向Mamba扫描限制在活跃的去噪块内，从而实现跨块的精确缓存。该架构混合了Mamba和Attention，支持逐块扩散生成。

Result: 在87M参数DCLM实验中，BDLM Mamba-H取得了最佳的C4-en验证困惑度；在350M参数下与BDLM Attention表现竞争力相当。在长上下文推理中，65K tokens下吞吐量达到全序列DiffuMamba-H的19.7倍，262K tokens下达到BDLM Attention的3.7倍。

Conclusion: Mamba混合架构是长上下文扩散模型的一个有潜力的方向，能够在保持生成质量的同时大幅提升吞吐量。
