Existing approaches often face a trade-off between model interpretability and representational capacity, with most either relying on post-hoc interpretation or use linear models that may overlook complex interactions. We report Pathway Activity Autoencoders for the multi-omics setting, which embed prior knowledge via pathway-informed architectural constraints, fostering interpretability, while preserving representational power. Our multi-omic framework is applied in the context of breast cancer and is evaluated in survival prediction and subtype classification with results indicating a positive effect of integration. We conduct analysis of individual omics layer impact on end-task performance, revealing that gene, protein, and microRNA expression layers provide the strongest contribution. Repeatability studies indicate that, while dropout improves model robustness and consistency, excessive regularisation can reduce predictive performance. Finally, visualizations of the learned feature space illustrate the framework's intrinsic transparency and clinical relevance. The results underscore the value of multi-omic integration and delineate the impact of individual omics layers, establishing practical guidelines for integration within our framework. Overall, our pathway activity autoencoder frameworks yield superior latent representations that are biologically meaningful and are directly translatable into clinically relevant insights.

</details>


### [894] [How Far is Too Far? Defining the Distance Threshold for Verification Siamese Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05329)
*Heloísa Dias Viotto,Cauê Samonek,Lucas Garcia Pedroso,Marcos Sunye,André Abed Grégio,Paulo Lisboa de Almeida*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无监督方法，通过拟合孪生验证网络输出距离的双峰分布并寻找谷底，自动确定验证阈值，无需标注数据。在四个数据集上达到94%的平均验证准确率，与需要标签的等错误率方法相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孪生验证网络需要设置距离阈值来判断两个对象是否属于同一类别，但传统阈值确定方法依赖标注数据，成本高且难以在实际部署环境中动态更新。

Method: 假设孪生网络输出的距离分布近似为双峰函数（同类距离小，异类距离大），通过寻找两个模式之间的极小值点来自动确定验证阈值，全程无需标注样本。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、LFW、PKLot四个数据集上平均验证准确率达到94%，与需要标签的等错误率方法性能相当。

Conclusion: 所提出的无监督阈值确定方法在消除对标注数据依赖的同时，能达到与有监督方法可比的验证性能，适用于实际部署环境中的动态阈值更新。

Abstract: Siamese verification networks are widely used to compare items such as faces, cars, or signatures. In these scenarios, the network is trained to learn an embedding space in which similar objects are mapped closer together, while dissimilar objects are mapped further apart. Two objects are considered to belong to the same class (e.g., the same person in two different images) when the distance between their embeddings falls below a predefined threshold. Defining this threshold, however, is a non-trivial task and typically requires labeled data. In this work, we assume that the distribution of distances produced by a siamese verification network can be approximated by a bimodal function. Based on this assumption, we propose an unsupervised method to determine the verification threshold by identifying the minimum point between the two modes. The proposed approach does not require annotated samples, enabling the verification threshold to be updated directly in the deployment environment without the cost of manual labeling. We evaluate our method on four datasets: MNIST, CIFAR-10, LFW, and PKLot. The results indicate that the proposed approach achieves an average verification accuracy of 94%, comparable to the Equal Error Rate method, while eliminating the need for labeled data.

</details>


### [895] [TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05339)
*Yuanda Xu,Zhengze Zhou,Kayhan Behdin,Jelena Markovic-Voronov,Hejian Sang,Xiaomin Li,Wenhui Zhu,Xinchen Du,Aida Rahmattalabi,Ran He,Sen Na,Zhipeng Wang,Alborz Geramifard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TREK是一种分阶段训练框架，通过前向KL散度蒸馏教师模型的已验证解来扩展学生策略的探索支持，解决GRPO在困难提示上因正确解模式不在策略分布内而停滞的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO在困难提示上失效，因为学生的当前策略无法采样到正确的推理轨迹（正确解模式落在策略支持集之外），需要一种方法将外部知识引入以扩展探索空间。

Method: 1) 识别学生通过率低的困难样本；2) 从提案源（黑箱教师、白箱教师或自上下文）获取验证过的候选解；3) 按学生当前似然保留top-r提案；4) 执行短期的前向KL阶段将这些模式拉入学生支持集；5) 返回标准GRPO精炼。

Result: 数学推理：Qwen3-8B在AIME 2025上从36.9提升至40.3，AIME 2024从47.9提升至51.1（avg@16）。智能体任务：ALFWorld从75.8提升至82.8，ScienceWorld从12.5提升至26.7。在困难任务类型上，TREK早期就达到高成功率，而GRPO需要更多优化步骤。

Conclusion: TREK是一种通用、高效的分阶段训练策略，通过蒸馏教师已验证解来扩展探索支持，显著提升GRPO在困难提示上的表现，且不依赖教师模型内部信息。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is effective when the current policy already samples useful reasoning trajectories, but it stalls on hard prompts whose correct solution modes lie outside the student's on-policy support. We propose TREK (Teacher-Routed Exploration via Forward KL), a simple staged procedure that uses distillation not for imitation but for exploration support expansion. A key advantage of TREK is its generality: because it only consumes verified output trajectories, it can use an external black-box teacher, a white-box teacher, or the same model given additional inference-time context, and it can efficiently identify which hard-prompt samples are most worth consolidating even when teacher internals are unavailable. TREK first identifies prompts where the unaided student has very low pass rate, queries a proposal source to produce verified candidate solutions, keeps the top-$r$ proposals ranked by current student likelihood, applies a short forward-KL phase to pull those verified modes into the student's support, and then returns to standard on-policy GRPO refinement. On mathematical reasoning, TREK with DeepSeek-V4 proposals improves Qwen3 models across all tested scales on AIME 2024 and AIME 2025; for Qwen3-8B, it improves AIME 2025 from 36.9 to 40.3 and AIME 2024 from 47.9 to 51.1 (avg@16), while the self-context variant reaches 38.5 and 49.6 without an external teacher. On agentic tasks, TREK raises ALFWorld success rate from 75.8 to 82.8 and ScienceWorld success rate from 12.5 to 26.7; notably, on the hardest task types, TREK achieves high success rates early in training while unaided GRPO requires substantially more optimization steps to reach comparable levels.

</details>


### [896] [CompactionRL: Reinforcement Learning with Context Compaction for Long-Horizon Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05378)
*Yujiang Li,Zhenyu Hou,Yi Jing,Jie Tang,Yuxiao Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CompactionRL，一种将上下文压缩融入强化学习训练长程agentic LLM的策略，通过联合优化任务执行与摘要生成，显著提升了SWE-bench和Terminal-Bench等编码任务的Pass@1表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长程agentic LLM在执行复杂任务时，交互轨迹常超出有限上下文窗口的限制。现有上下文压缩方案未与强化学习有效结合，导致压缩后的信息难以被agent有效利用进行学习。

Method: 提出CompactionRL框架，包含三个关键技术：1) token级损失归一化，平衡任务执行与摘要生成的学习信号；2) 跨轨迹广义优势估计（GAE），在压缩后的长程轨迹上计算优势函数；3) 联合优化任务执行和摘要生成两个目标。

Result: 在GLM-4.5-Air模型上，SWE-bench Verified Pass@1达66.8%（+7.0），Terminal-Bench 2.0达24.5%（+3.1）；在GLM-4.7-Flash模型上，分别达到56.0%（+5.5）和20.2%（+6.8）。已部署于GLM-5.2模型训练。

Conclusion: CompactionRL有效解决了长程agentic LLM的上下文窗口限制问题，通过强化学习框架实现了压缩轨迹上的有效学习，在多个开源模型和基准测试上取得一致提升，证明了该方法的通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Long-horizon agentic LLMs are increasingly limited by finite context windows, as extended interaction trajectories can exceed the maximum context length before a task is completed. Context compaction offers a natural solution by summarizing previous interaction states and continuing the rollout under a compressed context, but incorporating compaction into reinforcement learning remains underexplored. We propose CompactionRL, a reinforcement learning strategy to train long-horizon agentic LLMs with context compaction. Our approach jointly optimizes task execution and summary generation with token-level loss normalization and cross-trajectory generalized advantage estimation. This design enables the LLM agents to learn from compacted long-horizon trajectories. We train CompactionRL on top of open models and observe consistent performance gains on agentic coding tasks. CompactionRL enables the open GLM-4.5-Air model (106B-A30B) to achieve Pass@1 scores of 66.8% on SWE-bench Verified and 24.5% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, with absolute gains of 7.0 and 3.1 points, respectively. Built upon GLM-4.7-Flash (30B-A3B), CompactionRL improves Pass@1 by 5.5 and 6.8 points, reaching 56.0% on SWE-bench Verified and 20.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, respectively. CompactionRL is thus deployed in the RL pipeline for training the open GLM-5.2 model (750B-A40B).

</details>


### [897] [TabPack: Efficient Hyperparameter Ensembles for Tabular Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05380)
*Yury Gorishniy,Akim Kotelnikov,Ivan Rubachev,Artem Babenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabPack是一种高效MLP集成方法，通过并行采样和训练不同超参数的MLP并动态选择成员，无需精确调参即可在表格数据任务上达到与经过大量调优的现有方法相当的性能，显著降低了计算资源和调优成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的高效MLP集成方法对所有底层MLP使用相同超参数，需要超参数调优才能达到最佳性能，这耗费大量计算资源和人力。作者希望减少对传统调优的依赖，同时保持强性能。

Method: TabPack在单次运行中高效地并行采样和训练多个具有不同超参数的MLP，并在训练过程中动态选择集成成员。用户只需指定超参数采样范围而非精确值，降低了对精度的要求。

Result: 在中大型公开数据集上，使用默认设置的TabPack与经过大量调优的现有方法性能相当。在MacBook上运行默认TabPack配置的时间甚至少于在行业级GPU上调优某些基线方法所需的时间。

Conclusion: TabPack以更少的调优努力和计算资源实现了有竞争力的表格数据任务性能，是一种高效且实用的MLP集成方法。

Abstract: In deep learning for tabular data, efficient ensembles of multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have recently emerged as effective and practical architectures. Existing methods of this kind use the same hyperparameters for all underlying MLPs, which requires hyperparameter tuning for achieving the best performance. In this work, we introduce TabPack, an efficient MLP ensemble with strong out-of-the-box performance and reduced reliance on traditional tuning. In a single run, TabPack samples and trains many MLPs with different hyperparameters efficiently in parallel and selects ensemble members on the fly during training. Thus, TabPack only requires specifying ranges from which to sample MLP hyperparameter rather than exact hyperparameter values, which naturally demands less precision for good performance. In experiments on medium-to-large public datasets, TabPack with default settings performs on par with extensively tuned prior methods, thus substantially reducing effort and compute resources needed to achieve competitive results on tabular tasks. Notably, running the default TabPack configuration on a modern MacBook took less time than tuning some baselines on an industry-grade GPU.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [898] [Lights, Camera, Carbon: Architectural Scaling Laws for Video Generation Energy Consumption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04553)
*Nidhal Jegham,Boris Gamazaychikov,Sasha Luccioni*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出了一种从架构原理和生成参数（分辨率、时长）正向预测T2V/T2VA模型能耗、反向恢复架构缩放行为的双向框架，无需访问模型权重。基于视频扩散模型的计算受限特性，能耗服从二次和线性项的缩放律，系数反映架构复杂度。在6个开源模型（8.3B-27B参数）和3种GPU配置上验证，MAPE低于3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏无需访问模型内部细节即可标准化评估T2V/T2VA模型能源消耗的框架，难以进行可持续性基准测试。

Method: 提出双向框架：前向从生成参数和架构原理预测能耗；反向从观测推理时间恢复架构缩放行为。基于视频扩散模型计算受限特性，推导出能耗服从二次+线性项的缩放律，系数反映架构复杂度。

Result: 在6个开源模型（8.3B-27B参数）和3种GPU配置上验证，能耗分解的平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）低于3%。

Conclusion: 提供了一个标准化、有理论依据的可持续性基准测试框架，适用于不同T2V模型和架构。

Abstract: We present a bidirectional framework for estimating the energy consumption of text-to-video (T2V) and text-to-video-audio (T2VA) models from architectural first principles and observable generation parameters such as resolution and duration, requiring no access to weights, model size, or implementation details. Forward, it predicts energy from generation parameters and architectural principles; backward, it recovers architectural scaling behavior from observed inference times, with accuracy serving as a criterion for architectural validity. Building on the established compute-bound nature of video diffusion models, we demonstrate that each model's energy profile obeys theoretically derived scaling laws, decomposing into quadratic and linear terms whose coefficients directly reflect the underlying architectural complexity. Validated across six open-source models spanning 8.3B-27B parameters and three GPU configurations, this decomposition achieves below 3% MAPE across all architectures. This approach offers a standardized, empirically and theoretically grounded framework for sustainability benchmarking across T2V models and architectures.

</details>


### [899] [SleepBand: Single-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging via Physiologically Structured Spectral Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04851)
*Zhi Lu,Yang Hu,Yan Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: SleepBand是一个基于生理知识的单源域泛化睡眠分期框架，通过可学习的Morlet滤波器组和集成-再校准机制，将模型表征锚定在域不变的睡眠节律上，在五个公开数据集上达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有睡眠分期模型在不同数据集间泛化困难，而领域泛化方法通常需要多个源域或域标签，这在实践中难以获得。作者希望在更严格且实用的单源域泛化设定下提升模型鲁棒性。

Method: 提出SleepBand框架，包含可学习的Morlet滤波器组来嵌入振荡先验知识，以及结构化的集成-再校准（integration-and-recalibration）流程，将表征锚定在慢波、纺锤波等域不变的睡眠节律上，减少对数据集特定伪影的依赖。

Result: 在五个公开数据集上，SleepBand在单源域泛化设定下达到了最先进性能，在留一域（多源域）泛化设定下也保持竞争力。分析表明学习到的滤波器与经典神经生理学对齐，鲁棒性源于对窄带、生理相关特征的关注。

Conclusion: 基于生理知识的归纳偏置是实现鲁棒单源域睡眠分期泛化的有效路径。

Abstract: Generalizing sleep staging models to unseen datasets is challenging, and typical domain generalization (DG) methods often rely on multiple source domains or domain labels that are rarely available in practice. We tackle the stricter and more practical setting of single-source domain generalization: training on a single labeled source dataset, without domain labels or access to target data. We present SleepBand, a physiology-guided framework that embeds oscillatory priors via a learnable Morlet filter bank and a structured integration-and-recalibration pipeline. This anchors representations to domain-invariant sleep rhythms (e.g., slow waves, spindles), reducing reliance on dataset-specific artefacts. On five public datasets, SleepBand achieves state-of-the-art SDG performance and remains competitive under leave-one-domain-out (multi-source) DG. Analyses show that the learned filters align with canonical neurophysiology and that robustness stems from focusing on narrowband, physiologically meaningful cues. Our results suggest that principled, physiology-aware inductive biases are a promising path for robust single-domain sleep staging. Code is available at https://github.com/lzcn/sleep-band

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [900] [Adaptive Enhanced Quantum-inspired Simulated Bifurcation Algorithm for Population State Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02540)
*Dongmei Liu,Jian Li,Xiubo Chen,JinTao Wang*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种由种群状态驱动的自适应增强量子启发模拟分岔（AE-QSB）框架，通过感知四种不同的种群状态建立感知-决策-执行的闭环策略，并引入三种互补算法。在G1-G81基准图上，AE-QSB在74.6%的图上取得了最低平均差距，在84.5%的图上取得了最高平均逼近率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子启发模拟分岔算法依赖动态调度方法，但无法有效适应不同问题实例，且在进化阶段难以平衡探索与利用。根本问题在于广泛使用静态预设参数和全局统一策略，导致算法效果下降和结果同质化。

Method: 提出AE-QSB框架，利用四种种群状态的感知指标建立闭环策略。框架内包含三种互补算法：高效极值搜索（ME-BSB）、种群级均匀细化（SE-DSB）和密度感知自适应调度（SG-DSB）。采用子群探索和救援机制进行自适应控制。

Result: 在中等规模图G22上，SE-DSB和SG-DSB平均差距低于0.05%，ME-BSB以0.26%差距和最短单次运行时间取得最优权衡。在G1-G81基准图上，AE-QSB在74.6%图上取得最低平均差距，84.5%图上取得最高平均逼近率。

Conclusion: 种群动态演化中的统计信息为自适应控制提供了可计算且有效的基础，使量子启发优化方法能够从固定调度转向数据驱动的闭环控制。

Abstract: Existing quantum-inspired simulated bifurcation algorithms rely on dynamic scheduling methods but lack the ability to adapt effectively to different problem instances. Additionally, during the evolutionary stage, balancing exploration and exploitation remains challenging. The fundamental issue stems from the widespread use of static preset parameters and globally uniform strategies, which can diminish algorithm effectiveness and lead to result homogenization. This article proposes an Adaptive Enhanced Quantum-inspired Simulated Bifurcation (AE-QSB) framework driven by population states. By leveraging perception indicators of four distinct population states, the QSB algorithm establishes a closed-loop strategy encompassing perception, decision-making, and execution. Within this framework, we introduce three complementary algorithms spanning a spectrum from efficient extremum seeking (ME-BSB), through population-level uniform refinement (SE-DSB), to density-aware adaptive scheduling (SG-DSB). On the medium-sized graph G22, both SE-DSB and SG-DSB achieve a mean gap below 0.05\%, while ME-BSB attains the optimal trade-off between runtime and solution quality with a gap of 0.26\% and the shortest single-run time. We compared AE-QSB variants with other algorithms across all benchmark graphs from G1 to G81. The results demonstrate that AE-QSB achieved the lowest mean gap on 74.6\% of the graphs and the highest average approximation rate on 84.5\% of the graphs. Ablation experiments further revealed that subgroup exploration and rescue mechanisms play crucial roles in both multifactor and single-factor components. This study demonstrates that population statistical information during dynamic evolution provides a computable and effective foundation for adaptive control, enabling quantum-inspired optimization methods to transition from fixed scheduling to data-driven closed-loop control.

</details>


### [901] [A Spiking Sequence Generator for Polar Trajectories on Neuromorphic Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02753)
*William R. P. Nourse,Roger D. Quinn*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于赢家通吃（WTA）架构的脉冲神经网络（SNN），用于生成极坐标轨迹，并在SpiNNaker2神经形态处理器上实现，相比传统计算平台在步长时间上降低2-3个数量级，能耗降低3-4个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的神经形态控制器要么使用不可解释的端到端训练脉冲网络，要么使用无法充分利用神经形态动力学的转换后经典控制器，缺乏既节能又在系统动力学层面可解释的方案。

Method: 采用WTA架构并添加辅助种群来诱导神经活动的受控转换；利用分流抑制实现方向、速度和半径的独立控制；设计了种群动力学的调谐规则。

Result: 在SpiNNaker2上实现后，与传统平台相比，壁钟步进时间降低2-3个数量级，能耗降低3-4个数量级。

Conclusion: 该SNN架构在保持可解释性的同时，在资源受限系统中实现了极高的能效和实时性，适合神经形态控制器的实际部署。

Abstract: Neuromorphic controllers for size, weight, and power-constrained systems require neural architectures that are both energy-efficient and interpretable at the level of system dynamics. However, existing approaches either rely on end-to-end trained spiking networks with limited interpretability, or on converted classical controllers that fail to fully exploit neuromorphic dynamics. We present a spiking neural network (SNN) architecture for generating polar trajectories, using a winner-take-all (WTA) architecture with accessory populations that induce controlled transitions in neural activity. We demonstrate tuning rules for these population dynamics, and utilize a form of shunting inhibition to enable independent control of direction, speed, and radius of the resulting polar trajectories. We implement the network on the SpiNNaker2 neuromorphic processor, and demonstrate a two to three orders of magnitude reduction in wall-clock step time and three to four orders of magnitude reduction in energy expenditure when compared to conventional computing platforms.

</details>


### [902] [Microcosmos: Reimagining Artificial Life for the GPU Era](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02954)
*Mark Tensen,Ciaran Regan,Bert Wang-Chak Chan,Mizuki Oka,Kenneth O. Stanley,Grisha Szep*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出Microcosmos，一个基于GPU、端到端可微分的二维粘性流体人工生命模拟引擎，生命体建模为弹性细丝链，支持大规模并行模拟，并通过四个实验验证了其物理合理性、可微分性、进化能力及可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人工生命模拟器要么在抽象基质上运行而与物理现实脱节，要么模拟物理世界但无法扩展至开放进化所需的大种群规模。Microcosmos旨在弥合这一gap，提供既物理可信又计算可扩展的模拟平台。

Method: 生命体建模为弹性细丝链，在二维粘性流体世界中运动；从底层为现代GPU硬件设计，支持端到端可微模拟；采用神经进化（Neuroevolution）和质-多样性搜索（Quality-Diversity search）自动发现行为。

Result: 四个实验验证：手设计的运动策略确认流体耦合符合物理约束；基于梯度的细丝折叠优化证实可微分性与编码表达力；神经进化和质-多样性搜索自动产生多种游泳和趋化行为；性能随粒子数线性扩展。

Conclusion: Microcosmos作为开源平台发布，长期目标是支持大规模开放进化模拟，实现物理合理性与计算可扩展性的统一。

Abstract: Most artificial life simulators either operate on abstract substrates disconnected from physical reality, or simulate physically grounded worlds that do not scale to the population sizes required for open-ended evolution. We present Microcosmos, a simulation engine in which artificial lifeforms are modeled as elastic filament chains inhabiting a two-dimensional viscous fluid world, designed from the ground up for modern GPU hardware and end-to-end differentiable simulation. We validate the engine through four experiments. Hand-designed locomotion strategies confirm that the fluid coupling respects known physical constraints. Gradient-based optimization of filament folding demonstrates both the full differentiability of the simulator and the expressivity of the filament encodings. Neuroevolution and quality-diversity search produce a wide range of swimming and chemotaxis behaviors automatically. Linear scaling with particle count confirms the engine supports large-scale simulation. Microcosmos is released as an open platform with the long-term goal of supporting large-scale open-ended evolutionary simulations, designed to be physically plausible and computationally scalable.

</details>


### [903] [A Large-Scale Sparse Multiobjective Optimization Algorithm Based on Optimal Performance Scores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04765)
*Jia-Lin Mai,Min-Rong Chen,Guo-Qiang Zeng,Xiang Liu,Jian Weng*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文针对大规模稀疏多目标优化问题（LSSMOPs），提出了一种新的进化算法，通过创新的初始化方法、变量重要性评分、掩码向量模板、自适应变异概率以及基于Pareto引导正态分布的实变量优化策略，在8个基准问题和3个实际应用中取得了优于现有算法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模稀疏多目标优化问题中决策变量数量庞大，但最优解仅包含少量非零变量。随着变量数增长，准确识别非零变量变得困难，优化性能受到严重影响。现有方法难以有效解决这一问题。

Method: 1) 提出新的初始化方法，生成能准确反映变量重要性的分数；2) 设计初始掩码向量模板，用于定位非零变量，进而生成高质量初始种群；3) 提出新的自适应变异概率计算策略；4) 基于Pareto引导的正态分布对实变量进行优化，帮助种群跳出局部最优并快速收敛到全局最优。

Result: 在8个基准测试问题和3个实际应用上的实验结果表明，所提算法相比当前最先进算法具有更优越的性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的进化算法有效解决了大规模稀疏多目标优化中的变量识别困难和优化性能下降问题，通过创新的初始化与优化策略，实现了比现有方法更优的性能表现。

Abstract: Large-scale sparse multiobjective optimization problems (LSSMOPs) involve a large number of decision variables and Pareto optimal solutions with only a few nonzero variables. However, as the number of decision variables grows, it becomes increasingly challenging to accurately identify the nonzero variables, and optimization performance is adversely affected. To address these issues, this paper proposes an evolutionary algorithm for LSSMOPs. Specifically, we propose a new initialization method capable of generating scores that accurately reflect the importance of variables, and an initial mask vector template that can locate nonzero variables. This leads to the generation of a high-quality initial population. Additionally, this paper introduces a new strategy to calculate the mutation probability for each variable and a novel optimization for real variables based on the Pareto-guided normal distribution, enabling the population to avoid being trapped in local optima and quickly converge to the global optimum. Experimental results from eight benchmark problems and three real-world applications demonstrate that the proposed algorithm achieves superior performance compared with state-of-the-art algorithms.

</details>


### [904] [LLM for the development of FCM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04983)
*Alexis Kafantaris*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出利用本地大语言模型（如Qwen2.5-32B）从文本数据中提取数值信息，用于构建数据驱动的模糊认知图（FCM）。以TripAdvisor上的希腊酒店评论为例，模型提取数据并训练出星型拓扑FCM，揭示评论者的偏好。外部验证表明，该FCM能够将评论的星级评分（模型推理范围之外的结果）与预测的满意度关联起来。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证本地大语言模型（如Qwen2.5-32B）是否能够从文本数据中提取定量信息，并利用这些信息构建数据驱动的模糊认知图，从而拓展LLM在知识建模和决策支持中的应用范围。

Method: 使用本地大语言模型Qwen2.5-32B，将实体作为提示输入，提取相关定量数据；利用提取的数据构建模糊认知图；以TripAdvisor上的希腊酒店评论为数据源，评论文本未经筛选直接输入模型；训练并评估FCM，形成星型拓扑结构以反映评论者偏好；进行外部验证，检验FCM能否将评论的星级评分与预测满意度关联。

Result: 成功利用本地LLM从酒店评论中提取定量数据，构建了反映评论者偏好的星型拓扑模糊认知图；外部验证表明，该FCM能够将评论的星级评分（模型推理范围外的输出）与预测的满意度相关联。

Conclusion: 本地大语言模型可有效从文本中提取定量信息用于构建FCM，且构建的FCM具有良好的外部有效性，能够关联模型未直接推理的星级评分与满意度，为数据驱动的认知建模提供了可行路径。

Abstract: This article is about the development of a fuzzy cognitive map using a local large language model. In the light of recent advances it is evident that large language models, and even local large language models are capable of extracting quantities from textual data. In other words, a local LLM like Qwen2.5-32B, or probably larger, can accept entities as prompt input and determine relevant quantitative data as the model output. In turn, this output can be utilized for the construction of a data driven fuzzy cognitive map. Hence, this implementation is achieved and then the model is thoroughly tested; Qwen2.5-32B is used and the data is extracted from hotel reviews from TripAdvisor. Furthermore, the extracted documents pass through the model unfiltered and then a fuzzy cognitive map is trained and evaluated. A case is made about Greek reviews where a star topology FCM is formed that indicates the preferences of the reviewers. Finally, external validation is performed to establish whether the fuzzy cognitive map can correlate the star rating of the review -an outcome outside the model's inference scope -with its predicted satisfaction.

</details>
